claim: Fact Check: Mtsogoleri wa dziko la Belgium sanafune kuti anthu a ku Belgium achoke ku Belgium kapena ku Europe
evidence: Mtsogoleri wa bungwe la boma la Brussels adalimbikitsa anthu omwe akhumudwitsidwa ndi zovala zachi Islam ku Brussels kuti azikhala m'dera lina la likulu la Belgium, osati nzika zaku Belgium kuti zichoke mdziko muno kapena ku Europe, mosiyana ndi zomwe anthu ambiri amagawana pa intaneti.Chithunzi cha kanema cha masekondi 25 cha Saliha Raiss polankhula pamsonkhano wa bungwe ku Molenbeek-Saint-Jean pa Ogasiti 27 chinagawidwa pa Instagram ndi zonena kuti iye akufuna "Europe yopanda anthu aku Europe".Pa Seputembara 1, kutsegula tabu yatsopano kunatchula molakwika Raiss kuti: Amene sangathe kulandira akazi obisika kapena Chisilamu ku Belgium ayenera kukhala omasuka kuchoka!Reuters ImageElon Musk, kutsegula tabu yatsopano pa X yofanana ndi kutuluka kwa Belgium: Belgians!? Izi ndi zopenga. Zimasonyeza kuti analandira maonekedwe oposa 42 miliyoni.

claim: Kuyambira kalembera wa 2020, Florida "asintha kuchokera ku chiŵerengero cha anthu a chipani cha Democratic kukhala chiŵerengero cha anthu a Republican oposa 1.5 miliyoni".
evidence: Tsiku lina asanafike oweruza a boma kuti akambirane nkhani yapadera yokhudza kusintha chigawo, Gov. Ron DeSantis, yemwe ndi Republican wa ku Florida, anaulula mapu ake a m'boma, omwe angapangitse kuti a Republican azitha kusintha mipando 4 yomwe Democratic-olamulirawo amakhala nayo. DeSantis anagawana mapuwo ndi Fox News pa April 27 asanaitumizire ku Nyumba ya Malamulo ya boma. Iye anati mapu atsopanowa omwe nthawi zambiri amalembedwa zaka 10 zilizonse chiŵerengero cha anthu chikatha, adzaimira bwino anthu a ku Florida. "Florida anasintha kwambiri pa chiŵerengero cha anthu cha 2020, ndipo kuyambira pamenepo takhala tikumenya nkhondo kuti anthu akhale ndi ufulu wochita zinthu mwachilungamo", anatero DeSantis, ponena za chiwerengero cha anthu osawerengera anthu m'boma chaka chimenecho. "Anthu athu akuwonjezeka kwambiri, ndipo ife tachokera ku chipani cha Democratic kukhala ndi anthu oposa 1.5 miliyoni".

claim: "M'chigawo cha Malipiro a 2025, tinapereka ndalama zopitirira 415 biliyoni a KSh ku maiko, zomwe ndi pafupifupi KSh30 biliyoni kuposa chaka chatha".
evidence: Pulezidenti wa dzikoli ananena zoona kuti m'chaka cha ndalama cha 2025/26, zigawozo zidzalandira ndalama zokwana madola 415 biliyoni a KSh, zomwe ndi ndalama zokwana madola 30 biliyoni kuposa chaka chatha. Mu August 2025, pulezidenti William Ruto analowa nawo m'mudzi wa Homa Bay, womwe uli pamtunda wa makilomita 400 kumwera chakumadzulo kwa Nairobi, kuti achite msonkhano wa chaka chilichonse. Koma pa chaka chake cha 12, msonkhanowu unadzudzulidwa ndi ena kuti ndi "kutaya nthawi ndi ndalama" koma nthawi zambiri umakhala ngati njira yofikira anthu ambiri m'dzikoli, ndipo timatumiza mabiliyoni ambiri a ndalama ku maofesi a boma a ku Righdown, omwe ndi mabiliyoni ambiri a anthu, kuti asonyeze kuti zinthu zikuyenda bwino m'dzikoli.

claim: Zimene tikudziwa zokhudza minda ya ng'ombe ya Bovaer ndi ya ku Denmark

claim: Aleema Khanum, mlongo wa woimbidwa m'ndende wakale wa Pakistan PM Imran Khan, akutcha Mtsogoleri wa Gulu Lankhondo la Pakistan Asim Munir kuti ndi "Wachisilamu" yemwe akufuna nkhondo ndi India pa nthawi ya kuyankhulana ndi Sky News.
evidence: Anthu ambiri amene amagwiritsa ntchito malo ochezera a pa Intaneti komanso atolankhani ena akugawana vidiyo yomwe imanena kuti Aleema Khanum, yemwe ndi mlongo wa mtsogoleri wakale wa dziko la Pakistan Imran Khan, yemwe anali m'ndende, adatsutsa kwambiri mtsogoleri wa gulu lankhondo la Pakistan Asim Munir poyankha nkhani ina yomwe akuti idakambidwa ndi Sky News, pomutcha kuti "Wachisilamu woopsa" yemwe akufuna nkhondo ndi India. Kanemayo ndi wautali wa mphindi 1 ndi masekondi 13, ndipo wolemba nkhani komanso mtolankhani Yalda Hakim akufunsa Aleema Khan, yemwe ndi mlongo wa Imran Khan, kuti, "Chifukwa chiyani mukuganiza kuti Pakistan anapita ku nkhondo mu Meyi? Ndinali mboni ya zochitika zina zomwe zinachitika pa nthawi ya nkhondoyi. Ndinakhala ndi mwayi wofunsa nduna ya Defense Asim Munir, koma ndikufuna kumvetsetsa chifukwa chake mukuganiza kuti nkhondoyo ndi pakati pa Pakistan ndi India.

claim: Chilala chaposachedwapa ku Spain chinachititsa kuti anthu apeze chipilala cha zaka 7,000, chomwe chinali cha zaka zambiri kuposa mapiramidi a ku Iguputo.
evidence: Pa mfundo imeneyi ndi zoona kuti chipilala cha megalithic chokhala ndi zaka zikwi zisanu ndi ziwiri chikuonekera pamene chilala chatsika m'madzi a Valdecañas m'dera la Spain la Extremadura. M'zaka zaposachedwapa, chipilalachi chinaonekera mokwanira mu 2019 ndi 2022 ... ... komabe, chidebecho chinali chodzaza mu 2025  pomwe zolemba za chipilalachi zinagawidwa kachiwiri  ndipo chipilalacho sichinawonekere. chipilala cha megalithic choyambirira kuposa mapiramidi a ku Egypt ndi Stonehenge ku England posachedwa chinawonekera m'madzi ku Spain pomwe chilala chinafika mdzikolo, malinga ndi mphekesera zomwe zidayamba mu Julayi 2025. Mwachitsanzo, pa Julayi 14, 2025, positi pa Facebook idalemba chithunzi cha chipilalacho chomwe chikuyenera kukhala ndi kufotokozera kwakutali (kupezeka): Chithunzichi chinasonyeza kuwonekera kwa mlengalenga kwa miyala yozungulira pafupi ndi m'mphepete mwa madzi.

claim: Pulezidenti wa ku California, a Donald Trump, anawatchula kuti Gavin Newsom, "purezidenti wa United States, Gavin Newscum".
evidence: Pa March 16, 2026, Purezidenti wa United States Donald Trump anakonza msonkhano wa atolankhani pomwe adanyoza kazembe wa California Gavin Newsom, yemwe wakhala akudzudzula pulezidentiyo kwa nthawi yayitali. Malinga ndi zolemba ndi zolemba zambiri zomwe akuti zatengedwa pamsonkhano wa atolankhani wa Trump, akuti anatchula Newsom kuti "purezidenti wa United States, Gavin Newscum". Wogwiritsa ntchito X analemba za gaffe yomwe akuti a Trump: "Zimakhala zodabwitsa! akutaya mwachangu kuposa momwe aliyense wa ife ankaganizira".

claim: Mu December 2025, United States ndi Palau anasaina mgwirizano wa madola 7.5 miliyoni, womwe udzalole kuti United States itumize anthu 75 omwe sanali olakwa ku chilumbachi.
evidence: Pa December 2025, anthu ena ananena kuti chilumba cha Palau chinasaina mgwirizano wa madola 7.5 miliyoni ndi boma la United States kuti chilandire anthu 75 omwe sanali achifwamba. Ogwiritsa ntchito ankagawana nawo nkhaniyi pa malo ochezera a pa Intaneti osiyanasiyana (osungidwa, osungidwa, osungidwa), ndipo njira zingapo zopezera nkhani zinalembapo.

claim: Nkhuku youma ya kokonati imatha kuchiritsa zilonda zam'kamwa
evidence: Kodi kokonati youma ndi njira yothandiza yothetsera zilonda zam'kamwa? Ayi. Ngakhale kuti zilonda zambiri zam'kamwa zimatha kuchira zokha, nthawi zambiri mankhwala opangira mankhwala amalo amalangizidwa kuti athetse zilonda. Zilonda zazikulu, zosalekeza, komanso zobwerezabwereza zimafuna chithandizo chapadera chomwe chimathandiza kuthetsa zizindikiro, kuchepetsa kutalika kwa zilonda, komanso kupititsa patsogolo thanzi la wodwalayo. Chifukwa chake, kokonati youma sayenera kuonedwa ngati njira yodalirika yothetsera zilonda zam'kamwa. Quick Take An Instagram post ikuti kudya kokonati youma kumatha kuthandizira kuchiza zilonda. Pambuyo pofufuza mawuwa, tidapeza kuti ndizabodza. The Claim Malinga ndi d_tuber Instagram reel, kudya kokonati youma nthawi zambiri kumakhala kothandiza kwambiri.

claim: Anthu okhala m'mizinda ya Nigeria pa nthawi ya ufulu wawo analipo pafupifupi 7 miliyoni.
evidence: Mu 1960, Nigeria inalandira ufulu wodzilamulira ngati dziko lolamulira lokha pansi pa Constitution ya 1960, yomwe inapatsa boma boma la parliamentary system, madera atatu (Northern, Eastern and Western Regions), malamulo awiri a nyumba ziwiri (Senate ndi House of Representatives) ndi magawo ena (House of Assembly ndi House of Chiefs) omwe mphamvu za boma zimayikidwa m'magulu atatu kapena mndandanda  wapadera, wofanana ndi wotsalira.

claim: Walgreens inayamba kugulitsa makadi a Hallmark Mahogany, omwe ndi makadi olowera kwa anthu akuda okha mu August 2025.
evidence: Pa nthawi imene ankalemba nkhaniyi, a Walgreens ankaika zinthu za mtundu wa Hallmark Mahogany pa webusaiti yawo, ndipo ankachita kusankha zinthu zoti azitenga m'sitolo. A Hallmark ananena pa webusaiti yawo kuti a Mahogany anali "makadi ambiri amene anthu a ku Africa ankawapatsa". Ngakhale kuti a Hallmark ankagwiritsa ntchito makadi awo a Mahogany kwa anthu a ku Africa, sitinapeze umboni uliwonse wosonyeza kuti a Walmark ankaletsa anthu ena kugula makadiwo.

claim: Zosokoneza: Ukraine Inayesa Kupereka Ziphuphu ku Institute for the Study of War
evidence: Kanemayo amene akuzunguliridwa pa intaneti adapangidwa pogwiritsa ntchito luntha lochita kupanga pogwiritsa ntchito kanema weniweni wochokera ku Institute for the Study of War (ISW), gwero lotchuka la chidziwitso chokhudza momwe nkhondo ikuyendera ku Ukraine komanso padziko lonse lapansi. Magwero ambiri ovomereza ku Russia afalitsa kanema yemwe akuti adapangidwa ndi Institute for the Study of War yokhudza chiwembu cha ziphuphu chomwe ogwira ntchito pa Institute akuti adakumana nacho. Anthu osadziwika aku Ukraine akuti adalumikizana ndi bukuli m'malo mwa atolankhani odalirika apadziko lonse lapansi ndipo adapereka ziphuphu za $ 100,000 mpaka $ 500,000 chifukwa chofalitsa zabodza zokhudza Pokrovsk. Screenshot  Telegalamu Komabe, nkhaniyi ndi yabodza, ndipo kanemayo idapangidwa ndi ma network. Kuti apange kanema, opanga zithunzi adagwiritsa ntchito njira yodziwika bwino. Iwo adabwereka zithunzi zingapo kuchokera ku kanema weniweni kuchokera ku Human Rights Watch, ndipo ofufuza aku Russia adalemba nkhani zofanana ndi izi kuchokera ku kanema wofalitsa mawu, ndipo ena adalemba mawu oterewa.

claim: Fact Check: Mfundo yaikulu imene ikuphonya pa nkhani ya zonena za LGBTQ+ ku Britain ndi yakuti anthu akuchotsedwa ndalama.
evidence: Nkhani za pa intaneti zimasonyeza kuti mwambo wa LGBTQ+ ku Britain ukuchotsedwa ndalama chifukwa cha mtsogoleri watsopano wa bungweli.Ian Cooper, yemwe akuyang'anira Staffordshire County Council pambuyo poti Reform UK idagonjetsa bungweli pa zisankho za May, akutsegula tabu yatsopano, ponena kuti iye akutsutsana ndi kugwiritsa ntchito ndalama zaboma kuthandiza kuthandizira zochitika za Pride.We're not against Pride, Cooper ananena poyankha pa June 3, akutsegula tabu yatsopano ndi ITV Central. Pitilizani kusangalala, sangalalani, sangalalani ndi nthawi yabwino. Komabe, sitikufuna kuti ndalama za omwe amapereka misonkho zithe ndalama. Ngati mukufuna kuchita izi, chabwino, pitani ku boma, funsani mabungwe othandizira, ikani dzanja lanu m'thumba lanu. ReideA Facebook post, kutsegula masiku angapo pambuyo pake, kutchula za Span, Cooper ananena ndemanga: Pitilizani, khalani ndi nthawi yabwino, khalani ndi nthawi yabwino, khalani ndi nthawi yabwino.  Ngati mukufuna kuchita izi, pitani ku boma, funsani mabungwe othandizira, khalani ndi manja anu.

claim: Mnyamata wina, ngakhale kuti anauzidwa kuti palibe malo opezeka pamene ankafuna kusungitsa bedi pa intaneti m'chipinda chochezera ku Guruvayur Railway Station ku Kerala, anapeza kuti chipindacho chinali chotsekeka kwambiri pamene anapita kumeneko.
evidence: Malinga ndi ogwiritsa ntchito, munthu wina, ngakhale kuti adadziwitsidwa za malo opanda kanthu pamene akuyesera kusungitsa bedi pa intaneti, adapeza kuti chipinda chogonacho chinali chotsekeka kwathunthu pamene adapita kumeneko, zomwe zimapangitsa kukayikira za chinyengo. X Post @ByRakeshSimha Chinsinsi cha ulalocho chitha kuwonedwa pano. Komanso Werengani:Operation Sindoor: Air Chief Marshal Consoles Family Of 'Missing' IAF Pilot Shivangi? Ayi, Video Viral Singh With False Claim Check / Verification Tinayang'ana mawu ofunikira a "Guruvay / Kumanga chipinda", omwe adapangitsa kuti Facebook ikhale ndi chinyengo, yomwe idamaliza pa Ogasiti 17, 2025, pomwe Facebook idati, "Pomwe ntchito yopanga zipinda zapamwamba za ntchito ya Google, yomwe ikugwira ntchito pa intaneti, palibe malo omwe adzatsegulidwe.

claim: Jermaine Thomas, mwana wa msilikali wakale wa US Army wobadwira ku Germany, anachotsedwa ku Jamaica.
evidence: Pa nkhani imeneyi Woweruza wa Immigration analamula kuti Jermaine Thomas achoke ku United States mu December 2013, malinga ndi Immigration and Customs Enforcement. Department of Homeland Security inanenanso kuti a Snopes "anali ndi malamulo omaliza a kuchoka". Thomas anachotsedwa ndipo anatumizidwa ku Jamaica mu May 2025. Chakumapeto kwa June 2025, pamene boma la Trump linkafuna kuchotsa anthu osamukira m'dziko la United States mosaloledwa, mauthenga a pa Intaneti ananena kuti mwana wa msilikali wa ku United States anachotsedwa ku Jamaica, ngakhale kuti sanapitepo ku dzikoli. Munthuyu, yemwe anadziwikanso kuti Jermaine Thomas, anabadwira ku msasa wa asilikali a ku United States ku Germany, malinga ndi mauthengawo.

claim: Mu August 2025, Purezidenti wa United States a Donald Trump analembetsa lamulo loti kuwotcha mbendera ya America kuli ndi chilango cha chaka chimodzi m'ndende.
evidence: Pa August 25, 2025, Trump analembetsa lamulo loti "Procusing Burning of the American Flag". Lamuloli linkafuna kuti aliyense amene angapezeke akuwotcha mbendera ya America, akathenso kuthetsa ndi kuchotsa ma visa a anthu omwe si a ku America, ngati n'kotheka. Lamuloli likutsutsana ndi mlandu wa khoti lalikulu wa 1989 umene khoti linagamula kuti kuwotcha mbendera kumatetezedwa ndi Chigamulo choyamba. Lamuloli silinatsimikizire chilango chowotcha mbendera ya America. Mawu akuti Trump ankafuna kuti aliyense amene akuwotcha mbendera ya America azikhala chaka chimodzi kumbuyo kwa ndende akuwoneka kuti amachokera ku mawu omwe ananena pamene akulemba lamuloli. Mu 1989, khoti lalikulu la US m'khoti la Texas v. Johnson linalengeza kuti kuwotcha mbendera ya America ndi ufulu wolankhula wotetezedwa ndi Chigamulo choyamba. Pa August 25, 2025, Purezidenti Donald Trump analemba kalata yochokera ku boma la United States yofotokoza kuti "Procusing the American Flag" inali yotsutsana ndi mawu a boma la United States akuti: "Pamene Trump analamula kuti alembe lamuloli pa intaneti, mawu

claim: Nyumba ndi zodula chifukwa chakuti tinadzaza dzikoli ndi anthu osamuka osaloledwa okwana 30 miliyoni komanso chifukwa cha kusowa kwa nyumba.
evidence: Chifukwa chakuti tinagwetsa dzikoli ndi anthu 30 miliyoni osaloledwa omwe anali kutenga nyumba zomwe ziyenera kupita kwa nzika za ku America, " Vance anauza Fox News Sean Hannity pa Nov. 13. "Ndipo panthawi imodzimodziyo sitinkamanga nyumba zatsopano zokwanira kuyamba nazo ngakhale kwa anthu omwe tinali nawo". Chiwerengero cha anthu osamuka ku US osaloledwa ndi theka lomwe  ziwerengero zake zimayambira pa 12 miliyoni mpaka 14 miliyoni pofika 2023, zomwe ndi zomwe zilipo posachedwa. Ndipo ngakhale akatswiri amavomereza kuti kuwonjezeka kwa anthu osamuka kumapangitsa kuti anthu azigwiritsa ntchito nyumba zambiri, umboni wosonyeza kuti pali chifukwa chachikulu chowonjezera chiwongola dzanja cha anthu osamuka. Vance amatchula kuti kusowa kwa ndalama zoyendetsera nyumba kwawonjezeka chifukwa cha kuchuluka kwa anthu osamuka kwa anthu osamuka kwawonjezeka kwa chiwerengero cha anthu osamuka kwa 2008; ndipo akatswiri amanena kuti kuwonjezeka kwa ndalama zoyendetsera nyumba kwawonjezeka kwambiri chifukwa cha kuchuluka kwa anthu osamuka kwawonjezeka kwa chiwerengero cha anthu osamuka kwawonjezeka kwa chiwerengero cha anthu osamuka.

claim: Maphunziro a nyimbo analetsedwa ku Hamburg Germany chifukwa Asilamu amati ndi oletsa.
evidence: Kodi sukulu za boma ku Hamburg, Germany zaletsa maphunziro a nyimbo kuti asapweteke Asilamu omwe amawaona kuti ndi oletsedwa kapena 'oipa'? Ayi, si zoona: Masukulu a boma ku Hamburg sanachite zimenezo. Nkhani ya nkhani ya chilankhulo cha Germany yafotokozedwa molakwika pazolemba pa malo ochezera a pa Intaneti. Lipotili linatsatira kusaina kwa mawu apakati a olamulira achipembedzo ndi akuluakulu a sukulu motsutsana ndi kusalowerera m'malo - zomwe zinachitika chifukwa cha zochitika zina zachiwawa zochokera ku chipembedzo. Kanema wa masekondi 33 adawonekera mu positi (yosungidwa pano) lofalitsidwa pa X ndi @realMaalouf pa Seputembara 29, 2025.

claim: M'kati mwa December 2025, Purezidenti wa United States Donald Trump analengeza za Patriot Games, mpikisano wa masiku anayi wa masewera olimbitsa thupi pakati pa anyamata ndi atsikana ochokera m'maiko ndi zigawo zonse za US.
evidence: Pakati pa December 2025, mawu akuti Purezidenti wa United States Donald Trump adalengeza pa intaneti kuti "Patriot Games", mpikisano wa masiku anayi wa masewera olimbitsa thupi pakati pa anyamata ndi atsikana ochokera m'maiko ndi zigawo zonse za US. Wogwiritsa ntchito One X, yemwe positi yake idawonedwa pafupifupi 30 miliyoni polemba izi, adagawana mphekeserazo ndikulemba kuti: "Trump akulengeza 'mpikisano wamasewera wamasiku anayi wopanda pake' wokhala ndi 'mnyamata wina ndi mtsikana wina wochokera ku boma lililonse ndi chigawo chilichonse.'"

claim: Pa msonkhano wa nduna za nduna za nyumba ya White House mu December 2025, dzina la Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth linasindikizidwa molakwika pa chikwangwani chake monga "Secretary of War".
evidence: Pa December 2, 2025, pa msonkhano womaliza wa nduna za nyumba ya White House, owonera a Eagle-eyed adawona zomwe zimawoneka ngati zolakwika zodabwitsa pakulemba pa chimodzi mwa zikwangwanizo.Malinga ndi zithunzi ndi zithunzi zojambulidwa zomwe adagawana za msonkhanowu, mutu wa Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth wa US udalembedwa molakwika pa chikwangwani chake, akuwerenga "Secretary of War".Owerenga a Snopes adagawana chithunzi cha Hegseth atakhala kumbuyo kwa chikwangwani chowoneka ngati cholakwika ndipo adatifunsa kuti tione ngati cholakwikacho chinali chenicheni.Owerenga ena adaganiza kuti "SS" inali "kupatsa Nazi. "Democrat Gov. California. Gavin Newsom atolankhani adawonetsa zomwe zikuwoneka ngati chithunzi kuchokera pa kanema wa Hegseth ndi khadi lake lowonekera pamaso pake kuwonetsa cholakwikacho.

claim: NIA yakhazikitsa hotline yothandizira anthu kuti adziwitse za zochitika 'zotsutsana ndi dziko' monga chikondi jihad ndi uchigawenga ku India.
evidence: Nkhani ina yomwe inali yofalitsidwa pa Intaneti, yomwe inanena kuti National Investigation Agency (NIA) yakhazikitsa njira yothandizira anthu kuti adziwe za Asilamu omwe akuti akuchita zinthu "zolimbana ndi dziko", kuphatikizapo zomwe zimatchedwa chikondi jihad, chiwembu cha uchigawenga, ndi kumanga kachisi, ndipo nkhaniyo inali ndi manambala ndi imelo adilesi yomwe anthu anganene kuti achite madandaulo.

claim: "Zoposa za malonda ku Nigeria zinakula ndi 44.3% mu Q2 2025 kufika pa N7.46 trilioni ($4.74 biliyoni) ..."
evidence: Pulezidentiyu anali ndi ndalama zambiri, kuphatikizapo kuti kuwonjezeka kwa ndalama kunagwera pa zaka zitatu mu August 2025, kuti ndalama zakunja zinali pamlingo wawo wapamwamba kwambiri kuyambira 2019 ndipo kuti N330 biliyoni inagulitsidwa ku mabanja 8 miliyoni pansi pa National Social Investment Programme. Komabe, zonena zina zinali zolakwika, monga kuyerekezera kukula kwa GDP kwa kotala ndi ziwerengero zapachaka ndikuyerekezera katundu wogulitsa kunja kwa mafuta ndi katundu wogulitsa kunja.

claim: Pafupifupi 3% ya anthu aku America ali ndi ntchito yaulimi
evidence: Chigamulo: Pafupifupi 3% ya anthu aku America ali m'ulimi Source: Eric Edem Agbana, MP Ketu North Verdict: Overstated Researched by Gifty Danso M'boma la Ketu North, Eric Edem Agbana, polankhula pa pulogalamu ya Metro TV's Good Morning Ghana pa Julayi 3, 2025, adanena kuti pafupifupi 3% ya anthu aku America ali m'ulimi.

claim: Tinapereka $60 miliyoni masabata awiri apitawo pothandiza Gaza ndi chakudya.
evidence: Atafunsidwa mafunso okhudza njala yomwe ikuchitika ku Gaza, Purezidenti Donald Trump ananena kuti posachedwapa United States yatumiza ndalama zokwana mamiliyoni ambiri zothandizira. "Mukudziwa, tinapereka $60 miliyoni masabata awiri apitawo ndipo palibe amene anavomereza kuti ndi chakudya", iye anati pa July 27 ku Turnberry, Scotland. Trump anabwereza zomwe ananena pa July 29, ponena kuti "Tinatumiza $60 miliyoni. Ndi ndalama zambiri za chakudya, ndalama zambiri. Izi zitha kusamalira anthu kwa nthawi yaitali, ndipo tikufuna kuonetsetsa kuti zithandizidwa bwino".

claim: Purezidenti wa United States Donald Trump nthawi ina anaika uthenga wa Tsiku la Amayi womwe unayamba ndi mawu akuti, "Tsiku la Amayi labwino kwa ANTHU ANTHU ANTHU, makamaka amayi, akazi ndi okonda a Radical Left Fascists, Marxists, ndi Communists omwe akuchita zonse zomwe angathe kuti awononge ndi kuwononga Dziko lathu lalikulu lomwe linalipo".

Wowerenga Snopes adatitumizira chithunzichi ndipo adafunsa kuti, "Kodi izi ndi zenizeni?" Mwachitsanzo, ogwiritsa ntchito adagawana chithunzi chophimba pazenera pa Trump (archarch) ndi pa Facebook (arch) pa nthawi yomwe anavomerezedwa (arch) pa May 14, 2023.

claim: Fact Check: Mfundo yaikulu imene ikupezeka m'nkhaniyi ikuphonya mfundo yakuti 1% ya anthu a ku UK amavomereza kuti kuchotsa mimba kukhale kovomerezeka mpaka pamene mwana wabadwa.
evidence: A MP ku Britain avotera kuti achotse malamulo a malamulo a mimba kwa akazi, osati kuti achotse malamulo, mosiyana ndi mauthenga a pa Intaneti omwe amati athandizira kuti achotse malamulo mpaka kubadwa, ngakhale kuti 1% yokha ya anthu aku Britain amavomereza mfundo imeneyi.Zimenezi zinafalitsidwa pambuyo poti a MP ku Britain avotera kuti achotse malamulo a malamulo a mimba pa June 17.Polls za YouGov zikusonyeza kuti ndi 1% yokha ya anthu aku Britain omwe amaganiza kuti kuchotsa mimba kuyenera kukhala kovomerezeka mpaka kubadwa koma a MP omwe adasankhidwa ndi chiŵerengero chachikulu kuti achite chimodzimodzi, anati positi ya June 18, imatsegula tabu yatsopano pa Facebook.

claim: Ku Minnesota, eni a mfuti omwe ali ndi ziphaso amaloledwa kunyamula mfuti yodzaza pamisonkhano.
evidence: Alex Pretti wazaka 37 atamuwombera ndi anthu a U.S. Border Patrol pa Jan. 24, 2026, ku Minneapolis, anthu ena a m'boma la Pulezidenti Donald Trump anafotokoza kuti Pretti ndi woyambitsa chiwawa chifukwa chakuti anali kunyamula mfuti yodzaza pamene ankachita zionetsero. Pofalitsa pa Jan. 25 pa Fox News, ponena za imfa ya Pretti, mkulu wa FBI Kash Patel anati (pa 5:10), "Simungathe kubweretsa mfuti yodzaza ndi magazini angapo kuti mukambirane ngati mukufuna. Ndizosavuta. Mulibe ufulu woswa lamulo ndi kulimbikitsa chiwawa". Poyankha, ogwiritsa ntchito ambiri pa Intaneti anakayikira kapena kukayikira maganizo a Patel, kuphatikizapo Minnesota Gun Owners Caucus, gulu lolimbikitsa ufulu wa mfuti ku Minnesota, lomwe Patel "anatha kuwombera mfuti yolakwika" pa lamulo la Trump. Ndinaitana kuti Patel Patel atayambitsa ndemanga pakati pa akuluakulu a Homeland Security kuti "Premont ndi Mtumiki wa Mulungu".

claim: Mu 2000, munthu wina wa ku Missouri anaweruzidwa kuti akhale m'ndende zaka 13 koma sanakhalepo mpaka patapita zaka 13 chifukwa cha zolakwa za akuluakulu a boma.
evidence: Pa nthawiyi, a Cornealious "Mike" Anderson anali atakhala m'ndende chaka chimodzi pakati pa 2013 ndi 2014 pamene akuluakulu a boma anazindikira kuti munthuyo ndi wolakwa. Mwachitsanzo, woweruza wina wa X (archived) ananena kuti a Cornealious "Mike" Anderson "anaweruzidwa kuti ndi wolakwa chifukwa cha kuba m'manja" koma chifukwa cha zolakwika za boma, akuluakulu a boma "anaganiza molakwika kuti anali atagwiridwa kale m'maba, choncho sanali kumangidwa".

claim: Munthu wina woyenda wotchedwa Ronald McDonald anapha ana 12 pamisonkhano ya m'madera osiyanasiyana a ku Midwest ku America mu 1892 ndipo anawathandiza kukhala mascot wa McDonald's wa dzina lomweli.
evidence: Mwachitsanzo, pa August 11, woyang'anira tsamba la Instagram la Inspector Story anaika (zosungidwa) kanema  kulandira pafupifupi 10 miliyoni mawonedwe  kuwonetsa mawu akuti, "Uyu ndiye Ronald McDonald weniweni". Kanemayo anaonetsa mawu akuti, "Munthu weniweni Ronald McDonald sanali kugulitsa ma burger. Iye anali kusaka ana. Ichi ndi chiyambi cha mlandu weniweni kumbuyo kwa masks a chakudya chofulumira  ana khumi ndi awiri omwe anasowa pamaso pa chilimwe cha 1892 chinali mdima".

claim: Air Chief Marshal AP Singh analankhula za kuchenjeza boma lapakati za ndege za Tejas ndipo anati oyendetsa ndege a IAF adzatumizidwa ku Pakistan kuti akaphunzire.

claim: Tetanus akhoza kupha ndi peroxide ndipo amangopangidwa kudzera m'nyama
evidence: "Tetanus ndi imodzi mwa katemera woseketsa kwambiri, " akutero lemba lomwe lili mu chithunzi chomwe anagawana pa July 30, 2025 pa Instagram. "Mwayi wanu wopeza Tetanus ndi wofanana ndi kuyenda kuchokera pano ndikumenyedwa ndi meteor". Mawuwa, omwe adafalikira pa Facebook ndi X, akupitiliza kunena kuti kugwiritsa ntchito peroxide pavulala kumachotsa chiopsezo cha matenda ndipo kuti tetanus "imachokera m'matumbo a nyama". "Pamene mulibe nkhosa kapena ng'ombe m'nyumba mwanu, sindikuganiza kuti muli pachiwopsezo chilichonse", akutero mawuwa, omwe amachititsa kuti mawuwa atchulidwe ndi dokotala wa mitsempha Russell Block, yemwe adalimbikitsa kale zonena zaumoyo. Zithunzi za Instagram zomwe zidachitika pa August 14, Zolembazo zimabwera monga akatswiri a katemera wa 2025 akupezeka pa intaneti ndipo zitha kuchepa kwambiri ndipo mwina akubwera ndi katemera wa Human Services, ndipo wolemba nkhani wina wa United States, Robert Kennedy Jr. akuwonetsa kuti athandizira kuchepetsa ndalama zoyatsira katemera padziko lonse lapansi (kuchokera ku Canada, ndi ku Canada, ndi ku Canada).

claim: Mpweya woyamba wa chipale chofewa unalengedwa mwangozi pamene wina anali kuyesa kupanga kuwala kowala kwambiri.
evidence: Pa mfundo imeneyi, Erwin Perzy I, yemwe anali katswiri wa zida za opaleshoni ku Vienna, anali kuyesa galasi lodzaza ndi madzi m'zaka za m'ma 1900 kuti liwonjezere kuwala pamene tinthu tina tina tinali kuyenda ngati chipale chofewa. Zotsatira za "kugwa kwa chipale chofewa" zikuoneka kuti zinali zosayembekezereka, ndipo kenako anasandutsa lingaliroli kukhala galasi lachikumbutso. Ngozi ya Perzy sinali chitsanzo choyambirira chodziwika cha lingaliroli. Lipoti la boma la US pa 1878 Paris Universal Exposition linafotokoza zolemera za mapepala zopangidwa ndi mipira ya madzi yopanda madzi yomwe inachititsa kuti mphepo yamkuntho ikhale ngati mvula yamkuntho ikangobwerera. Kwa zaka zambiri, mphekesera zinanenedwa pa intaneti kuti galasi loyamba la chipale chofewa linapangidwa mwangozi. Malinga ndi nkhaniyi, katswiri wina wa ku Vienna anayesa kuyatsa kuwala kowala kwambiri ndipo anaona kuti madzi omwe anali m'chipinda chojambulidwa ndi magalasi a chipale chofewa anali ngati chowala chowala chowala chowala chowala chowala cho

claim: Mu December 2025, mtsogoleri wa anthu ochepa m'boma la United States, Chuck Schumer, ananena kuti "Go Bills", ponena za timu ya NFL ya ku Buffalo, New York, asanayambe nkhani ya anthu amene anawomberedwa ku Sydney, Australia, komanso ku Brown University.
evidence: Ngakhale kuti Snopes sanathe kupeza zithunzi za msonkhano wa atolankhani wathunthu, sitinapeze umboni wakuti kanema wa Schumer anajambula ndemanga zake. Pa mwambo womwewo, Schumer analankhula mwatsatanetsatane za kuwombera ku Australia ndi ku Brown University. Mu December 2025, kanema wa kanema anafalikira pa Intaneti (zosungidwa pano, pano ndi pano) kusonyeza kuti US Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer anati, "Pitani Bills", kutanthauza Buffalo, New York, NFL timu, pamaso adalankhula za kupha anthu ku Sydney, Australia, ndi ku Brown University. kuwombera pa mlungu womwewo. munthu wophedwa ndi mfuti anapha anthu awiri ndi kupha ena asanu ndi anayi pa Brown pa Dec. 13. The Dec. 14 pa mwambo wa Hanuk Bondi ku Sydney's Billkahdi Beach.

claim: Wogwiritsa ntchito Instagram bjeshruchi
evidence: Komabe, kanema wa chochitikachi tsopano akugawana ndi anthu ena omwe amati ndi achinyengo. New Delhi (Vishvas News). Kanema wochokera ku Ajmer, Rajasthan, wowonetsa kachisi akuwonongedwa ndi JCB, akugawana pazofalitsa pa intaneti ndi mawu abodza komanso achinsinsi. Nkhani yomwe yatulutsidwa ndi anthu ambiri imanena kuti kachisiyo adawonongedwa chifukwa chotsekereza njira yopita ku kachisi. Vishvas News idafufuza nkhaniyi ndipo idapeza kuti kachisiyo adagwa chifukwa cha mvula. Kachisiyu adawonongedwa aliyense atafuna kupewa ngozi. Kachisi watsopano adzagawidwa pamalo omwewo. Wogwiritsa ntchito 'Aaj Beshru' adagawana ulalo wa vidiyo ya Ajmerchi ndi Instagram yomwe adapanga pa Ogasiti 26, 2025 ndipo adapeza kuti kachisiyu adawonongedwa.

claim: Zoona zake: Human skin teddy bear found in California is made of latex, not flesh
evidence: Nyuzipepala za m'deralo zinati pa July 14, anthu a m'derali anayamba kufalitsa nkhani zabodza zokhudza nkhani yake pa Intaneti.Manyuzipepala a m'derali anapeza kuti akuluakulu a boma m'boma la San Bernardino anayankha lipoti la nyuzipepala ya anthu amene ankaoneka kuti anali ndi thupi la munthu.Manyuzipepala omwewo anafotokoza momveka bwino mu nkhani ina, kuti nyuzipepalayi inachitika tsiku lomwelo ndipo inali yopangidwa ndi zinthu za m'mimba osati za anthu.Komabe, malo ochezera a pa Intaneti, omwe anatsegula tabu yatsopano, anapitiriza kugawana mfundo za lipoti loyamba popanda kusintha masiku angapo pambuyo pake.ReKodi munthu wopotoka maganizo angachite zimenezi, munthu wina amene ankagawana nkhaniyi pa July 16.Manyuzipepala a San Bernardino County Sheriff Department anati mu nkhani ina, apolisi a ku Victoria County Police Department anati pa July 13, apolisi a ku Victoria County anayamba kufunsa mafunso a anthu a ku ofesi ya oyang'anira milandu ndipo anafunsa kuti alemba nkhani za nkhani ya nkhani ya nkhani ya ku America.

claim: Kuyambira mu September 2025, Texas iyamba kuyimitsa ophunzira opanda pokhala.
evidence: Koma izi sizikutanthauza kuti ophunzira a ku Texas adzathamangitsidwa chifukwa chokhala opanda pokhala. M'malo mwake, lamulo latsopanoli lizichititsa kuti zikhale zosavuta kuti masukulu azipatsa ophunzira opanda pokhala ndi ana ena kusukulu chifukwa cha zolakwa zochepa kuposa zomwe zafotokozedwa pamwambapa. Komanso, masukulu omwe anali ataikidwa pansi pa "mapulani owongolera zochita" kuti asunge ophunzira opanda pokhala m'chaka cha sukulu cha 2023-24 akuti adzakhalanso pansi pa mapulani amenewo. Mu Ogasiti 2025, mphekesera zinayamba kufalikira kuti Texas iyamba kuthamangitsa ophunzira opanda pokhala opanda pokhala m'masukulu ake mu Seputembala 2025. Mwachitsanzo, positi pa X (yosungidwa) inati masukulu a ku Texas tsopano ayamba kuthamangitsa ana "kuyenda" ndi "UNOVERTURNESS STEMENTS" pa Facebook, pomwe chithunzi cha "UNOVERTURNESS STEMENTS" chikuwonekera pa Facebook, chomwe chimati "OYENERA KUYENERA KWA KHAKHALA KUYENERA KWA KHAKHALE KUYENERA KHAKHAKHAKHAKHA

claim: Wopanga wamkulu wa Apple, Jon Yongfook, adatsitsidwa ntchito atatulutsa kapangidwe katsopano ka Liquid Glass ka iOS 26.
evidence: 9 June 2025, Apple idakhazikitsa mawonekedwe atsopano a ogwiritsa ntchito a iOS otchedwa Liquid Glass ku Worldwide Developers Conference (WWDC) 2025. Kusintha kumeneku kunalengezedwa mu June 2025 pamsonkhano wapachaka wa Apple wa opanga mapulogalamu. Zili ndi zinthu zowala, zowunikira, ndi zowonekera bwino zomwe zimapatsa iOS mawonekedwe owoneka bwino komanso owoneka bwino. Apple idakhazikitsa kapangidwe kameneka kuti iwonjezere kuya kwazithunzi ndikuwongolera ogwiritsa ntchito. Cholowa chatsopanochi chidzakhazikitsidwa ndi kusintha kwakukulu kwa iOS komwe kudzachitike chaka chino. Pakati pa chitukukochi, positi (pano, apa) ikuyenda pa intaneti, yonena kuti wopanga wamkulu wa Apple a Jon Yongfook, adatsitsidwa ndi kampaniyo limodzi ndi gulu lake la opanga, omwe anali akugwira ntchito yoyesera zinthu zowoneka bwino zokhudzana ndi mawonekedwe a blur ndi mawonekedwe.

claim: "Karte seksalice" idzagwiritsidwa ntchito m'makalasi azaumoyo m'masukulu oyambira ku Zagreb
evidence: Nkhaniyi imanena za msonkhano womwe unachitikira pa September 9, womwe unachitikira ndi bungwe la non-governmental congress CESI ndi Status M. Nkhaniyi imanena kuti "makadi okhudzana ndi kugonana" omwe anafotokozedwa pamsonkhanowu "ali ndi chidwi ndi 'moyo wa kugonana' wa ana". "Makadi omwe anafunsa ndi mafunso omwe mwanayo akuyankha", akuti nkhani ya pa X yomwe idagawidwa maulendo oposa zana kuyambira pa September 14.

claim: Boma la Ohio linapereka lamulo loti liziika mlandu kuvala zodzoladzola, zovala kapena ziwalo za thupi zomwe zimapereka "zodziwika bwino za kugonana zomwe zimasiyana ndi kugonana kwa munthu amene akuchita seweroli kapena wojambula zithunzi", zomwe zimaletsa kuwonetsa zojambula pagulu.
evidence: Pa nkhani imeneyi, Nyumba ya Malamulo ya Ohio inachita chigamulo choterechi ndi voti ya 6332. Chilankhulo cha lamuloli monga cholembedwa chimaletsa kujambula zithunzi m'malo opezeka anthu ambiri pokhapokha ngati zili zoyenera kwa akuluakulu okha, monga m'makalabu a zidole. Komabe ... Lamuloli silinapititsidwe ndi Ohio Senate kapena kusayinidwa ndi Republican Gov. Mike DeWine, monga momwe amalembera nkhaniyi. Mphekesera zakuti boma la Ohio linapatsanso lamulo loletsa kugwiritsa ntchito zodzoladzola, zovala, kapena ziwalo za thupi kuti liwonetse "chibadwa chosiyana ndi kugonana kwachibadwa kwa wochita kapena wosangalatsa" zomwe zinayendetsedwa pa intaneti koyambirira kwa Epulo 2026.

claim: Nduna ya boma la India, Amit Shah, akuponya mbendera ya dzikoli pamene akuyifungula pa Tsiku la Independence mu 2025.
evidence: Vidiyo yowonetsa Amit Shah akuwonetsa kuti akuyendetsa Tricolour idachitika mu 2018. Hyderabad: India Lachisanu idakondwerera Tsiku lake la 79 la Independence ndi changu chonyadira dziko, posonyeza zaka 78 kuchokera pomwe idasankha ufulu ku ulamuliro wa Britain mu 1947. Prime Minister Narendra Modi adakweza mbendera ku Red Fort ndipo adalankhula ndi mtunduwo pamutu wakuti 'Naya Bharat,' kuwonetsa masomphenya a India yodziyimira payokha komanso yotukuka. Pakadali pano, kanema wa Union Home Minister Amit Shah akuti akuponya mbendera ya India pomwe akuponya wakhala akuyendetsedwa pazanema, ponena kuti kanemayo adajambulidwa pa Tsiku la Independence 2025. Wogwiritsa ntchito kanema wina adagawana ndi Shah, yemwe adalemba chithunzi chofanana ndi "Amit A Shame A Shame A Shame A Shame A Shame A Shame A Shame A Shame A Shame A Day #Independence #Independence #Independence #25".

claim: Mu December 2025, Purezidenti wa United States, Donald Trump, analengeza kuti Magnetic Resonance Imaging scan ya ubongo wake "sinapezeke".
evidence: Mu December 2025, mphekesera yoti Purezidenti wa United States a Donald Trump adalengeza kuti MRI ya ubongo wake "siinapezeke chilichonse" idafalikira pa intaneti (kujambulidwa): WASHINGTONKudzitamandira pa thanzi lake lakumbuyo, Lolemba Donald J. Trump adati MRI yomwe idachitika paubongo wake sinapeze chilichonse. "Ndinali ndi MRI yabwino", adauza atolankhani. "Madokotala akulu kwambiri mdzikolo adayang'ana ubongo wanga ndipo adabwera. "A Trump adati palibe chifukwa chofalitsa MRI yake chifukwa "palibe chowonera", ndikuwonjezera kuti, "Ndi ngati East Sean Wing".

claim: America inali ndi malonda ochulukirapo a ayisikilimu mu 2020 motsogozedwa ndi Purezidenti Trump, koma izi zinasintha kukhala ndalama zochuluka za $40.6 miliyoni pansi pa ulamuliro wa Purezidenti Biden.
evidence: Pulezidenti Donald Trump's administration inachitira chipongwe woyambitsa wa Trump, Joe Biden, yemwe ankakonda kwambiri ayisikilimu, ponena kuti iye anatsogolera makampani a ayisikilimu ku America m'njira yovuta kwambiri pa nkhani ya chuma. "America anali ndi malonda ochuluka kwambiri a ayisikilimu mu 2020 motsogoleredwa ndi Pulezidenti Trump, koma malonda omwewo anasanduka kusowa kwa malonda kwa $40.6 miliyoni motsogoleredwa ndi Pulezidenti Biden", Office of the U.S. Trade Representative analemba pa July 20 pa X. Post linaphatikizapo tchati chomwe chikuwonetsa kusowa kwa malonda a ayisikilimu ku United States ndi Japan, South Africa, European Union, Brazil, ndi Turkey. US ayisikilimu malonda anasintha kwambiri chaka chomwe Biden adalowa m'malo mwake.

claim: Vance Boelter, yemwe akuimbidwa mlandu wopha anthu awiri a chipani cha Democratic ku Minnesota ndi akazi awo mu June 2025 (m'banja lina munafa anthu awiri), nthawi ina anasankhidwa kukhala m'bungwe la alangizi ndi Gov. Tim Walz wa chipani cha Democratic ku Minnesota.
evidence: Chifukwa chakuti Boelter poyamba anasankhidwa kukhala mtsogoleri wa bungwe la oyang'anira mu 2016 ndi a Democrat a m'boma Mark Dayton, Walz anam'sandutsa mu 2019 kuti akhale ndi nthawi yachiwiri, yomwe inatha mu January 2023. akuti Boelter si wa Democrat mwiniwake, ndipo ofesi ya Walz inatsimikizira kuti bwanamkubwa sakumana ndi ofuna kukhala mtsogoleri wa boma asanawasankhe. Pakati pa June 2025, mphekesera inayamba kufalikira kuti Vance Boelter, yemwe anali woimba milandu ya anthu awiri a boma la Democratic a ku Minnesota ndi akazi awo pa June 14, anali atakhala membala wa Bungwe la Boma la Ntchito la Minnesota ndi a Democrat Gov. Tim Walz. Mmodzi mwa anthu omwe adafunsidwayo anafa. Mwachitsanzo, akuluakulu a Facebook adatsutsa mauthengawa chifukwa chosatsutsa ziwonetsero za oyang'anira boma a boma a Boelton ndi omwe anali ndi zifukwa zandale chifukwa choti boma la Democrat ndi Bungwe la Oyang'anira ntchito la Woyang'anira ntchito la Woyang'anira ntchito la Woyang'anira ntchito (Workforce Development Board), ndipo woyang'anira boma

claim: Mlembi wa White House, Karoline Leavitt, anaulula "choonadi" chokhudza kugonana kwa Brittney Griner, mtsikana wa WNBA, ndipo WNBA inalengeza kuti "kuyesedwa kwa kugonana" ndikofunikira.
evidence: Mwachitsanzo, pa August 1, wogwiritsa ntchito tsamba la Facebook la Today in America adagawana mphekeserazo mu positi yomwe idalandira mayankho opitilira 69,000, ndemanga 18,000 ndi magawo 3,600. Post idakhala ndi nkhani pa blog yolumikizidwa mu ndemanga, monga momwe zinalili ndi zolemba zina zomwe zimagawana mphekesera zomwezo pa Facebook ndi Threads (zolembedwa). (Today in America/Facebook) Izi zimalembedwa: THIS HAPPENED: Karoline Leavitt adalengeza kuti Brittney Grin adasankha chisankho chodabwitsa pambuyo pozindikira nyengo yake yotsatira ya National Basketball Association (NBCA) ndipo adalengeza kuti ayamba kuyesa zowona za kugonana.

claim: A Trump administration asokoneza ndalama osati National Weather Service yokha komanso zomwe zimadziwika kuti NOAA.
evidence: Chigumula ku Texas chomwe chinapha anthu oposa 100 kuphatikizapo atsikana pamsasa wa chilimwe chinachititsa kuti anthu ambiri azidandaula kuti ntchito za boma zikutha ku bungwe la federal lomwe limaphatikizapo National Weather Service. Pa July 6 TikTok positi inati Purezidenti Donald Trump anachotsa ndalama ku National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration. TikTok anachotsedwa titangoyambitsa kufufuza kwathu, koma tapeza kuti kanema adagawana nawo pa X  ndipo mawu akuti NOAA ndi ntchito ya nyengo inachotsedwa ndalama anagawidwa kwambiri pa nsanja zina. "Chifukwa chake anthu a ku Texas sanadziwe kuti chigumula chachikulu chomwe chinapha anthu oposa 20 chinali kubwera kwa iwo chinali chifukwa chakuti boma la Trump silinachotse ndalama zokha ku National Weather Service komanso zomwe zimadziwika kuti NOAA ... zonse ziwiri ndi momwe timaganizira zochitika ngati izi", wolemba nkhani wa kanemayo.

claim: Kuukira kwa US pa malo a nyukiliya a Fordow ku Iran
evidence: Pa nthawi ya nkhondo ya pakati pa Iran ndi Israel, kanema yemwe amati akuwonetsa kuti US ikuukira malo a nyukiliya ku Fordow ku Iran akufalikira kwambiri pa malo ochezera a pa Intaneti. Vidiyoyi ikuwonetsa kuphulika kwakukulu, ponena kuti US Air Force idaukira malo atatu a nyukiliya ku Iran sabata yatha  Fordow, Natanz, ndi Isfahan. Wogwiritsa ntchito Facebook adalemba uthenga womwe unakhala wofalikira ndi mawu akuti: "Lero usiku, pambuyo pa kuwukira kwa ndege kwa US, malo ofunikira kwambiri ku Iran a ndege a Ford..!! Masomphenya a Ford (Chingerezi: Dzulo usiku, pambuyo pa kuwukira kwa ndege ku America, malo omwe ali pamalo ofunikira kwambiri ku Iran, Fordow..!!) Mutha kuwona positi pano. FACT CHECK NewsMobile idayang'ana malo omwe ali ndi zida za nyukiliya ndipo idapeza kuti ndi abodza. Kuchita kafukufuku wa NM. Kufufuza kwa kanema wofanana ndi wa gulu la US, lipotilo limadziwika ndi a Metro, lipotilolemba za Russian, ndi ma TV akuwonetsa kuti ndi ma TV aku Russia omwe amajambula zithunzi zojambula zithunzi zo

claim: Pulezidenti wakale wa Russia, Dmitry Medvedev, ananena mu June 2025 kuti "mayiko ambiri ali okonzeka kupereka zida zawo za nyukiliya kwa Iran".
evidence: Pa June 22, 2025, dziko la United States linamenya zida za nyukiliya zitatu ku Iran. Tsiku lomwelo, malo ena ochezera a pa Intaneti, kuphatikizapo Reddit (osungidwa) ndi X (osungidwa) , ananena kuti Pulezidenti wakale wa Russia, Dmitry Medvedev, analemba poyera kuti, "Mayiko angapo ali okonzeka kupereka zida zawo za nyukiliya mwachindunji ku Iran".

claim: Mauthengawa anali ndi kalata imene Loya Wamkulu wa Boma la United States Pam Bondi anatumiza kwa mkulu wa FBI Kash Patel yokhudza nkhani ya Epstein mu February 2025.
evidence: Zokhudza kuwerengetsa Kumeneku Kutsatira memo ya Julayi 2025 yochokera ku Dipatimenti ya Zachilungamo (DOJ) ya US ndi FBI yomwe inanena kuti wolakwa pa kugonana Jeffrey Epstein sanasunge "mndandanda wa makasitomala"  Mosiyana ndi mphekesera zomwe zikupitilira  ena ogwiritsa ntchito malo ochezera a pa Intaneti adagawana chithunzi cha kalata yomwe akuti ikutsutsana ndi zomwe zapezeka. Wofufuza wa US Pam Bondi adatumiza kalata yomwe akuti idasindikizidwa pa February 27, 2025, kwa Director wa FBI Kash Patel, malinga ndi zomwe atolankhani adalemba. M'kalatayi, Bondi "anavomereza kulandira mafayilo a Epstein omwe anali ndi" mndandanda wa "mauthenga ogwirizana ndi kugonana" wa wolakwa pa kugonana ndi mndandanda wa mayina a omwe adazunzidwa, "wosuta wa Facebook yemwe adanenedwa kuti adalemba kalatayi. Owerenga Snopes Bondi adatilembera imelo ndipo adatiuza kuti kalata ya Patel, yomwe adalemba pa February 27, 2025, inali yowona.

evidence: "Palibe ine, Trump akanataya chisankhochi, a Dems akanatha kulamulira Nyumba ya Malamulo ndipo a Republican akanakhala 51-49 ku Senate", Musk analemba m'mawu ake.Munthu wina amene analemba nawo mawuwa anali @PopBase (archiv) ndipo mwamsanga anapeza maonekedwe oposa 2.1 miliyoni ndi magawo 5,000.Elon Musk akanataya chisankhocho popanda iye:"Palibe ine, Trump akanataya chisankhocho, a Dems akanatha kulamulira Nyumba ya Malamulo ndipo a Republican akanakhala 51-49 ku Senate. [...] Zosadabwitsa zoterezi" chithunzi.Vt.com/GWYMFw (@Musk) analemba kuti: "Munthu wina amene analemba nawo mawuwa anali ndi mauthenga oposa 2.1 miliyoni ndipo anali ndi magawo 5,000.

claim: Mkulu wa asilikali a ku India, a General Upendra Dwivedi, anavomereza kuti ndege zisanu ndi chimodzi zinatayika ndipo asilikali 250 anaphedwa pa nkhondo yaposachedwapa ndi Pakistan.
evidence: Kanema yemwe akuti akuwonetsa mkulu wa asilikali (COAS) General Upendra Dwivedi akutsimikizira kuti ndege zisanu ndi chimodzi za ku India zinawonongeka, ndipo asitikali 250 adaphedwa pa nkhondo ya May 2025 ndi Pakistan, wafika pa intaneti.M'kanemayo, General Dwivedi akuti akuti akuti "...nkhondo yotsatira yomwe tikuyang'ana, ikhoza kuchitika posachedwa ndipo tiyenera kukonzekera moyenera...Izi zosakhala zamphamvu ziyenera kumenyedwa limodzi.Tatayika kale ndege zisanu ndi ziwiri ndi asilikali 250 koma sitidzasiya.Tidzaphunzira.Tili ndi malingaliro ena.Ndiye kuti malingaliro ake ndi otani?..." Newschecker adawunika kanema ndipo adapeza kuti ndi osokoneza.Malo angapo aku Pakistan, kuphatikiza ma profiles ovomerezeka, omwe akugawidwa ndi mawu akuti, "M'ma jets 6 omwe akutayika ndi asilikali 250 aku Pakistan, akulimbana ndi nkhondo, monga momwe akunenera pano, Woyang'anira wamkulu wa asilikali aku Pakistan adanenanso: "Perekani pano, monga momwe akunenera pano, Woyang'anira wamkulu wa asilikali aku Pakistan adzalandira zolemba zochokera ku F_A_

claim: Wolemba ndemanga wachitsiru Charlie Kirk nthawi ina ananena kuti ngati akanabereka mwana wamkazi wazaka 10 ndipo anabala patatha nthawi yaitali atagwiriridwa, iye ankafuna kuti mwanayo aberekedwe.
evidence: Funso limeneli linali loyerekezera, ngakhale kuti Kirk anali ndi mwana wamkazi pa nthawiyo. Pambuyo poti katswiri wina wa chikhalidwe cha anthu, Charlie Kirk, anaphedwa ndi kupha munthu wina pa September 10, 2025, pa mwambo wina ku Utah Valley University, anthu omwe amagwiritsa ntchito malo ochezera a pa Intaneti ankagawana nkhani zambiri zomwe zinali ndi zomwe Kirk ananena. Limodzi mwa nkhanizi, lomwe anagawana pa nsanja zingapo, linali lakuti Kirk nthawi ina ananena kuti ngati mwana wake wamkazi wazaka 10 atakhala ndi pakati atagwiriridwa, akufuna kuti aberekere mwanayo. Owerenga a Snopes anayang'ana pa webusaitiyi kuti adziwe zambiri zokhudza zomwe akuti ananena.

claim: Fact Check: WHO sinavomereze mankhwala apanyumba a COVID-19, musagwere mu chidziwitso cholakwika.
evidence: Ngakhale kuti tikufuna kukhulupirira kuti chinachake chonga ichi n'choona, mpaka pano palibe mankhwala kapena chithandizo, makamaka mankhwala apanyumba omwe asonyeza kuti ndi othandiza kuthetsa kachilomboka. Sanalandire chilolezo cha WHO kapena bungwe lina lililonse laumoyo. Mawuwa akunena za kusakaniza zinthu zosavuta zakhitchini monga nkhaka, ginger ndi uchi zomwe, zitengedwa kwa masiku asanu, zimatha kupondereza kufalikira kwa kachilomboka. Ngakhale kuti zonsezi zingakhale zothandiza kwambiri polimbana ndi kachilomboka (komanso kuthana ndi chimfine choopsa), palibe chowonadi pa zonena kuti mankhwalawa amatha kuchiza COVID-19.

claim: Boma la India likupereka ndalama kwa mabanja omwe ali ndi chisoni chifukwa cha COVID-19 - Mapindu a inshuwalansi pa imfa za Covid-19 atha kufunsidwa pansi pa dongosolo la PMJJBY ndi PMSBY.
evidence: Uthengawu ukugawidwa kwambiri pa malo ochezera a pa Intaneti, ndi mawu akuti ubwino wa Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY) ndi Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY) ukhoza kupatsidwa kwa anthu omwe amwalira chifukwa cha COVID-19.Zimene zimaperekedwa: Ubwino wa PMJJBY ndi PMSBY ukhoza kupatsidwa kwa anthu omwe amwalira chifukwa cha COVID-19.Zimenezo: Ngakhale kuti ndi zoona kuti PMJJBY ikugwiritsidwa ntchito kwa anthu omwe amwalira chifukwa cha COVID-19, pali zinthu zina zomwe zimayenerera kuti munthu akhale woyenerera komanso kuti apeze ndalama.

claim: Mu November 2025, tauni ina ku Montana yomwe inavota kwambiri ndi Purezidenti wa United States Donald Trump, inakonza "moto wa pedophiles" kuti uwotche katundu wa MAGA.
evidence: Pa nthawi imene Nyumba ya Malamulo ya United States inakonzekera kuvotera kuti ifalitse zikalata zokhudzana ndi wolakwa wogonana ndi anthu a m'banja lachiwerewere Jeffrey Epstein mu November 2025, mphekesera inafalikira pa intaneti yakuti tauni ya Montana yomwe inavota kwambiri kwa Pulezidenti Donald Trump inali ndi "moto wa ana" wowotcha mbendera za Trump ndi zipewa zomwe zinati "Make America Great Again", mawu omwe anayambitsa kayendetsedwe ka MAGA.

claim: Kumayambiriro kwa September 2025, wachiwiri kwa Purezidenti wa United States JD Vance adati Tsiku la Ntchito liyenera kukhala chikondwerero cha "akazi omwe akuvutika ndi ntchito".
evidence: Pa chiyambi cha September 2025, mawu ena anafalikira pa Intaneti akuti wachiwiri kwa Pulezidenti wa United States, JD Vance, ananena kuti Tsiku la Ntchito liyenera kukhala chikondwerero cha "akazi amene amavutika ndi ntchito". (On file) Post imodzi pa Threads inafalitsa mphekesera ndi chithunzi chomwe chinati: WASHINGTON-JD Vance anayambitsa mkangano Lolemba pofotokoza kuti Tsiku la Ntchito liyenera kukhala chikondwerero cha "akazi amene amavutika ndi ntchito". "Munthu amene anadzuka wafooketsa tanthauzo lenileni la Tsiku la Ntchito", Vance anauza Fox News kuti "Olemekezeka ogwira ntchito angasangalale anthu amene amagwira ntchito kuti apeze zofunika pa moyo, koma izi sizikusangalatsa ine ndi Donald Trump".

claim: Boma la Trump linati wolemba nyimbo Billie Eilish akuwononga dziko lathu mu zikalata zotayika
evidence: Nkhani ya Washington Post inati boma la Trump linagamula molakwika kuti Billie Eilish akuwononga dziko lathu ndipo kenako anafalikira ngati moto pakati pa makampani azosangalatsa. Nkhani ya Lachinayi yomwe inati anthu otchuka ambiri akufufuzidwa kuti athandizidwe ndi boma la Trump pa kampeni yotsatsa ya coronavirus inalinso ndi mawu olakwika ochokera ku White House onena za Eilish.

claim: Mu 2013, Donald Trump, yemwe pa nthawiyo anali munthu wabizinesi komanso wochititsa TV, anati: "Kutseka kwa boma kumachitika chifukwa cha kusowa kwa utsogoleri kwa pulezidenti.
evidence: Pa nthawi imene boma la United States linatseka ntchitoyi, yomwe inayamba pa October 1, 2025, anthu ankanena kuti mu 2013, wochita bizinesi komanso wochititsa TV wa pa nthawiyo, Donald Trump, anati: "Kutseka kwa boma kumachitika chifukwa cha kusowa kwa utsogoleri kwa pulezidenti. Ndikutanthauza kuti mavuto amayamba kuchokera pamwamba ndipo amayenera kuthetsedwa kuchokera pamwamba. Kutseka kumatanthauza kuti pulezidenti ndi wofooka". Malinga ndi zolemba za pulezidenti, Trump, yemwe anali wovomerezeka pa nthawi ya boma la 2025 , anatulutsa mawuwa masiku angapo asanachitike boma la pulezidenti Barack Obama pa nthawi yachiwiri ya pulezidenti wa ku America mu 2013.

claim: "M'zaka 12 zokha kuchokera pamene kubwezeredwa kwa ndalamazi kwachitika, takhala titasamutsa ndalama zokwana 4 trilioni a KSh ku zigawo".
evidence: Pulezidenti wa dzikoli ananena zoona kuti m'chaka cha ndalama cha 2025/26, zigawozo zidzalandira ndalama zokwana madola 415 biliyoni a KSh, zomwe ndi ndalama zokwana madola 30 biliyoni kuposa chaka chatha. Mu August 2025, pulezidenti William Ruto analowa nawo m'mudzi wa Homa Bay, womwe uli pamtunda wa makilomita 400 kumwera chakumadzulo kwa Nairobi, kuti achite msonkhano wa chaka chilichonse. Koma pa chaka chake cha 12, msonkhanowu unadzudzulidwa ndi ena kuti ndi "kutaya nthawi ndi ndalama" koma nthawi zambiri umakhala ngati njira yofikira anthu ambiri m'dzikoli, ndipo timatumiza mabiliyoni ambiri a ndalama ku maofesi a boma a ku Righdown, omwe ndi mabiliyoni ambiri a anthu, kuti asonyeze kuti zinthu zikuyenda bwino m'dzikoli.

claim: Malo osungirako anthu othawa kwawo omwe amadziwika kuti "Alligator Alcatraz" amayembekezeredwa kutsegulidwa ku Florida mu 2025.
evidence: Mwachitsanzo, wogwiritsa ntchito wina wa X anagawana mawu otsatirawa:  BREAKING: Purezidenti Trump akuyenera kupezeka pa mwambo waukulu wotsegulira ALLIGATOR ALCATRAZ ku Florida Lachiwiri, pa Palm Beach PostIzi zikhala ZOSAKANKANKANA 🔥Zikwi za anthu osaloledwa kukhala m'nyumba mozunguliridwa ndi zipolopolo ndi pythons, pafupi ndi eyapoti yomwe angalowe ... twitter.com/SbLcRH5aT  Eric Daugherty (@EricLugh) June 29, 2025 Zofanana ndi izi zikupezeka pa Facebook. Akaunti ya "Donald Trump" yomwe idagawana izi pa June 29, 2025 idatifunsa ngati oyang'anira athu omwe adasankhidwa kuti "Alligator Alcatraz" adatsegulidwanso pa intaneti ndipo adawerenga uthenga wofanana ndiwu pa Facebook.

claim: Mike Johnson, Mlangizi wa Nyumba ya Malamulo ya United States, anali dean wa sukulu ya zamalamulo yotchedwa Judge Paul Pressler yemwe pambuyo pake anaimbidwa mlandu wogwiririra, koma sukuluyi sinatsegulidwe.
evidence: Pa October 2025, mphekesera inafalikira pa Intaneti yakuti M'bale Mike Johnson, yemwe anali Mkulu wa Nyumba ya Malamulo ya United States, anali mkulu wa sukulu ya zamalamulo imene sinatsegulidwepo.Pepangayo ananena kuti Johnson anali mkulu wa sukulu ya malamulo kwa zaka ziwiri ku Judge Paul Pressler School of Law, yotchedwa mtsogoleri wotchuka wa Southern Baptist Convention yemwe kenako anaimbidwa mlandu wozunzidwa.Ogwiritsa ntchito malo ochezera a pa Intaneti monga BlueSky (archived),X (archived) ndiFacebook (archived) anafalitsa mphekeserazo, akugawana chithunzi cha Johnson ndi mawu akuti, "Sukulu ya malamulo yomwe Mike Johnson anali mkulu wa sukulu ya zamalamulo kwa zaka 2 ndipo sinatsegulidwepo ndipo inalibe ophunzira inkatchedwa Judge Paul Pressler School of Law.

claim: Mu December 2025, woimba Dolly Parton analengeza kuti adzatenga nyimbo zake zonse ku Amazon, ponena kuti woyambitsa Jeff Bezos akutsutsana ndi Purezidenti wa US Donald Trump.
evidence: Mu December 2025, mphekesera inafalikira kuti woimba nyimbo Dolly Parton anachotsa nyimbo zake zonse ku Amazon, potengera kuti woyambitsa Amazon Jeff Bezos anali wofanana ndi Pulezidenti Donald Trump. Zolembazo zinayamba kufalikira pa Facebook (zolembedwa, zolembedwa), kumene zinakopa zikwizikwi za anthu. Owerenga Snopes anatitumiziranso imelo kuti afune ngati mphekeserazo zinali zoona. claim: Soursop ndi wamphamvu nthawi 10,000 kuposa mankhwala a chemotherapy
evidence: Kodi soursop imalowa m'malo mwa mankhwala a chemotherapy? Kodi soursop imagwira ntchito bwino kuposa mankhwala a chemotherapy? Ayi. Palibe umboni wa sayansi wosonyeza kuti soursop ndi yamphamvu kwambiri kuposa mankhwala a chemotherapy nthawi 10,000. Pali kafukufuku wa labu ndi nyama, koma palibe kafukufuku wa anthu amene amathandiza pa nkhaniyi. Kafukufuku wa 2.3% yemwe amatchulidwa kawirikawiri pa nkhani ya mankhwala a chemotherapy amagwiritsidwa ntchito molakwika ndipo amachotsedwa pa nkhani yake. Soursop imatha kuyambitsa mavuto monga kuwonongeka kwa mitsempha ndi chiwindi. Kugwiritsa ntchito m'malo mwa njira zoyesera zomwe zatsimikiziridwa kuti ndi zoopsa. Last Updated on July 3, 2025 by Dr. Priyamvada Quick Take A social media post akuti soursop ndi yamphamvu kwambiri kuposa khansa. Imati soursop ndi yamphamvu kwambiri kuposa mankhwala a chemotherapy nthawi 10,000. Pambuyo pofufuza zenizeni, tinapeza kuti izi ndi zabodza.

claim: Achinyamata ku Bihar anawononga galimoto ya mtsogoleri wa BJP asanachitike zisankho za m'boma.
evidence: Zithunzi zingapo, zomwe zimawonetsa gulu la anyamata ku Bihar akuukira galimoto ya mtsogoleri wa BJP panthawi ya zisankho za assembly ku Bihar, zikufalikira kwambiri pazanema. Mu clipyi, akuti anthu angapo akuponya miyala pagalimoto ndikumenya kapu yake. Post ya Instagram ya ajay_yadav_ydu1c ikuwonetsa kanemayo ndi kufotokoza: Achinyamata a ku Bihar adalandila mtsogoleri wa BJP mwanjira ina 😂 mtsogoleri akawina palibe pafupifupi kuiwala. Nkhani yofananira imagawidwa pazanema. Mutha kuwona pano ndi pano. FACT CHECK NewsMobile-Mobile-Image idayang'ana zonenazo ndikupeza kuti ndizosokoneza. Pofufuza chithunzi cha viral, gulu la NM lidatsata zithunzizo mpaka Z Assembly Assembly ku Nepal. Sichiyenera kutero. Monga momwe malipoti apadera a boma akufotokozera, nkhani zofananira zimagawidwa pazenera.

claim: Sapatsidwa maphunziro a miyezi isanu. ... Maphunziro a oyang'anira ICE tsopano ndi masiku 47.
evidence: Kuwombera kwachiwawa kwa mayi wa ku Minneapolis m'galimoto yake ndi mkulu wa Immigration and Customs Enforcement pa Jan. 7 kunachititsa kuti anthu azidziwa bwino zimene anthu ankafunika pophunzitsidwa pa nthawi ya a Trump. Pa CNNs "State of the Union" pa Jan. 11, Sen. Mark Warner, D-Va., anauza anchor Jake Tapper kuti boma la Trump lachepetsa nthawi yophunzitsira anthu a ICE pamene likuwonjezera ntchito yake. "Kumbukirani kuti tikuwonjezera antchito a ICE 10,000", Warner anati. "Sikuli, sakupeza maphunziro a miyezi isanu. Kwenikweni, Jakes, maphunziro a anthu a ICE tsopano ndi masiku 47. Chifukwa chiyani masiku 47? Chifukwa Donald Trump ndi purezidenti wa 47". Anagwiritsanso ntchito chiwerengerochi pa Jan. 8 polankhula ndi munthu wodziimira payekha komanso pa Jan. 12 pa TV ya "SquaBC".

claim: Maimelo olembedwa ndi wolakwira kugonana wakufa Jeffrey Epstein akuti adapereka mankhwala kwa Bill Gates, yemwe ndi woyambitsa Microsoft, kuti athetse matenda opatsirana pogonana ndi atsikana aku Russia.
evidence: Zilengezo ziwiri zomwe zinaoneka ngati zolemba kapena zolemba kuchokera kwa Epstein kwa iye mwini zinali pakati pa mafayilo omwe adasindikizidwa ndi Dipatimenti ya Zachilungamo ku United States kumapeto kwa Januware 2026. Snopes sakanatha kutsimikizira ngati maimelowo adatumizidwa kapena kuwerengedwa ndi Gates kapena wina aliyense kupatula Epstein, kapena ngati zonena zomwe zili mmenemo zinali zowona.

claim: Ricky Ponting, yemwe kale anali mtsogoleri wa dziko la Australia, anaitana dziko la India kuti ndi "lotayika" chifukwa chosagwirizana ndi Pakistan pambuyo pa masewera a Asia Cup.
evidence: Woyang'anira ndege Surya Kumar Yadav anakumana ndi mikangano chifukwa chakuti analanda mnzake wa ku Pakistan pambuyo pa masewera a Asia Cup ku Dubai International Stadium Lamlungu watha.Tsopano, mawu otsutsa khalidwe la Yadav, omwe amalembedwa ndi woimba wakale wa cricket waku Australia Ricky Ponting, akufalikira pa intaneti. Ponting, akuti akulankhula ndi Sky Sports, adati, "Masewerawa adzakumbukiridwa kwamuyaya ndi India ngati wotaya wamkulu. Njira yomwe gulu la Pakistan likufunira kuti agwirane manja kumapeto kwa masewerawa yawathandiza kukhala osunga masewera a abambo, pomwe India ndi wotaya nthawi zonse". malonda a India Today adapeza kuti mawuwa ndi opangidwa mwadala. Kuyang'ana kwachinsinsi kwachinsinsi kwachinsinsi cha Ponting, komwe kwafotokozedwanso. Komabe, kufufuza kwa a Ponting kuti atsimikizire zomwe zikuchitika pa masewerawa tsiku lomaliza ndi nkhani yovuta kwambiri, sikunathandize.

evidence: Woyendetsa galimoto wazaka 21 wa ku India, wodziwika kuti Jashanpreet Singh, anamangidwa sabata yatha chifukwa chodzudzula galimoto yake ndi magalimoto angapo pa 10 Freeway ku Ontario, California, kupha anthu atatu. Kanema watchuka kwambiri pa malo ochezera a pa Intaneti, akuti akuwonetsa Singh akuphika mkati mwa galimoto yake mphindi zingapo ngozi isanachitike. claim: National Lok Adalat yomwe idzakhazikitsidwe pa 13 December 2025 idzapereka kuchotsera kwakukulu pa zovuta zomwe zikuchitika panopa.
evidence: Mauthenga angapo (pa, pa) pa malo ochezera a pa Intaneti akuyenda bwino, akunena kuti National Lok Adalat yomwe idzachitike pa 13 December 2025 idzapereka mwayi waukulu kwa madalaivala kuthetsa zovuta zomwe zikuchitika panopa, ndipo izi zidzakhala ndi kuchotsera kwa 50% mpaka 100%, kutengera boma. Malamulo omwe akuti aphatikizidwe ndi Delhi, Haryana, Punjab, Maharashtra, Uttar Pradesh, Gujarat, Tamil Nadu, Telangana, Karnataka, Rajasthan ndi West Bengal. Komabe, Lok Lok Adalat 2025 yomwe idakonzedwa pa 13 December, ndi nyumba zambiri zapa media zinanenanso zomwezo (pa, pano). Kudzera m'nkhaniyi, tiyeni tiwone zomwe zikuchitika m'mawu awa.

claim: Mwamuna wachisilamu akuzunza mkazi wina m'khola la chakudya ku India
evidence: Kanema yemwe akuwonetsa mwamuna akuzunza mkazi asanagwidwe ndi anthu omwe akuwoneka kuti ali m'malo odyera akupita patsogolo pa ma TV. Kanemayo akugawana ndi zonena kuti mwamuna wachisilamu adatenga mkazi kupita naye ku malo odyera, adamenya mkazi wake pomwe adakana kupita naye ku hotelo, ndipo kenako adamuteteza apolisi atafika. Wogwiritsa ntchito Facebook adalemba mawu omwe adasindikizidwa ndi mawu akuti: usiku womwe adapereka chakudya ku Dhaka kuti hotelo idzapitirire. Mtsikanayo adati dzulo pomwe Jihadi adagwiranso ntchito. Mtsikanayo adadzipukuta yekha ubongo pomwe mtsikanayo adabwera kudzapulumutsa Dhaka ndipo adapita kukauza apolisi kuti onse awiri akulimbana. Chifukwa chake, anthu omwe adapha a Dhaka ayenera kuti adachita nawo zoyipa.

claim: Pulezidenti wa United States, Donald Trump, ananena kuti apolisi a ku Washington, D.C., "akuimirira pamenepo, ndipo anthu akuwombera m'maso ndipo saloledwa kuchita chilichonse. koma tsopano ali ndi ufulu wochita chilichonse chimene akufuna".
evidence: Pa August 11, 2025, Purezidenti wa United States, Donald Trump, analengeza za "mlandu woopsa" ku Washington, D.C., ndipo anaika gulu la National Guard. Pofotokoza kuti zinthu zili "mosemphana ndi malamulo" ku likulu la dzikoli, malinga ndi mavidiyo ena, Trump akuti apolisi "adzaloledwa kuchita chilichonse chimene akufuna" poyankha mlandu wooneka ngati umenewu. Ananenanso kuti apolisi "akuimirira pamenepo, ndipo anthu akuwombera m'maso ndipo saloledwa kuchita chilichonse. Koma tsopano amaloledwa kuchita chilichonse chimene akufuna".

Komabe, kuyesetsa kwatsopano kwa nyerere zoyera za kumpoto kudzera mu feteleza ya in-vitro kwapereka chiyembekezo chobweretsa mtunduwo kuchokera pamphepete. Asayansi adatha kupanga ndi kuzizira 35 nyerere zoyera za nyerere zoyera za kumpoto, zomwe akuyembekeza kuti zimapezeka mwa nyerere zoyera za kumwera, zomwe ndi mtundu wapafupi kwambiri ndi nyerere zoyera za kumpoto. claim: Kusokoneza: Purezidenti wa Czech Petr Pavel Agrees with Ukraine Losing Territories For Survival
evidence: M'mawu a pa BBC, Petr Pavel anatsindika kuti West sazindikira kuti madera aperekedwa kwa Russia ndipo amalimbikitsa kuti Ukraine isatenge ufulu wake, osati kuti avomereze kuti dziko la Ukraine liperekedwe kapena kuti lipereke malo. Nkhani za propaganda zinagwiritsa ntchito nkhani imene Pulezidenti wa Czech Petr Pavel anafunsa BBC kuti iwononge mawu ake ndipo ananena kuti mtsogoleriyu anavomera kuti Ukraine isamasule madera ake omwe anali atagwiridwa ndipo ayenera kuvomereza kuti Ukraine idzatha kugwira ntchito yawo kuti apulumuke. claim: IPhone 12 sidzakhala ndi mahedifoni ndi adapter yolipiritsa.
evidence: Mwa kuchotsa charger ndi mahedifoni kuchokera m'bokosi lazogulitsa, Apple imanena kuti idzachepetsa mpweya wa mpweya wopitilira 2 miliyoni metric tons pachaka, zomwe zikufanana ndi kuchotsa magalimoto pafupifupi 450,000 pamsewu pachaka. Apple ikuchotsanso adapter yamagetsi ndi EarPods kuchokera pakunyamula kwa iPhone, kuchepetsa mpweya wa mpweya komanso kupewa migodi ndi kugwiritsa ntchito zinthu zamtengo wapatali, zomwe zimapangitsa kuti pakhale mapaketi ang'onoang'ono komanso opepuka, ndipo zimalola kuti mabokosi 70 peresenti ambiri azitumizidwa pa pallet.

claim: Tchimo lalikulu komanso losakhululukidwa la magazini ya ku France ya Charlie Hebdo pochitira chipongwe nkhope yopatulika ya Mneneri, linawulula chidani ndi udani wa mabungwe andale ndi azikhalidwe za kumadzulo motsutsana ndi Chisilamu komanso gulu la Asilamu.
evidence: Nkhaniyi inagulitsa malonda ambiri koma inadzetsa kutsutsidwa ndi magulu ambiri achisilamu.Pamenepo Pulezidenti wa ku France, Jacques Chirac, anatulutsa mawu akuti, "Chilichonse chomwe chingavulaze zikhulupiriro za munthu wina, makamaka zikhulupiriro zachipembedzo, chiyenera kupewedwa. Ufulu wa kulankhula uyenera kugwiritsidwa ntchito moyenera. Charlie Hebdo anayankha mwa kufalitsa kalata, yolembedwa ndi olemba ndi akatswiri 12 kuphatikizapo Salman Rushdie ndi Ayaan Hirsi Ali, yomwe inawerenga, mbali ina, Ife, olemba, atolankhani, akatswiri, tikufuna kukana ulamuliro wankhanza wachipembedzo komanso kulimbikitsa ufulu, mwayi wofanana ndi makhalidwe a dziko lonse. Chaka chotsatira, Charlie Hebdo adaimbidwa mlandu ndi mabungwe awiri achi French Muslim, Great Mosque of Paris ndi Union of Islamic Organizations of France, chifukwa chofalitsa zithunzi zojambula zojambula zojambula zojambula zojambula zojambula zojambula zojambula zojambula zojambula zojambula zojambula zojambula zojambula zojambula zojambula zojambula zojambula zojambula zojambula zojambula zojambula zojambula zojambula.

claim: Msuzi wa kaloti wa Beetroot amla ukhoza kuchiza khansa ya siteji 4 m'masiku 40
evidence: Kodi kumwa beetroot, amla, ndi madzi a kaloti kumatha kuchiza khansa ya siteji 4? Ayi. Palibe umboni wa sayansi wosonyeza kuti beetroot, amla, ndi madzi a kaloti angachiritse khansa ya siteji 4. Ngakhale kuti madzi awa amapereka zakudya ndi antioxidants, kafukufuku yemwe amathandiza kuti athetse khansa yake amangokhala kafukufuku wa labotale kapena nyama. Sizitsimikiziridwa kuti ndi njira zothandizira khansa. Akatswiri amalangiza kugwiritsa ntchito njira zovomerezeka zachipatala zokha komanso kufunsa madokotala asanayese njira zina zilizonse. Last Updated on July 3, 2025 by Dr. Priyamvada Quick Take A social media post akuti beetroot, amla, ndi madzi a kaloti angachiritse khansa ya siteji 4 mu masiku 40. Pambuyo pofufuza zenizeni, tidapeza kuti izi ndizabodza. Nkhani ya Anetro Instagram imati zomwe zimatsimikizira kuti beetro amla akhoza kuchiritsa 4 masiku okha.

claim: Zithunzi zitatu zomwe zimasonyeza kuti Iran ikugwiritsa ntchito zida za mfuti kulikulu la Israeli la Intelligence Mossad ku Tel Aviv.
evidence: Pomwe atolankhani aboma la Iran akuti mauthenga awo a mfuti zawo agunda likulu la Israeli intelligence agency Mossad ku Tel Aviv, zithunzi zingapo zikuyenda bwino kwambiri zomwe zimati zikuwonetsa ziwembuzo komanso nyumba yowonongeka, ngakhale kuti Israeli akuti yachepetsa izi powonetsa kuwonongeka kwa malo oimikapo mabasi oyandikana nawo.Pomwe chimodzi mwa zithunzi zomwe zafalikira kwambiri zimati zikuwonetsa wogwira ntchito wa Mossad, yemwe akuti adalumikizidwa ndi chida ndipo adatumizidwa ku likulu la Mossad atamangidwa ku Iran, kanema waufupi ndi chithunzi chomwe akuti chikuwonetsa chida cha Iran cha hypersonic chowononga likulu likuyendanso kwambiri.Mavesi osungidwa a zolembazo amatha kuwonedwa pano ndi pano.Cheke Newschecker adazindikira zolemba zowala kwambiri za zolembazo komanso cholakwika cha "Mossad Factory" chomwe chinawonetsedwa m'nyumba ya AI-Canti 8 yomwe idawonetsedwa, pomwe kanema wa AI-Canti 8 adawonetsera, yemwe adati adawonetsera zithunzi zonse zomwe zidachitika, pomwe chithunzi cha AI-Canti 8 adawonetsedwa, pomwe chithunzi cha AI-Canti 8 adawonetsedwa.

claim: A Houston pediatric practice anachotsa Dr. Christina Propst atatha kulemba pa intaneti kuti anthu omwe anakhudzidwa ndi kusefukira kwa madzi ku Texas mu July 2025 anali othandizira a Purezidenti Donald Trump omwe adapeza zomwe adavota.
evidence: Pa July 6 ndi 6, 2025, Blue Fish Pediatrics inanena kuti dokotala amene ananena za kusefukira kwa madzi ku Texas komwe kunayambitsa "kuvulala kwakukulu ndi kukwiya" sanali kugwiritsidwanso ntchito pa sitoloyo. Zolembazo sizinanene kuti dokotalayo anachotsedwa ntchito. Mu July 2025, pambuyo poti kusefukira kwa madzi kunapangitsa anthu osachepera 100 kufa kapena kusowa ku Texas, mawu (osungidwa) adafalikira pa intaneti akuti dokotala wa ana ku Houston anachotsa dokotala wotchedwa Christina Trump pambuyo poti iye analemba pa intaneti kuti Texas Flood Proporters anali othandizira omwe adapeza zomwe adavotera.

claim: Mukhoza kulemba mauthenga a RBG ku 50409 kuti musayine pempho loti seneta wanu asalowe m'malo mwa Ruth Bader Ginsberg ku Khoti Lalikulu mpaka chisankho cha 2020 chitatha
evidence: Tumizani mawu akuti kukana kwa Resistbot pa Apple Messages, WhatsApp, Messenger, Instagram, Telegram, kapena kudzera pa mauthenga pa 50409 ndikuyankha mafunso omwe mwalemba.M'mphindi zochepa, mudzakhala mutalumikizana ndi Congress kapena akuluakulu ena osankhidwa.Tsegulani kalata yanu kuti mupeze zotsatira zabwino kwambiri.Malangizo ndi mitengo ya deta zitha kugwiritsidwa ntchito ngati mugwiritsa ntchito mauthenga.Malangizo amasiyana.Kuima kwa mauthenga pa 50409 kuti muime mauthenga onse.Thandizo la mauthenga pa 50409 kuti muthandizidwe.Onani mawu athu ogwiritsira ntchito, chidziwitso cha chinsinsi, ndi chikalata cha ufulu wa ogwiritsa ntchito.

claim: Mu September 2025, malo ochezera a pa Intaneti anasonyeza kuti loya Alan Dershowitz analemba mawu ofotokoza za Vanity Fair mu Album ya Jeffrey Epstein ya tsiku la kubadwa kwake.
evidence: Pa September 2025, anthu pa Intaneti anagawana mawu a loya Alan Dershowitz omwe akuti anali m'buku la mauthenga a wolemba ndalama wochititsa manyazi Jeffrey Epstein pa tsiku lake lobadwa la 50. Epstein, yemwe akuti anali ndi maubwenzi ndi anthu ena otchuka, anamwalira atapha m'ndende mu 2019 pamene ankadikirira kuti apatsidwe mlandu wochita nawo malonda ogonana. Pa September 8, Komiti Yoyang'anira Nyumba ya US inalemba buku la tsiku lobadwa la mtsogoleriyo atatha kuitanitsa Dersstein kuti akapeze zikalata zosiyanasiyana zokhudzana ndi wochita chiwerewere.

claim: Ndege ya Air India AI 315 inawotchedwa pamene inatsika ku Delhi, okwera anali otetezeka
evidence: Vishvas News, pofufuza, inapeza kuti chithunzichi sichinali chaposachedwapa, koma chinali cha nthawi ina. Chithunzichi chikuwonetsa moto womwe unayambika mu injini ya ndege ya Air India Express yopita ku Kochi pa eyapoti ya Muscat. Komabe, tsopano akugawana molakwika ngati moto waposachedwa mu ndege ya Air India ku eyapoti ya Delhi. New Delhi (Vishvas News). Moto unayambika mu unit yamagetsi yothandizira ya ndege ya Air India ku eyapoti ya Delhi. Ngoziyi idachitika pamene ndegeyo idafika. Onse okwera ndi ogwira ntchito ali otetezeka. Tsopano, mogwirizana ndi izi, chithunzi chikuyenda pa intaneti chikuwonetsa utsi womwe umatuluka kuchokera kutsogolo kwa ndegeyo. Anthu ena akuwonekeranso ataima pafupi. Ogwiritsa ntchito akunena kuti chithunzichi ndi chaposachedwa ndipo chikuwonetsa moto pa ndege yakale ya AI-315 ku Delhi. Vishvas News, wofufuza, akuti motowo unapezeka kuti ndi wolakwika.

claim: Mu imelo yotulutsidwa ndi mnzake Ghislaine Maxwell ndi Komiti Yoyang'anira Nyumba ya Malamulo mu November 2025, wolakwira kugonana Jeffrey Epstein adatcha Purezidenti wa US Donald Trump "galu amene sanali kulira" ndipo adati Trump adachita maola ambiri ndi munthu yemwe adagulitsidwa kunyumba kwa Epstein.
evidence: Zankhanzazi zinafalikira pa Intaneti mu November 2025 chifukwa chakuti anthu ena ananena kuti Epstein watulutsa zikalata zoposa 20,000 ku Komiti Yoona za Kuyang'anira Nyumba ya Malamulo ndi Kusintha kwa Boma. Ogwiritsa ntchito malo ochezera a pa Intaneti monga Facebook (archived), X (archived) ndi Reddit anafalitsa nkhaniyi, komanso kuti a Jeffrey anatenga zithunzi za imelo yomwe ikufunsidwayo.

claim: Zopangira mafuta zakhala pansi.Mphamvu zakhala pansi kwambiri. ... Zinali $4 ndi $5 pa galasi limodzi.
evidence: Chimodzi mwa mfundo zazikulu kwambiri zomwe Donald Trump anayankhula pa kampeni ya 2024 inali kusintha kwa kuchuluka kwa ndalama zomwe zinakwera mu 2022 pansi pa Purezidenti wakale Joe Biden. Trump analonjeza kuti adzatsitsa mitengo ya zakudya, magalimoto ndi zinthu zina zogulitsa. Trump adachita mpikisano wopambana pamitengo pamsonkhano wa nduna pa Ogasiti 26, akuitana magulu angapo. "Zogulitsa zakugwa. Mphamvu zakhala zikutsika kwambiri", adatero Trump. "Zinali $ 4 ndi $ 5 pa galasi la gasi". Tinafufuza deta ya boma ndipo tinapeza kuti mtengo wa zinthu zina zogulitsa zakudya ndi zamagetsi watsika, koma zambiri zawonjezeka. White House sinayankhe funso la nkhaniyi. Kwa zinthu zogulitsa, tinasanthula mfundo za mtengo wa Standard kuchokera ku Labor Statistics Bureau ya Labor Price Index.

claim: Dissanayake anachititsa kuti malo a Sri Lanka oyang'anira masoka achilengedwe asakhalepo.
evidence: Akuluakulu a boma akuukana zonena zabodza zoti Sri Lanka 'yaletsa' bungwe loona za ngozi za ngozi za m'dzikoli. claim: M'bale Mike Johnson, yemwe ndi M'bale wa Nyumba ya Malamulo ya United States, ananena kuti: "Ademokalase amafunika kutsegula boma.Amanena kuti a Republican ndi amene ali ndi udindo wolamulira boma.Ife sitiri.Sitiri m'Senate.Mavoti 60 amalamulira Senate, osati ambiri".
evidence: Ponena za kuwerengetsa kumeneku, Johnson ananena izi pa msonkhano wa atolankhani pa Okutobala 27, 2025, pamene boma la Federal shutdown linalowa tsiku lake la 27. Iye anali kunena za malire a voti 60 a Senate omwe amafunika kuti malamulo ambiri apite patsogolo. Pamene shutdown ya boma la Federal ikupitilira mpaka sabata yake yachinayi kumapeto kwa Okutobala 2025, ogwiritsa ntchito malo ochezera a pa Intaneti adagawana kanema yemwe akuwoneka kuti akuwonetsa Mtsogoleri wa Nyumba ya Malamulo a US Mike Johnson, R-La, akunena kuti Republicans "alibe udindo wa boma".

claim: Mukhoza kulemba mauthenga a RBG ku 50409 kuti musayine pempho loti seneta wanu asalowe m'malo mwa Ruth Bader Ginsberg ku Khoti Lalikulu mpaka chisankho cha 2020 chitatha
evidence: Tumizani mawu akuti kukana kwa Resistbot pa Apple Messages, WhatsApp, Messenger, Instagram, Telegram, kapena kudzera pa mauthenga ku 50409 ndikuyankha mafunso omwe akubwezedwa.M'mphindi zochepa, mudzakhala mukulumikizana ndi Congress kapena akuluakulu ena osankhidwa.Tsegulani kalata yanu kuti mupeze zotsatira zabwino kwambiri. ... Simusowa kupeza oyimira anu poyamba, Resistbot idzakuthandizani. Ikhoza ngakhale kulemba kalata yanu kuchokera pa nambala ya bilu kapena nkhani, kapena mutha kulemba kalata nokha.

claim: Nancy Pelosi ananena kuti China ingafune kuti Joe Biden apite.
evidence: Chidziwitso: Russia ikugwira ntchito kuti igonjetse Biden; China ndi Iran amakonda US Trump kuposa Trump Russia ikugwira ntchito kuti "ichotsere" wopikisana naye Purezidenti Joe Biden, yemwe akuganiza kuti ndi wa chipani cha Democratic, pomwe China imawona Purezidenti Donald Trump ngati "wosayembekezereka" ndipo imakonda kuti asapambane zisankho, malinga ndi kafukufuku watsopano wa United States.

claim: Pafupifupi 40% ya ogwira ntchito zaulimi ku US ndi osamukira osakhala ndi zikalata.
evidence: Malinga ndi ziwerengero zaposachedwa kwambiri zomwe zilipo kuchokera ku USDA, pafupifupi 40% ya ogwira ntchito zaulimi  omwe amagwira ntchito ndi zipatso, ndiwo zamasamba ndi tirigu, mwachitsanzo  omwe analibe chilolezo chogwira ntchito ku United States pakati pa 2020 ndi 2022. Ziwerengero za 40% za zaka za 2020-2022 sizinaphatikizepo antchito azachuma osakhalitsa omwe ali ndi udindo wapadera wolowera ku US  komanso sizinaphatikizepo antchito a ziweto kapena a ulimi wa mkaka. Ziwerengero za 2023 ndi pambuyo pake sizinalipo panthawi yolemba izi. Kumayambiriro kwa 2025, ogwiritsa ntchito malo ochezera a pa Intaneti adayamba kugawana zonena kuti pafupifupi 40% ya ogwira ntchito zaulimi ku US anali osamukira osakhala ndi chikalata. Zolemba pa X, Reddit ndi Facebook zinatchula ziwerengero zomwe akuti. Mwachitsanzo, wina adati "osachepera 40% ya ogwira ntchito zaulimi ku America ndi osakhala ndi chikalata".

claim: Palibe kugwirizana pakati pa katemera wa MMR ndi autism, ngakhale kuti wofufuzayo anamangidwa.
evidence: Palibe kugwirizana pakati pa katemera wa MMR ndi autism, ngakhale kuti wofufuzayo waimitsidwa.
