claim: Nkhani ina imene anthu ambiri amanena kuti Ajit Doval analimbikitsa anthu a ku India kuti achotse ntchito ya Amazon pofuna kukakamiza dziko la United States kuti lizichita nawo nkhondo ya misonkho.
evidence: Chithunzi chomwe chili ndi mawu akuti Ajit Doval, National Security Advisor, akulimbikitsa anthu aku India kuti achotse pulogalamu ya Amazon ngati njira yolimbikitsira chuma cha United States pankhondo yamitengo yomwe ikuchitika, chafalikira pa malo ochezera a pa Intaneti. Chithunzichi chikuwonetsa kuti kuletsa kwakukulu kwa nsanjayo kungakhudze kwambiri zofuna za America. Tiyeni tione ngati Ajit Doval adachita izi. Nkhani yomwe ili pamwambapa ikhoza kuwonedwa pano. (Zosungidwa) NM VERIFIED NewsMobile yatsimikizira zonenazo ndipo idapeza kuti zithunzi za viral zinali zosokoneza. Gulu la NM lidayamba kutsimikizira mwa kufunafuna mawu a viral omwe adalembedwa kwa Ajit Doval okhudzana ndi Amazon ndi nkhondo yomwe akuti ikuchitika.

claim: Mu December 2025, akuluakulu a boma la United States Immigration and Customs Enforcement ku Minneapolis anamanga mayi wina wazaka 55 wa ku America dzina lake Sue Tincher, amene ankaonerera ntchito yawo.
evidence: M'mawa wa Disembala 9, 2025, oyang'anira Immigration and Customs Enforcement a ku United States adachita ntchito yosamukira ku North 21st ndi North Oliver Avenue ku Minneapolis. Malinga ndi zolemba zomwe zidagawidwa kwambiri pa malo ochezera a pa Intaneti, oyang'anirawo adatseka Sue Tincher, wazaka 55, nzika yaku America yemwe akuyang'anira zochitikazo. Atasungidwa, malinga ndi zolembazo, oyang'anirawo adawopseza kuti Snopcher adatsitsa peyala ndipo adadula mphete yake. Owerenga a Snopes adasaka tsambalo ndipo adatilembera imelo kuti atsimikizire kuti zolembazo zinali zolondola. Tidazindikira kuti zinali choncho, ngakhale kuti oyang'anira a Tincher sanathe kutsimikizira mosamala kuti oyang'anira adadula mphete ya Tincher pomwe anali m'ndende. Komabe, angapo omwe adalankhula ndi a Snopcher omwe adapeza nkhaniyo adalankhula ndi a Snopcher kuti apite ku DHSC kuti akapeze zambiri za nkhaniyi. "Mthandizi wa DHSC adatumiza imelo ku DHSC kuti atenge nkhani ya Snop

claim: Wosewera Christian Bale akumanga nyumba 12 m'mudzi wa $ 22 miliyoni ku Palmdale, California, womwe cholinga chake ndi kusunga abale ndi alongo omwe ali m'nyumba zosamalira ana pamodzi.
evidence: Pa June 2025, mawu akuti (archived) anafalikira pa intaneti akuti wojambula wa Batman Christian Bale anali kumanga nyumba 12 m'mudzi wa $ 22 miliyoni ku Palmdale, California, womwe unkafuna kusunga abale ndi alongo m'malo osamalira ana. Mawu ena otchuka a pa Facebook anali akuti: "Christian Bale Akupanga Nyumba 12 Zosamalira Ana M'malo Osamalira Ana Onse Pamodzi ndi Pansi pa Denga Limodzi".

claim: Mtumiki wa akunja wa Afghanistan Amir Khan Muttaqi analengeza za mapulani omanga akachisi achihindu ku Kabul ndi Kandahar mothandizidwa ndi ndalama za India.
evidence: M'nkhaniyi, munthu wina wa pa Intaneti anauzidwa kuti: "Ndinauza nduna yaikulu ya dziko la India Narendra Modi kuti ngati mutatithandiza ndi madola ochepa, tidzamanga akachisi a Ambuye Shiva ndi Vishnu ku Kabul ndi Kandahar Afghanistan. Kenako anthu odzipereka ochokera ku India adzatha kupita ku Afghanistan. Tinakweza mawu akuti 'Jai Shri Ram' pano. Tikuthokoza Modiji chifukwa choima nafe". Polemba vidiyoyi pa Facebook, wogwiritsa ntchito wina analemba kuti, "Kutha: Nduna ya Zachilendo ya Afghanistan Mutaqqi yalengeza kuti Afghanistan tsopano ikufuna kutsegula akachisi a Ambuye Shiva ndi Vishnu ku Afghanistan kuti apeze ndalama".

claim: Donald Trump anati "Mwezi watha, ndinakumana ndi Big Pharma.Kodi mukuganiza kuti ndi zophweka?
evidence: Pulezidentiyu anasaina Malamulo anayi okhudza mitengo ya mankhwala omwe analamula Secretary of Health and Human Services (HHS) kuti atenge njira zingapo zothandizira kuti odwala ku America azikhala ndi mankhwala otsika mtengo, kuphatikizapo insulin ndi epinephrine, komanso kuti azitsimikizira kuti anthu aku America akupeza mtengo wotsika kwambiri wa mankhwala awo.

claim: Kenneth Petty, mwamuna wa rapper Nicki Minaj, ndi wolakwa pa nkhani ya kugonana.
evidence: Pa nthawiyi, mtsogoleri wa bungwe la TPSUA, Erika Kirk, mkazi wa woyambitsa mnzake wa bungweli, Charlie Kirk, anabweretsa mlendo wapadera pabwalo la masewerawa, dzina lake Nicki Minaj. Kuonekera kwa kachilombo kameneka kunayambitsa kukambirana kwambiri pa nsanja monga X, pomwe mafani ena anadabwa ndi kuonekera kwa Minaj pa mwambo wina wachipembedzo. Komabe, anthu ena omwe ankadana ndi nkhaniyi sanadabwe. Iwo ananena kuti mwamuna wa Minaj anali wochita zachiwerewere ndipo nthawi zambiri ankayerekezera zochita zawo ndi milandu yoimba yokhudza kugonana kwa nthawi yaitali yomwe inachitika motsutsana ndi Purezidenti wa United States, Donald Trump. Snopes anafufuza za nkhani ya mwamuna wa Minaj ndipo anapeza kuti anali mwana. Malinga ndi magazini ya People, anthu a ku Minnesota, omwe anali ndi zaka ziwiri, anavomera kukwatirana ndi Kenneth LaGuardia High School, ndipo anavomera kukwatirana nawo chaka chotsatira, ndipo anavomera kukwatirana nawo.

claim: M'maola atatu kuyambira kumapeto kwa Meyi 11 mpaka kumayambiriro kwa Meyi 12, 2026, Purezidenti wa US a Donald Trump adalemba nthawi 55 pa akaunti yake ya Truth Social.
evidence: Pa May 11, 2026, anthu ambiri anazindikira kuti anthu ambiri anali ndi chidwi ndi nkhani ya Purezidenti wa United States Donald Trump pa Truth Social. Ngakhale kuti a Trump amadziwika kuti amalemba mawu olimbikitsa kwambiri pa webusaitiyi, ogwiritsa ntchito malo ochezera a pa Intaneti anadabwa ndi kuchuluka kwa zolemba zake zomwe zinayamba pa 10:14 pm EDT ndipo zinapitiriza mpaka m'mawa wa May 12. Robert Reich, wotsutsa a Trump komanso wakale wa nduna ya ntchito pansi pa Purezidenti Bill Clinton, adagawana mndandanda wa zolemba za Trump zomwe akuti ndi Zoona Zenizeni pa Social, ponena kuti a Trump adalemba zolemba 55 mu maola atatu. Owerenga Snopes adafunsanso tsamba lathu kuti adziwe ngati a Trump adalemba izi. adawonjezera: zolemba zake zidaphatikizapo kutsetsereka kwa AI, malingaliro osavomerezeka a chiwembu chokhudza chisankho cha 2020 ndi kutumiza kuti adani ake andale. Osati kuti aliyense akufunikira chikumbutso cha munthuyu ali ndi ma code a Truth Social, akunena kuti a Trump ndi oyipa, ndipo akuti a Trump ndi oopsa kwambiri, koma tonsefe tidatsutsa mawu a mphamvu ya mphamvu ya mphamvu ya mphamvu ya mphamvu ya mphamvu ya mphamvu ya

claim: Mu 2025, Chobani anali ndi mlandu wozenga mlandu chifukwa chakuti yogurt yake ili ndi phthalates, mankhwala omwe akhala akugwirizana ndi kusokonezeka kwa mahomoni.
evidence: Pofotokoza za kuwerengetsa kumeneku, a Chobani ananena m'mawu kuti khoti linasonyeza kuti lidzasankha mlanduwo mwa kupereka lamulo lovomerezeka pamsonkhano wa mu August. Lamulo limeneli silinalipo poyera panthawi imene linkafalitsidwa. Chakumapeto kwa October 2025, anthu omwe ankagwiritsa ntchito malo ochezera a pa Intaneti ananena kuti a Chobani akuimbidwa mlandu chifukwa chakuti ena mwa ma yogurt ake "achilengedwe" ali ndi mankhwala otchedwa phthalates omwe amachititsa kuti mahomoni asokonezeke. Malinga ndi zimene alemba pa Facebook (zolembedwa m'magazini ya Archivated), mlanduwu umati a Chobani "anachita malonda onama polemba zinthu zina kuti ndi 'zachilengedwe,'" ngakhale kuti mayesero aulere anapeza mitundu yambiri ya ma phthalates m'magawo ake a non-fatal ndi mkaka wamba. akuti ma phthalates amachititsa kuti anthu azivutika ndi mavuto monga mavuto a zaumoyo, ndipo ena amawaika ngati anthu omwe angakhudze matendawa, malinga ndi zimene alemba pa Facebook (zolembedwa m'magazini ya Chobani), ndipo alemba ena a m'khoti

claim: Aliyense akhoza kulandira katemera wa COVID-19.
evidence: Pamene Secretary of Health Robert F. Kennedy Jr. anachitira umboni pamaso pa Senate Finance Committee pa September 4, a Senate angapo anamudzudzula chifukwa choletsa katemera wa COVID-19 atalonjeza mu November kuti "sadzatenga katemera wa aliyense". "Kodi munali ndi chikwangwani chachikulu choti mukunama pamene munanena zimenezo?" Sen. Elizabeth Warren, D-Mass., anafunsa Kennedy. Pa August 27, US Food and Drug Administration inasintha malangizo ake a katemera wa COVID-19, kuchepetsa magulu a anthu omwe avomerezedwa kulandira katemera watsopano kwa aliyense wazaka 65 kapena kupitilira apo komanso kwa munthu aliyense wazaka 6 kapena kupitilira apo yemwe ali ndi vuto limodzi lomwe limawonjezera chiopsezo cha matenda oopsa a COVID-19. Kennedy adakankhira kumbuyo, "Aliyense akhoza kulandira booster", atero Warren Kennedy, ndipo kenako adawonjezera kuti "siyana ndi anthu abwino".

claim: Masks amachititsa kuti anthu azikhala ndi vuto la hypoxia.
evidence: Komabe, pali umboni wakuti kugwiritsa ntchito maski a N-95 kwa nthawi yaitali kwa odwala omwe ali ndi matenda a m'mapapo kungapangitse kuti pakhale mpweya wochuluka m'thupi.

claim: Zokhutira za maukonde a chiwembu, Radio Quebec, omwe akutsogoleredwa ndi Alexis Cossette-Trudel zaletsedwa ndi Facebook.
evidence: QAnon ndi nthano yopanda nzeru komanso yopanda umboni ya zipolowe zazikulu zomwe zinanena kuti Donald Trump anasankhidwa kukhala pulezidenti ndi asilikali kuti apulumutse dzikoli ku gulu la anthu olumala. M'mbuyomu, chisokonezo chomwe chinachitika pafupi ndi zipolowechi chaika anthu pangozi yeniyeni. Ngakhale kuti okhulupirira ena akhala akuwonekera m'dziko lenileni, ambiri mwa iwo omwe amatsatira zipolowe zopanda maziko anali okhaokha m'malo otentha kwambiri pa intaneti. Ndipo kenako, usiku wa Lachiwiri uno, idakhazikitsidwa. Pali winawake amene akuwonetsa chizindikiro chokhudza zipolowe, poyang'ana bwino Trump, pawailesi yakanema yapadziko lonse.

claim: Jackie Mitchell, mtsikana wazaka 17, adapha nthano za baseball Babe Ruth ndi Lou Gehrig kumbuyo ndi kumbuyo pamasewera a 1931 pakati pa Chattanooga Lookouts ndi New York Yankees.
evidence: Mwachitsanzo, positi yotchuka kwambiri (yosungidwa) inati Jackie Mitchell wazaka 17 anatenga njerwa ya pitcher pamasewera owonetsera a Chattanooga Lookouts ndipo adaponya ma hitcher awiri abwino kumbuyo, koma mkulu wa oyang'anira a Mitchell adasiya mgwirizano wake ndipo adati masewerawa ndi "olemetsa kwambiri" kwa azimayi patatha masiku angapo Mitchell atachita bwino kwambiri pa baseball.

claim: Papa Leo XIV anapereka kwa kazembe wa Iran Mohammad Hossein Mokhtari ulemu wapamwamba kwambiri wa diplomatic wa Vatican mu May 2026.
evidence: Pa nkhani imeneyi, Mohammad Hossein Mokhtari analandira Order of Pius, imodzi mwa maumboni apamwamba kwambiri a diplomatic a Vatican, pa May 12, 2026. Papa Leo XIV  Mutu wa dziko la Vatican  sanalipo pamwambowu koma anapereka dongosololi kudzera mwa mkulu wake wa mabishopu Paolo Rudelli. Mu May 2026, mawu (olemba) omwe anapezeka pa intaneti akuti Papa Leo XIV anapereka ulemu wapamwamba kwambiri wa diplomatic wa Vatican kwa kazembe wa Iran Mohammad Hossein Mokhtari.

claim: M'malo mowala ngati momwe zinalili ndi Gay FLAG monga momwe Biden anachitira, White House ili ndi kuwala kofiira, koyera, ndi buluu usikuuno
evidence: Kanema wowonetsa nyumba yoyera yowala yofiira, yoyera, ndi yabuluu pa Tsiku la Independence la US, Julayi 4, 2025, adagawidwa limodzi ndi zonena kuti, pansi pa Purezidenti Biden, nyumbayo idawunikiridwa ndi mitundu ya Pride flag.M'malo mowunikiridwa ngati GAY FLAG monga Biden adachitira, White House imawunikiridwa ndi Red, White, ndi Blue usikuuno pic.twitter.com/jzyaIUFlsl  Johnny Midnight ️ (@its_The_Dr) July 5, 2025 Ena mwa anthu achitsogoleli adafalitsa zithunzi pambali pambali, akunena kuti adawonetsa umboni kuti chiwonetsero chachikhalidwe cha dziko lapansi chidasinthidwa ndi mitundu ya Pride flag nthawi ya ulamuliro wa Biden.

claim: Pa nthawi imene atolankhani ankaimba nyimbo pa TV ya Air Force One, Pulezidenti Donald Trump anauza mtolankhani wina kuti: "Khalani chete, nkhumba!" ndipo anamufunsa za kufalitsidwa kwa mafayilo a Jeffrey Epstein.
evidence: Pa nkhani ya kuwerengetsa kotereku Mu November 2025, Komiti ya Nyumba ya Malamulo ya United States yoona za kuyang'anira boma ndi kusintha boma inatulutsa zikalata zoposa 20,000 zokhudzana ndi wolakwa wogonana ndi anthu Jeffrey Epstein, kuphatikizapo maimelo ochokera ku akaunti yake yomwe imakambirana za Purezidenti Donald Trump, yemwe anali ndi ubale wa zaka zambiri ndi wofalitsa ndalama uja.Pamene ankadikirira kuti Nyumba ya Malamulo ivomereze lamulo loti Dipatimenti ya Zachilungamo ivomereze kufotokoza zomwe zimatchedwa mafayilo a Epstein, anthu ambiri ankaganiza kuti Epstein ankadziwa za Trump.Vidiyo yomwe inafalikira pa intaneti yomwe inanena kuti Trump anajambula mtolankhani akufunsa za kufotokoza kwa mafayilowo, kuti "Khalani chete, nkhumba!" Zithunzi pamwambazi ndi zowona ndipo zikuwonetsa Trump akuyitana mtolankhani kuti "ng'ombe".

claim: "Kupita kwa ndalama, komwe kunali 9.6% mu 2022, kwakhala kukuchepa mpaka 4.6% kuyambira mwezi watha."
evidence: Koma zimene ananena kuti Kenya inali yofanana "pafupifupi m'njira iliyonse yoyezeka" ndi Singapore, Malaysia ndi mayiko ena a ku Asia mu 1963 pamene Kenya inalandira ufulu wodzilamulira, sizigwirizana ndi zimene ananenazo. Zambiri za pulezidenti zokhudza ulimi wa chimanga, malo a chimanga, kupanga shuga ndi kugula, ndi ndalama za tiyi zinali zolakwika. Pulezidenti wa Kenya William Ruto, amene anali kukakamizidwa kwambiri kuti akwaniritse malonjezo ake a zisankho, anaonekera pamaso pa Nyumba ya Malamulo pa 20 November 2025 kuti apereke chiphaso chake chachitatu cha dziko lonse kuyambira pamene analandira udindo mu September 2022. "Zaka ziwiri zapitazo, pamene ndinapereka boma langa loyamba, ndinali ndi nkhani yoti ndigulitse. Lero, ndili ndi nkhani yoti ndifotokoze", Ruto anayamba kufufuza, akuwonjezera kuti nkhaniyo inali yochokera ku mfundo zimene zinali "zotheka kukwaniritsa zolinga zake, kupatulapo kuti pulezidenti wa dzikoli anali ndi chiyembekezo chofuna kukwaniritsa zolinga zake, ndipo mwina anali ndi maganizo olakwika a anthu okwana madola 8.5 biliyoni, amene analimbikitsa dzikoli kuti alankhule ndi dziko latsopano.

claim: Mankhwala a chemotherapy othandizira khansa adapangidwa kuchokera ku gasi wa sinamoni.
evidence: Pa nkhani imeneyi, kafukufuku woyamba wa mankhwala opangira khansa anachitika pa Yale University m'ma 1940.Ofufuza kumeneko anazindikira kuti "leukopenic" properties ya mpweya wa sinapi , kutanthauza kuti mphamvu yake yowononga maselo oyera a magazi m'magazi ndi mafupa, kumene iwo amapangidwa , akhoza kukhala ndi ntchito zothandiza pa khansa yokhudzana ndi dongosolo la lymphatic, yomwe imathandiza kulimbana ndi matenda. Iwo anauyesa pa "lymphosoma" (tsopano amadziwika kuti non-Hodgkins lymphoma) wodwala, ndipo sanatchule mwachindunji mpweya wa sinapi kuti athetse censorship. Komabe ... ... Asayansi anali atafufuza mankhwala opangidwa ndi mankhwala kwa zaka zambiri, pogwiritsa ntchito mbewa kuti ayese. Ngakhale zotsatira za mayesero a anthu zinali zolonjeza, mankhwalawa omwe amapha ma lymphite anali amodzi okha mwa mankhwala angapo opangira mankhwala omwe adafalitsa pa intaneti. Mu 2025, nthano inalembedwa kuti "Sharda" pambuyo pa chilimwe cha 1946, U.S.S.D.S.S.S.S.S.S.S.S.S.S.S.

claim: Nsomba zisanu za beluga zinagwera m'mphepete mwa nyanja ku Kamchatka, Russia, tsiku limodzi chivomerezi cha 8.8 chisanachitike m'derali.
evidence: Koma kodi banja la azamba a beluga linachenjeza anthu a ku Russia tsiku limodzi tsoka limeneli lisanachitike? Pogawana vidiyo, ambiri pa Intaneti ananena kuti pa July 29, azamba a beluga asanu anafika m'mphepete mwa nyanja ku Kamchatka, m'dziko la Russia - malo amene chivomerezicho chinachitika. Zinali zakuti azambawo anali kuchenjeza anthu za chivomerezi chachikulu chomwe chidzafike m'derali. malonda Kugawana vidiyoyi pa Facebook, munthu wina analemba kuti, "Zimodzi mwa zamoyo za beluga zinatsikira ku Kamchatka tsiku limodzi lokha chivomerezicho chisanachitike. Ena mwa iwo, mwachibadwa, sanathe kumvetsera". Koma nkhanizi zinatichenjeza kuti nkhani za zivomezi za ku India zinayamba kufalikira, koma nkhani ya kanema ya Reverse Earthquake Today inachokera ku Russia.

claim: Mbendera za dziko la Pakistan zinakwezedwa pamsonkhano wa DMK.
evidence: Chithunzi cha M K Stalin chozunguliridwa ndi mbendera zobiriwira zambiri chikugawidwa kwambiri pazanema ndi zonena kuti mbendera za dziko la Pakistan zinakwezedwa pamsonkhano wa Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam (DMK) panthawi ya zisankho za Msonkhano wa Tamil Nadu. Wogwiritsa ntchito Facebook adalemba uthenga wa viral ndi mawu akuti: "Mutha kuwona positi pano". NM VERIFIED NewsMobile idatsimikizira kuti uthengawo unali wofalikira ndipo idapeza kuti zonenazo zinali zabodza. Tikawona chithunzichi mosamala, tidapeza kuti mbendera zobiriwira zomwe zikuwonedwa mu chithunzichi sizikuchokera ku Pakistan. M'malo mwake, zikuyimira Indian Union Muslim League (IUML), yomwe imagwiritsa ntchito mbendera wobiriwira wokhala ndi mwezi umodzi ndi nyenyezi. Ngakhale kuti pa mawonekedwe owoneka bwino, mbendera ya IUML ndi yofanana ndi ya Pakistan pamapangidwe ndi zigawo. Kuwunika kwina kunasonyeza kuti chithunzichi chidasindikizidwa ndi atolankhani a Front of America monga Kola ndi mbiri ya boma la Kolkata pambuyo pa chiwonetsero cha Seppon, chomwe chikuwonetsa chiwonetsero cha ku Chennai.

claim: The New York Mets anasintha mbendera ya US ndi mbendera ya Pride pamene nyimbo ya dziko inali kuimbidwa pamasewera a baseball pa June 13, 2025.
evidence: Pafupifupi pakati pa June 2025, kanema wa masekondi asanu anafalikira pa intaneti yemwe anawonetsa mbendera ya Pride pa jumbotron ku New York Mets' Citi Field stadium. Ogwiritsa ntchito malo ochezera a pa Intaneti ananena kuti mbenderayi idalowa m'malo mwa mbendera ya US pomwe nyimbo ya dziko inali kuimba. Ngakhale kuti anthu sananene kuti izi zidachitika pamasewera ati, mphekesera zidayamba pambuyo pa masewera a Pride Night a gulu lachisanu ndi chinayi pachaka, kukondwerera mafani a LGBTQ+ komanso kuphatikizidwa mu baseball, pa June 13, omwe adathera ndi masewera awo motsutsana ndi Tampa Bay Rays. Wogwiritsa ntchito wina wa X yemwe adagawana nawo chimbale (chokopera) analemba kuti: "BREAKING - The New York Mets asankha kuwonetsa mbendera ya Pride m'malo mwa mbendera ya US panthawi ya nyimbo ya dziko". Komabe, positi idasonkhanitsa mawonekedwe opitilira 6 miliyoni polemba izi.

claim: Mlembi wa United States Homeland Security, Kristi Noem, anayamikira Pulezidenti Donald Trump chifukwa cha nyengo ya mkuntho ya 2025 yomwe sinakhalepo, ponena kuti, "Munachotsa mkuntho".
evidence: Komabe, kuseka kopitilira muyeso komanso Noem atapitiliza ndemanga yake ya FEMA kunawonetsa kuti chipindacho chalandira mawu oti "mwapititsa mkuntho" ngati nthabwala. Mphekesera yomwe idafalikira pa intaneti koyambirira kwa Disembala 2025 idati Secretary of Homeland Security wa US Kristi Noem adathokoza Purezidenti Donald Trump chifukwa chopititsa mkuntho ku dziko lonse mpaka nyengo ya mkuntho ya 2025, kutsatira ndemanga ya Noem pamsonkhano wa White House Cabinet pa Disembala 2. Mwachitsanzo, pa Disembala 2, a Democratic Democratic Occupy Party (ODP) adalemba chithunzi chathunthu cha chithunzi cha Noem, yemwe adalemba chithunzi cha North Korea, komanso chithunzi cha Noem, chomwe chathunthu chikuwonetsa chithunzi cha North Korea, "Operate Noem" (Kristians) akuyamikira kwambiri chifukwa cholemba chithunzi cha North Korea.

claim: Kumapeto kwa April 2026, a Democrats ku Minnesota Senate anavomera mosagwirizana kuti achotse anthu akufa m'mavoti a boma.
evidence: Pa nkhani imeneyi, a Democrat a m'boma la Minnesota anavota motsutsa lamulo loti anthu amene anamwalira azichotsedwa pa kaundula wa voti. Chotsatira cha April 2026, mawu ena omwe anafa pa intaneti akuti a Minnesota State Democratic Senators "angokangana" ndi anthu amene anamwalira kuti achotsedwe pa kaundula wa anthu amene anafa. Mmodzi mwa anthu omwe anagwiritsa ntchito X (archived) anagwiritsa ntchito lamulo loti SAVE America, lomwe likanalimbikitsa kuti anthu onse azisankha okha pogwiritsa ntchito dzina la munthu amene anamwalira.

claim: "Afurika akumwera 12.4 miliyoni alibe ntchito".  Mmusi Maimane
evidence: Timayang'ana pa mfundo zisanu za pulezidenti zokhudza chuma, zomwe zonse zinali zolondola. Ramaphosa anali ndi ndalama zambiri pamene anali ndi kukula kwa GDP kwabwino, dziko lomwe linali ndi chiwongoladzanja chochepa kwambiri m'zaka 20 ndipo chiwongoladzanja ndi ndalama zolipirira zinali kutsika. Zilengezo zisanu za kusowa kwa ntchito zomwe anthu ochokera m'magulu onse andale ananena zinali zolondola, kapena pafupi. John Steenhuisen wa Democratic Alliance anali wolondola ponena kuti kusowa kwa ntchito kunali pamlingo wotsika kwambiri m'zaka zisanu, koma anzake ananena kuti izi zidapangitsabe anthu 12.4 miliyoni a ku South Africa kukhala opanda ntchito, kuphatikizapo 35.8% a anthu akuda a ku South Africa. Mamembala awiri a Mghonto weSizwe anali olakwika ponena za kuchuluka kwa anthu ku South Africa kukula mofulumira kuposa chuma chake ndipo anasokoneza chiwerengero cha mabanja osatetezeka ndi chakudya, ndikupangitsa kuti chiwerengero chawo chikhale chosadalirika. Mu February 2026, a Ramaphosa a m'boma la Africa (a) anazindikira kuti chaka chatha, pulezidenti wa dziko la South Africa (a) anafotokoza zizindikiro zolimba kwambiri za kusintha kwa chuma m'dziko la South Africa,

claim: Zitsulo za Stanley zimaphatikizapo lead yoopsa yomwe imatha kuyambitsa poizoni wa lead panthawi yogwiritsa ntchito bwino.
evidence: Kufufuza kwathu kwa zenizeni kumawonetsa kuti ngakhale kuti ma tumbler a Stanley ali ndi chitsogozo chochepa pomanga, kuyesa kwaumwini kumasonyeza kuti pali chiopsezo chochepa pogwiritsira ntchito nthawi zonse. Ogwiritsa ntchito Facebook amanena kuti makapu a Stanley ali ndi chiopsezo chifukwa cha kutsogolera pomanga, zomwe zikusonyeza kuti zingayambitse poizoni. Source Archive Archive Izi zakhala zikufalikira kwambiri, pomwe ogwiritsa ntchito ambiri akufotokoza za kugwiritsa ntchito kapena kupereka mphatso za tumbler. Onani Inde, Stanley Tumblers ali ndi chitsogozo, koma ndi zoona kuti Stanley Tumblers ali ndi chitsogozo chochepa pogwiritsira ntchito njira yowonongeka.

claim: Sunil Gavaskar anati "Virat Kohli anangophunzitsa motsutsana ndi mipira ya Anushka [Sharma] panthawi ya chiletso"
evidence: M'nkhani ya pa Instagram yomwe inalembedwa tsiku lina pambuyo poti gulu la Kohli, Royal Challengers Bangalore, ataya masewera a IPL kwathunthu ndi Kings XI Punjab, Sharma anakana mbali ya ndemanga yomwe Gavaskar anali kukambirana za kusowa kwa masewera a Kohli ndi wolemba ndemanga mnzake Aakash Chopra. Gavaskar anati 'Sanakhale ndi mwayi wochita masewera omwe mukufuna... Ndipo panthawi yoletsa, adangochita masewera olimbitsa thupi motsutsana ndi bowling ya Anushka monga momwe amawonera muvidiyoyo.

claim: M'nthawi ya mtsogoleri wa boma la Michigan, dzina lake Gretchen Whitmer, mabanja ochepa anali osauka kusiyana ndi amene analipo kale.
evidence: Kazembe wa Michigan, Gretchen Whitmer, yemwe ndi wofunsira chipani cha chipani cha Democratic, posachedwapa analemba za zomwe wachita pamene akulowa chaka chake chomaliza kutsogolera boma la Michigan. "Njira yathu yathandiza kwambiri", Whitmer analemba m'nkhani ya February 2 Substack. "Kudya kwaulere kwa pre-K, koleji ya anthu onse, ndi sukulu kwa onse. Mabanja ochepa omwe akukhala mu umphawi". Mawu ake amatchula nkhawa za ku America za mtengo wotsika mtengo, zomwe zingakhale nkhani yofunika kwambiri kwa omwe akuvota pa chisankho chapakati pa nthawi, kuphatikizapo mpikisano wa Senate ku Michigan. Purezidenti Donald Trump adalonjeza kuti adzachepetsa mitengo ya zinthu zamalonda, magalimoto ndi zinthu zina, ndipo izi zimayikidwa pa MAGA-Meter yathu, yomwe imatsata malonjezo a kampeni yake.

claim: Nkhani ya Punch the Monkey yomwe inapeza chitonthozo m'chinyama chophimba pambuyo poti chasiya pobadwa ndi yeniyeni.
evidence: Poyamba mu 2026, zithunzi ndi mavidiyo omwe amawoneka kuti akuwonetsa mwana wa ng'ona akugwira chidole cha orangutan plush adasungunuka pa malo ochezera a pa Intaneti. Zolemba pa intaneti  kuphatikizapo pa X, TikTok ndi Reddit zinanena kuti "Punch the monkey" idakanidwa ndi amayi ake ndipo idanyamula nyama yodzaza ndi zinthu zolimbikitsa. Pomwe Punch adachotsa zingwe za mtima padziko lonse lapansi, owerenga a Snopes omwe anali okayikira adasakatula tsamba lawebusayiti kuti atsimikizire kuti nkhaniyo ndi yoyenera. Owerenga angapo adafufuza mwachindunji ngati zomwe zili za ng'ona yothamangidwayo zidapangidwa ndi luntha lochita kupanga.

claim: B. R. Gavai, yemwe ndi mkulu wa oweruza milandu ku India, wabwezeretsa logo yoyambirira ya Khoti Lalikulu la ku India, yomwe ili ndi mawu akuti Satyameva Jayate, omwe anasintha kukhala Yato Dharmastato Jayah panthawi ya mkulu wa oweruza Chandrachud.
evidence: Nkhaniyi imati pa nthawi imene anali mkulu wa oweruza milandu D. Y. Chandrachud, khoti lalikulu linasinthira mawu ake a m'Baibulo kuchokera ku 'Satyameva Jayate' kupita ku 'Yato Dharmastato Jayah.' Ikufotokozanso kuti mkulu wa oweruza milandu B. R. Gavai wabwezeretsa chizindikiro choyambirira cha khoti lalikulu, chomwe chili ndi mawu akuti 'Satyameva Jayate' (pa nthawi ya ulamuliro wa B. R. Gavai).

claim: Lamulo la SAVE America Act lidzalimbikitsa anthu a ku America kuti alembe okha voti, zomwe ndi 5% yokha ya anthu a ku America masiku ano".
evidence: Pamene Senate inayamba masiku angapo a zokambirana za lamuloli pa March 17, mtsogoleri wa chipani cha Senate Minority Chuck Schumer, D-N.Y., anatsindika mavuto amene iye anati lamuloli lidzachititsa. Lamuloli "lidzakakamiza anthu a ku America kuti alembe (kuvota) okha, zomwe ndi 5% chabe ya anthu a ku America masiku ano", iye anauza atolankhani. Schumer ali olondola kuti lamuloli liyenera kufuna umboni wa nzika kuti avotera payekha kuti alembe voti. Koma iye akulakwitsa za chiwerengero cha anthu a ku America omwe amalembetsa payekha, malinga ndi kafukufuku wa boma.

claim: Tekinoloje ya NASA idapeza "dziko lapamwamba" la exoplanet lomwe limapereka "zizindikiro zachilendo".
evidence: Komabe, "zizindikiro zachilendo" zomwe zimayambira pa malo ochezera a pa Intaneti zinatengedwa kuchokera ku malipoti ndi zolemba za zomwe zapezeka pa malowa, osati NASA kapena ofufuza omwe akukhudzidwa. "Zizindikiro zachilendo" zomwe akuti ndizomwe zimawonedwa kawirikawiri, zomwe "zimasonyeza kuti dziko lina likuyenda bwino osati chifukwa chakuti timaliwona mwachindunji kuchokera zaka zambiri za kuwala, koma chifukwa chakuti dziko lapansi lomwe likudutsa patsogolo pa nyenyezi yake limapondereza kuwala kwake pang'ono", malinga ndi NASA. Mphekesera zomwe zimayenda pa malo ochezera a pa Intaneti mu January 2026 zinati asayansi apeza "dziko lapamwamba" la dongosolo lathu la zinthu zakuthambo.

claim: Mu June 2025, woulutsa nkhani wa ku Britain, Piers Morgan, ndi woimba wa ku Scotland, Susan Boyle, anali okwatirana ndipo anali ndi cholinga chokwatirana.
evidence: Nkhaniyi imati anthu otchuka awiriwa a ku Britain anali atakwatirana mobisa kwa zaka zambiri ndipo tsopano anali okwatirana, chifukwa anaganiza zoyamba kuchita zinthu zawo zaumwini pambuyo posunga nkhaniyo kwa zaka zoposa khumi. Mwachitsanzo, nkhani ina ya pa Facebook (yosungidwa) yomwe inagawidwa pa June 25, 2025, pomwe mawuwa anafika pa mayankho oposa 5,900.

claim: Zilengezo zopanda maziko zimayang'ana katemera wa tifoid ku Bangladesh
evidence: Zopanda maziko amanena kuti cholinga cha katemera wa tifoi ku Bangladesh ndi galimoto ya anthu opha tifoi. claim: Zithunzi zochokera ku Iran zimasonyeza kuti doko la Dayyer ku Bushehr likuyaka chifukwa cha kuwukira kwa Israeli.
evidence: Kanema wa nkhondo ndi chinthu chachikulu kwambiri pa lipoti lililonse la nkhondo zomwe Iran yawonongeka chifukwa cha kuukira kwa Israeli. Ndidzagawana malipoti ndi kanema mu ulusiwu ndikutsimikiza kuti 'mphepo ya nkhondo' ndi yolondola. Kanema wochokera ku Port of Bushehr. pic.twitter.com/zrsoYIzdeC  @amuse (@amuse) June 13, 2025 Ena adati zithunzizo zikuwonetsa Israeli akugunda kwambiri ndipo mwina akuphatikizapo mabomba a Natan bunker-ter omwe akulimbana ndi zida za nyukiliya pafupi ndi Isfahan.

claim: Mu imelo yotulutsidwa ndi mnzake Ghislaine Maxwell ndi Komiti Yoyang'anira Nyumba ya Malamulo mu November 2025, wolakwira kugonana Jeffrey Epstein adatcha Purezidenti wa US Donald Trump "galu amene sanali kulira" ndipo adati Trump adachita maola angapo ali yekha ndi munthu yemwe adagulitsidwa kunyumba kwa Epstein.
evidence: Zankhanzazi zinafalikira pa Intaneti mu November 2025 chifukwa chakuti anthu ena ananena kuti Epstein watulutsa zikalata zoposa 20,000 ku Komiti Yoona za Kuyang'anira Nyumba ya Malamulo ndi Kusintha kwa Boma. Ogwiritsa ntchito malo ochezera a pa Intaneti monga Facebook (archived), X (archived) ndi Reddit anafalitsa nkhaniyi, komanso kuti a Jeffrey anatenga zithunzi za imelo yomwe ikufunsidwayo.

claim: Bungwe la International Cricket Council (ICC) linatulutsa mawu oletsa gulu la pakistani la cricket kwa chaka chimodzi.
evidence: Bungwe la International Cricket Council (ICC) linalengeza kuti silingachite nawo masewerawa pa February 15 motsutsana ndi India, ngakhale kuti boma linatsimikizira kuti gulu la dzikoli silingathe kuchita nawo masewerawa kuyambira pa February 7. (Archive Link) "Mawu"wa analalikira kwambiri pa nkhani ya ICC yomwe idzathetse Pakistan kwa chaka chimodzi. Newschecker anafufuza nkhani za Facebook, Instagram ndi X za ICC ndipo sanapeze kulengeza kulikonse pa Pakistan Cricket. Facebook, akaunti za ICC ndi X za ICC zinalengeza kuti palibe kulengeza kulikonse pa tsamba la ICC Cricket.

claim: Mtambo wa Sheld unapezeka pamwamba pa Haridwar pa December 18, 2025.
evidence: Vishvas News inapeza kuti kanema wa kanema wa 'mtambo wambiri' ku Haridwar si waposachedwa, koma ndi wa July 2023. Kanema wakale akugawana pa malo ochezera a pa Intaneti ndi zonena zolakwika, akuziwonetsa ngati chochitika cha December 18, 2025. New Delhi (Vishvas News). Kanema wowonetsa mawonekedwe akulu a mtambo wambiri akuyenda kwambiri pa malo ochezera a pa Intaneti.

claim: Pulezidenti wa United States Donald Trump anaitana Russell Vought, mkulu wa Office of Management and Budget, kuti "Darth Vader" m'nkhani yake ya mu October 2025.
evidence: Ponena za kuwerengetsa uku, Trump anapitiriza mawu ake ndi kutamanda Vought ndipo ananena kuti otsutsa amamutcha Darth Vader: "Akumutcha Darth Vader. Ndimamutcha munthu wabwino. Koma akuchepetsa zinthu zofunika kwambiri kwa a Democrat ndipo sadzapezansopo". Pa nkhani imene analankhula mu October 2025 ku White House Rose Garden, Purezidenti wa United States Donald Trump anafotokoza kuti Russell Vought, mkulu wa Office of Management and Budget, "Darth Vader", dzina la munthu woipa wa mu filimu ya "Star Wars". Malinga ndi zithunzi zimene zinafalikira pa intaneti, pamene Trump sananene dzina lake mwachindunji, iye anasonyezera munthu wina amene anali kumvetsera nkhani yakeyo ndi kunena kuti: "Tili ndi Darth Vought.

claim: Mlembi wa zachitetezo Pete Hegseth atatha kuchotsa mkulu wa asilikali a Navy John Harrison mu October 2025, akuluakulu a boma anamanga Harrison chifukwa choganiza kuti anachita zinthu zokwiyitsa.
evidence: Mwachitsanzo, wogwiritsa ntchito pa X analemba mawu akuti: Ofufuza a US Navy JAG Lachisanu anamanga mkulu wa asilikali panyumba yake yapamwamba pafupi ndi Washington Naval Yard patangopita maola ochepa kuchokera pamene Secretary of War Pete Hegseth anamuthamangitsa chifukwa cha kusamvera, Real Raw News yapeza. Owerenga ena ankaona kuti nkhaniyi ndi nkhani yeniyeni ya zochitika zenizeni. M'malo mwake, mphekesera zokhudza kumangidwa kwa Harrison zinayamba ndi Real News  tsamba lawebusayiti yomwe imafotokoza kuti zomwe zimatulutsidwazo ndizoseketsa kapena zoseketsa. Tsamba lake la Nkhani za Harrison limati: pa webusaitiyi pali chidziwitso ndi chidziwitso komanso zosangalatsa. Nkhaniyi ili ndi nkhani yoseketsa, ndipo talembapo za Donald Trump, yemwe akuti anatenga nkhaniyi, ndipo talembapo za satire pa webusaiti yathu, zomwe zatchotsedwapo ndi appointee H.

claim: Nkhanizi zimasonyeza kuti Nigeria inali 'yosakakamizidwa ndi ngongole' pambuyo poti yathetsa ngongole za IMF
evidence: Molakwika amanena kuti Nigeria anali 'wopanda ngongole' atatha kukhazikitsa ngongole za IMF. claim: M'nkhani yake ya pa January 6, 2026, pa msonkhano wa a Republican ku Nyumba ya Malamulo, Pulezidenti wa United States Donald Trump ananena kuti a Democrats adzakakamiza "anthu onse kuti akhale ndi maganizo olakwika" ngati atagonjetsa chisankho chapakati cha 2026.
evidence: Ponena za mtundu umenewu, Trump ananena mawu akuti "transgender for everyone" pa nkhani ya demokalase. Purezidentiyo ananena kuti a Democrat akufuna "transgender for everyone", koma sananene kuti angakakamize mfundo imeneyi. Mawu akewa ankaoneka kuti akutanthauza kuti imeneyi ndi njira yongofuna kukhazikitsidwa osati udindo. Trump wakhala akugwiritsa ntchito mawu akuti "transgender for everyone" mobwerezabwereza pofuna kukhudza a Democrat komanso kutsutsa mfundo za ufulu wa anthu otembenuka. Zina mwa mawu ake akale akuphatikizapo mawu ofanana ndi mawu omwe amanena za kugwiritsa ntchito mphamvu kuti athetse "transgender for everyone".

claim: Lamulo la SAVE America  limafuna kuti aliyense abwerere kukavota ndipo layisensi yanu yoyendetsa galimoto, ID yanu yeniyeni, kapena ID ya usilikali si zabwino mokwanira.
evidence: Mark Kelly, wa ku D-Ariz., ananena kuti ngati lamulo la SAVE America Act likhala lamulo, lidzakhala vuto lalikulu kwa aliyense amene ali kale pamabuku a oyesa. "SAVE America Act si Save America", Kelly ananena m'nkhani ya March 17 X. "Ndipo izi sizikutanthauza kuti aliyense ayenera kulembetsa kuti avotera payekha ndipo chiphaso chanu cha galimoto, REAL ID, kapena ID ya asilikali si zabwino mokwanira".

claim: Madzi a mandimu ndi mchere wa thanthwe zimatha kusungunula miyala yam'mapapo.
evidence: Positi yotchuka ya pa Instagram yomwe ili ndi mawu akuti "Aliyense ayenera kudziwa kuti ayenera kugawana nawo" ikuwonetsa kuti miyala ya impso imatha kusungunuka m'masiku ochepa pakumwa madzi a mandimu ndi mchere wa thanthwe, omwe nthawi zambiri amatchedwa sendha namak. Kutenga madzi okwanira nthawi zambiri kumalimbikitsidwa kuti matendawa achitike; komabe, kudya mchere wambiri ndi madzi a mandimu tsiku lililonse ndi koipa. Fact Check Kodi miyala ya impso ndi chiyani? Kodi ndi chiyani chomwe chimapangitsa kuti ikhale pachiwopsezo chaumoyo?

claim: Lamulo lovomerezeka la Unduna wa Mafuta ndi Mpweya Wosungunuka limalengeza za kukwera kwa mafuta kwa ₹10 / lita la mafuta ndi ₹12.50 / lita la dizilo.
evidence: Chilango chimene boma linapereka, chomwe chinanenedwa kuti chidzachititsa kuti mitengo ya mafuta ndi mafuta ikuwonjezeke kwambiri, chafalikira pa Intaneti. Chikalatachi, chomwe akuti chinaperekedwa ndi Unduna wa Petrol ndi Natural Gas ndipo chalembedwa pa April 29, 2026, chinanena kuti mitengo ya mafuta yakwera chifukwa cha kukwera kwa mitengo ya mafuta padziko lonse lapansi. Tinatsimikizira kuti mawu amenewa ndi oona. Screengrab kuchokera pa positi ya X ya @santoshaAugust Komanso werengani: West Bengal Polls 2026  AI-Generated Video ya Nduna Bratya Basu Kutenga ziphuphu Zogwiritsidwa Ntchito Monga Zoona Zotsimikizira Kufufuza kwa mawu ofunikira pa kukwera kwa mitengo ya mafuta ndi mafuta ndi mafuta ndi nduna iliyonse yovomerezeka sanayitanitse malipoti odalirika otsimikizira chisankho choterocho.

claim: Ted Lieu anakumana ndi Kash Patel ndi Epstein wojambula mobisa, ponena kuti "Trump anandiuza kuti ndiziika m'manda"
evidence: Kodi Rep. Ted Lieu anakumana ndi Mtsogoleri wa FBI Kash Patel ndi chinsinsi Epstein kujambula kumene Patel akuti, "Trump anandiuza kuti ndiziika?" Ayi, si zoona: Pa msonkhano wa Congress mu September 2025, Lieu anakumana Patel ndi kujambula, koma si "kujambula mobisa"; izo zinali poyera zilipo kuyankhulana ndi mtolankhani Michael Wolff. Patel sanawonedwe kapena anamva pa kuyankhulana, ndipo palibe amene anati, "Trump anandiuza kuti ndiziika izo".

claim: Pa zaka 29 zonse zimene dziko la Nigeria lakhalapo kwa zaka 60, dzikoli lakhala likulamulidwa ndi asilikali.
evidence: Chiwawa cha asilikali ku Nigeria chinali nthawi imene anthu a m'magulu a asilikali a ku Nigeria anali ndi ulamuliro ku Nigeria kuyambira mu 1966 mpaka mu 1999, ndipo ulamulirowo unatha kuyambira mu 1979 mpaka 1983.

claim: Nduna yaikulu ya Bihar, Nitish Kumar, anapepesa kwa gulu la Asilamu chifukwa chotsitsa chipewa cha mkazi pa mwambo wa boma ku Patna.
evidence: Pa mwambo wina wa boma ku Patna pa December 15, 2025, nduna yaikulu ya Bihar, Nitish Kumar, inachotsa chipewa cha mkazi pamene ankapereka chikalata, ndipo kenako nkhope yake inaululidwa mwachidule. Nkhaniyi inadzetsa kutsutsidwa kwakukulu kwa anthu ena a m'gulu la Asilamu, ndipo ambiri anafunsa nduna yaikulu kuti apepese. Pakati pa zovuta zomwe zinatsatira, kanema yemwe ananena kuti akuwonetsa Nitish Kumar akupempha chikhululukiro kwa gulu la Asilamu, wakhala akufalikira pa malo ochezera a pa Intaneti.

claim: Mlatho wa Bridge Collapse In Bihar
evidence: Kufufuza kwa Vishvas News kunavumbula kuti kufalikira kwa mlatho ku Bihar kunachokera ku chochitika chomwe chinachitika mu March 2024 ndipo chikufalitsidwa molakwika ngati chochitika chaposachedwa chisanachitike chisankho. New Delhi (Vishvas News): Pamene zisankho za Assembly ku Bihar zikuyandikira, malo ochezera a pa Intaneti akuwona kuchuluka kwa chidziwitso cholakwika ndi zinthu zosokoneza . Chimodzi mwazinthu zolakwikazi chikuphatikizapo kanema wowonetsa mlatho womwe unagwa, womwe ukugawana ndi zonena kuti ukuwonetsa chochitika chaposachedwapa. Vishvas News inayang'ana positi iyi ndipo inapeza kuti ndi yolakwika. Kanemayo akuchokera ku March 2024, pomwe gawo la mlatho womwe unali pansi pa zomangamanga linagwa ku Bihar. Zomwe zikuchitika ndi viral Facebook wosuta 'Janchowk' adalemba kanema wa mlatho womwe unagwa pa July 28, 2025, ndi mawu akuti, "Mlatho wa ma 1200 crore pa mtsinje wa Khubulpa womwe unamangidwa pansi pa Madzipa ndi wowona, ndipo ena mwa ogwira ntchito ku Google adazindikira kuti ndi ofunika kwambiri ndipo ena adazindikira kuti ndi ofunika kwambiri.

claim: Bernice King, mwana wamkazi wa Rev. Martin Luther King Jr., anapempha Purezidenti wa United States Donald Trump kuti atulutse "mafayilo a Epstein" pambuyo poti boma lake linatulutsa maofesi a FBI okhudza bambo ake mu Julayi 2025.
evidence: Pa nkhani imeneyi, Dipatimenti ya Zachilungamo ya a Trump inanena kuti Epstein yemwe anadzipha ali kundende pambuyo pa kumangidwa kwake mu 2019 chifukwa chochita zachiwerewere mu 2019, sanasunge mndandanda wa makasitomala, mosiyana ndi mphekesera zomwe zikukambidwa. Dipatimentiyo inanenanso kuti sichidzatulutsa mafayilo ena okhudzana ndi kafukufukuyu, ngakhale kuti poyamba idzatero, zomwe zimapangitsa ogwiritsa ntchito malo ochezera a pa Intaneti kuti azilemba za ubale wa a Trump ndi a Epstein. Pa July 21, akaunti ya a Republican ya X idatumiza chithunzi (chosungidwa) motsutsana ndi a Trump chomwe akuti chikuwonetsa positi yochokera kwa a Epnice King, omwe "amakhala akuchita izi nthawi zambiri", zomwe zidachitika, zomwe zidachitika, zomwe zidachitika, zomwe zidachitika, zomwe zidachitika, zomwe zidachitika, zomwe zidachitika kale, zomwe zidapangitsa ogwiritsa ntchito malo ochezera a pa Intaneti kuti azilemba za ubale pakati pa a Trump ndi a Berstein.

claim: Mafupa a St. Nicholas, omwe anali kulimbikitsa Santa Claus, akhala akuwombera madzi kwa zaka 1,700.
evidence: Popeza asayansi anapeza kuti madziwo anali madzi, mwina anali kuundana kuchokera kumandawo. M'nyengo ya Khirisimasi ya 2025, ogwiritsa ntchito malo ochezera a pa Intaneti anapeza kuti mafupa a St. Nicholas  omwe anali ofunikira kwambiri pa Halowini: mafupa a St. Nicholas  omwe anali ofunthira kwa Santa Claus  akuti akhala akubera "madzi oyera, ofanana ndi madzi" kwa zaka 1,700. Mphekeserazo zinayamba kufalikira pa Reddit, X ndi Facebook. Zolemba zotere zokhudza mafupa a St. Nicholas omwe anali m'nyanja ya m'nyanja zafalikira kwa zaka zambiri. Komabe, malinga ndi malipoti a akatswiri, maliro a St. Nicholas, omwe anali m'manda ake, adalengeza kuti madziwo anali osasinthasintha kuyambira pakati pa zaka 1,300 zapitazo, koma malinga ndi maliro a akatswiri, mawu a m'mandawo, omwe anali m'manda a St. Nicholas, omwe anali ndi zaka 1,300 zapitazo, anali osasinthasintha kwambiri, ndipo ngakhale kuti anali ndi zinthu zambiri, anali kunena kuti madziwo anali ochokera ku malo a m'mandawo.

claim: Kusala kudya kumapha maselo a khansa m'masiku 15
evidence: Kuyang'ana kwa Quick kumawonetsa kuti kusala kudya kumatha kupha maselo a khansa pasanathe masiku 15. Tidawunika ndikupeza kuti zonenazo ndizabodza. The Claim Mu kanema wa Facebook, wofunsayo akuti ngati angapezeke ndi khansa, adasala kudya masiku 15 chifukwa amakhulupirira kuti kusala kudya kumapha maselo a khansa. Fact Check Kodi kusala kudya kumachotsa khansa pasanathe masiku 15 kuchokera pomwe adadziwika? Ayi. Palibe umboni wakuchipatala wosonyeza kuti kusala kudya kumachiritsa khansa pasanathe masiku 15 kapena ayi. Khansa si matenda amodzi. Zimaphatikizapo matenda opitilira 200 osiyanasiyana, aliyense wokhala ndi biological yapadera, kukula kwazithunzi, ndi mayankho a chithandizo. Zidutswa zina zimakula mwachangu; zimakula pang'onopang'ono. Zina zimayankha bwino mankhwala a chemotherapy; zina mwazinthu, zimayang'ana zina, kapena immunotherapy. Palibe njira ya biological yotsimikizika yomwe imatsimikizira kuti kusala kudya kumapangitsa kuti khansa ichotse kwathunthu mkati mwa masabata awiri. Komabe, kusintha kwa maselo a khansa ndi kusintha kwa maselo, kapena kuchepetsa maselo, kumafuna kusintha mas

claim: Fact Check: Woyendetsa ndege wa Navy wa ku Chile ananena molakwika pa intaneti kuti anali woyendetsa ndege wa Israeli wogwidwa ku Iran
evidence: Chithunzi cha woyendetsa ndege wa Navy wa ku Chile chafotokozedwa molakwika pa intaneti kuti chikuwonetsa woyendetsa ndege wa Israeli wogwidwa ku Iran pakati pa nkhondo yapamlengalenga pakati pa adani awiri am'deralo.Israel pa June 13 idayambitsa chiwopsezo chodabwitsa ku Iran chomwe chidapha pafupifupi gulu lonse la akuluakulu a asilikali a dzikoli komanso asayansi odziwika bwino a nyukiliya ndipo chinaphatikizapo ndege zankhondo pafupifupi 200, atero asitikali a Israeli.Mlandu wobwezera wa Tehran wakhala woyamba kuti zipolopolo zochokera ku Iran zathyola chitetezo cha Israeli m'magulu ambiri ndikupha Aisiraeli m'nyumba zawo.Woyendetsa ndege wachikazi wa Israeli Sarah Ahronot wagwidwa ku Iran, adati X, amatsegula zolemba ziwiri zatsopano kuyambira pa June 13 zomwe zimawonetsa chithunzi cha mkazi wovala zovala zankhondo atayimirira ndi manja osakanikirana kutsogolo kwa ndege.Poyambira, zolemba ziwirizi zasonkhanitsa anthu oposa miliyoni imodzi.Reuters ImageVeroa ndi chithunzi chomwecho adagawana nawo pa Facebook, ndipo chithunzi chomwe adachilembapo ndi mtsikana wina wa ku Chile, dzina lake Sarah Foh,

claim: Wogwira ntchito wamba ku America wawona kale kukwera kwa malipiro a $500 chaka chino.
evidence: A Donald Trump ananena kuti ogwira ntchito ku United States akupindula kale ndi mfundo zake zachuma. "Wogwira ntchito ku America wamba waona kale kukwera kwa malipiro kwa $500 chaka chino", adatero Trump pa msonkhano wa nduna pa 26 August. Deta ya Trump ya White House yomwe imapangitsa kuti ndalama zikhale zochuluka kwambiri. Akatswiri amakonda njira ina, yochokera ku kukula kwa zitsanzo zazikulu, yomwe imawonetsa kuwonjezeka pang'ono. Pamene tinafunsa ofesi ya atolankhani ya White House kuti tipeze gwero la deta ya Trump, mneneri wina anatisonyeza ku Bureau of Labor Statistics ziwerengero za malipiro apakati a ogwira ntchito nthawi zonse ndi malipiro, osinthidwa nyengo. Izi zikuwonetsa kuti malipiro apakati a sabata iliyonse adakwera kuchokera pa $1,185 m'gawo lachinayi la 2024 kufika pa $1,206 m'gawo lachiwiri la 2025, zomwe zimagwirizana kwambiri ndi chiwerengero cha ogwira ntchito yachiwiri m'ndende. Chifukwa chakuti pa sabata la Trump, tikuwona kuchuluka kwa malipiro a ogwira ntchito nthawi zonse, omwe amawerengedwa ndi masabata 26, omwe amawerengedwa ndi kuchuluka kwa ndalama za $266, zomwe zimawerengedwa ndi theka la chaka

claim: Kampani ina ya zamankhwala ya ziweto ikupanga piritsi la agalu okalamba kuti apititse patsogolo moyo wawo.

claim: Kampani yothandizidwa ndi biloniya Bill Gates, yemwe ndi wothandiza anthu ena, yapanga batala wopangidwa ndi labotale pogwiritsa ntchito mpweya.
evidence: Pa nkhani ya kuwerengetsa kumeneku, thumba la ndalama la Breakthrough Energy Ventures, lomwe Gates anayambitsa, ndi logawana nawo gawo mu Savor, kampani yomwe imapanga batala wopangidwa ndi labotale. Gates sakukhudzidwa ndi kayendetsedwe ka Savor kapena utsogoleri, malinga ndi mneneri wa Savor. Mu Ogasiti 2025, mawu omwe adafalikira pa intaneti akuti kampani yothandizidwa ndi Bill Gates idayamba kupanga batala wopangidwa ndi labotale wopangidwa ndi kaboni, osati mankhwala a mkaka. Mphekesera za batala zidayamba kudzera pa intaneti kudzera pazomwe adalemba pa X, Facebook ndi Reddit. Malinga ndi positi ya pa blog ya 2024 ya Gates, adalembetsa kampani yotchedwa Savor, yomwe idalengeza kukhazikitsidwa kwa malonda a batala yopangidwa ndi labotale "mwachindunji kuchokera ku kaboni popanda kufunika kwa ulimi wamba" mu Marichi 2025.

claim: Gulu la amonke a ku Cambodia linathokoza Purezidenti wa United States, Donald Trump, m'chilimwe cha 2025 chifukwa chothetsa nkhondo pakati pa Cambodia ndi Thailand.

Ngakhale kuti Trump anathandiza kuti pakhale bata, iye "sanaletse nkhondo" pakati pa Cambodia ndi Thailand. Nkhondoyi inachitika pambuyo pa masiku 5 a nkhondo pakati pa mayiko awiriwa, osati nkhondo yolimba, ndipo kuwomberana nkhondo kumatanthauza kuti nkhondoyo idzasiya kwa kanthawi kochepa, osati kutha kosatha. Mu August 2025, mawu ena omwe anafalikira pa intaneti akuti gulu la amonke a ku Cambodia linathokoza Purezidenti wa United States Donald Trump chifukwa chothetsa nkhondo pakati pa dziko lawo ndi Thailand. Zoyeserera zikuwonetsa kuti malo ena amagwiritsa ntchito madzi osachepera 500,000 gallon patsiku kuti azizizira zida zawo. Komabe, malo opangira deta a AI ndi ogula magetsi. claim: Anthu 30 pa 100 alionse amene amakhala ku United States ali ndi madigiri a zachipatala ndipo anthu 10,000 pa anthu 43,000 amene ali ndi visa ya H-1B ndi amene amakhala ndi madigiri amenewa.
evidence: Pulezidenti Donald Trump analengeza kuti ndalama zolipirira ma visa a H-1B zidzawonjezeka kufika $100,000, ndipo anthu ena amene amagwiritsa ntchito malo ochezera a pa Intaneti ananena kuti zimenezi zingachititse kuti kuchepa kwa madokotala kuwonjezeke kwambiri. Kuyambira pa September 21, ma visa atsopano a H-1B adzafunika ndalama zokwana $100,000, zomwe zidzawonjezeke kuchokera pa $2,000 kufika pa $5,000. Boma la Trump linati ndalamazo zikufuna kuti asalole kuti ogwira ntchito ku America "azoloweretsedwe ndi ntchito zapadziko lonse zolipira zochepa".

claim: Pulezidenti wa United States, Donald Trump, polankhula pa mwambo wa McDonald's, anadandaula za kuletsa madzi omwe "amachokera kumwamba" ndipo anati: "Chifukwa chake mukufuna kusamba m'manja? kapena, monga ine, ndikufuna kusamba tsitsi langa. Ndimasamba. Ndipo ... palibe madzi. ... Sindidzatchula chinthu chachitatu m'bafa chifukwa nthawi zonse ndimadandaula. ... Ngati simukudziwa zomwe ndikunena ndiye kuti simuyenera kukhala ndi chilolezo cha McDonald's".
evidence: Zankhanza zoti pulezidenti Donald Trump ananena pofotokoza nkhani yokhudza kusamba m'manja, tsitsi ndi "chinthu chachitatu m'bafa" zomwe zinafalikira pa Intaneti pakati pa November 2025. Ogwiritsa ntchito malo ochezera a pa Intaneti pa X (zolembedwa),Facebook, Instagram ndiThreads (zolembedwa) ananena kuti Trump analankhula za malamulo okhudza madzi omwe "amachokera kumwamba" komanso mmene malamulowo anakhudzira zimene zingachitidwe m'bafa. Ogwiritsa ntchito ena ananena kuti pulezidentiyo anatsatira mawu a m'bafa ndi mawu akuti: "Ngati simukudziwa zimene ndikunena ndiye kuti simuyenera kukhala ndi chilolezo cha McDonald". Mwachitsanzo, wogwiritsa ntchito X wina ananena kuti Trump anati (cholembedwa): Iwo anali ndi zoletsa pa madzi. Zimabwera kuchokera kumwamba, sichoncho? Choncho ngati simukufuna kusamba manja anu, kapena ine, mukufuna kusamba tsitsi lanu. Ndipo ine lather.

claim: Balen Shah Ndi Prime Minister Watsopano wa Nepal
evidence: Pambuyo pa ziwonetsero zachiwawa zaposachedwapa ku Nepal zomwe zidapangitsa kuti pakhale boma la nthawi, zolemba zingapo zapa media media zikuyenda zikunena kuti Meya wa Kathmandu Balendra Shah wasankhidwa kukhala Prime Minister watsopano wa dziko la Himalayan.Mavidiyo a Balendra Shah akuti: 'Nepal's new Prime Minister became Balendra Shah' (kutanthauzira kwa Chingerezi: 'Balendra Shah becomes new prime minister of Nepal') Post ili pamwambapa ikhoza kuwonedwa pano (zolembedwa) FACT CHECK NewsMobile fact-checked zonenazo ndipo zapeza kuti ndizabodza. Kusaka kwa mawu ofunikira kunatipangitsa kuti tipeze nkhani zingapo za boma la nthawi yaku Nepal. Malinga ndi malipoti odalirika, Chief Justice Sushila Karki walumbidwa ngati Prime Minister wa nthawi yaku Nepal. Anapatsidwa lumbiro usiku watha pa September 12, 2025. (Mavidiyo awa akhoza kuwonedwa pano, ndi pano)

claim: Mu 2016, Sen. Ted Cruz wa ku Texas, yemwe pa nthawiyo anali woimira chipani cha Republican, ananena kuti: "Tidzadzuka m'mawa wina ndipo Donald, akanakhala pulezidenti, akanapha dziko la Denmark ndi zida za nyukiliya".
evidence: Pa nkhani imeneyi, mu January 2026, kanema wina wa zaka khumi (wosungidwa) anafalitsidwa pa intaneti wa Ted Cruz, yemwe pa nthawiyo anali Republican, yemwe anali wofuna kukhala pulezidenti, akulankhula za Donald Trump pa msonkhano wa kampeni ku New Hampshire. Malinga ndi vidiyoyi, Seneta wa ku Texas anati, "Tidzadzuka m'mawa wina ndipo Donald, akanakhala pulezidenti, akanapha Denmark". Mawu akuti akuti anali atafalitsidwa pa Facebook (osungidwa), Instagram (osungidwa), Threads (osungidwa), Bluesky (osungidwa) ndi Reddit (osungidwa).

claim: California imapereka $83.1 biliyoni kuposa momwe timalandilira kuchokera ku boma la federal.  Texas? imalandira $71.1 biliyoni kuposa momwe imaperekera ku boma la federal. 71% ya GDP ya US imachokera ku ma blue counties.
evidence: Pa nthawi imene anali kuyembekezera kuti apange kampeni ya pulezidenti mu 2028, Gavin Newsom, yemwe ndi wa chipani cha Democratic, yemwe ndi kazembe wa ku California, anafufuza thandizo la anthu amene amamvetsera ma podcast achirengedwe. Podcast ya posachedwapa imene Newsom analowa nayo, pa July 14, inali ya Shawn Ryans. Pa msonkhano wina, Newsom anafotokoza kufunika kwa California m'chuma cha dziko lonse. "California imapereka $83.1 biliyoni kuposa mmene timaperekera ndalama kwa boma la United States", Newsom anatero m'nkhani ya pa July 14 pofotokoza za nkhaniyi. "Texas? imalandira $71.1 biliyoni kuposa mmene imaperekera ndalama kwa boma la United States. 71% ya GDP ya United States imachokera ku ma county a buluu. "California Crackup? Yesani kachiwiri.California imapereka $83.1 biliyoni kuposa mmene timaperekera ndalama kwa boma la United States.Texas? imalandira $71.1 biliyoni kuposa mmene imaperekera ndalama kwa boma la United States.Koma ndi mavoti a ku United States omwe amachokera ku mavoti a mavoti a buluu.

claim: Mkulu wa asilikali a ku India, a General Upendra Dwivedi, anavomereza kuti asilikali 250 anaphedwa m'malo a LOC pa nkhondo yaposachedwapa ndi Pakistan.
evidence: Kanema yemwe akuti akuwonetsa General Upendra Dwivedi, Chief of Army Staff (COAS), akuvomereza kuti asilikali 250 aku India adazunzidwa mozungulira LOC panthawi ya nkhondo yaposachedwa ndi Pakistan, wawonekera pa malo ochezera a pa Intaneti. Newschecker adafufuza za kanema wa viral, ndipo adapeza kuti adachita zachinyengo. Mu kanema wa viral, womwe udatenga mphindi ziwiri, akuti General Dwivedi akuti, "Akhondo aku India ataya katundu wambiri pa LOC, asilikali 250 adazunzidwa. Zoyenda zathu zandalama zimasinthidwa mosamalitsa ndi ma satellites aku Pakistan ndi China. " Screen kuchokera ku X positi ndi @Pak InsiderWB Zolemba zotere zitha kuwonedwa pano, ndi pano. Werengani: Kodi PM Maldives akuwonetsa chithunzi cha Modi pa Chitetezo Chake Ndi 'Swivender' Mauthenga a Mtsogoleri wa Gulu Lankhondo?

claim: Hardik Pandya Passed Away Ahead of Asia Cup 2025
evidence: Masiku angapo BCCI itangolengeza kuti India idzasonkhanitsa anthu kuti adzapeze nawo mpikisano wa Asia Cup 2025, mawu odabwitsa anaonekera pa malo ochezera a pa Intaneti omwe amati wosewera wa cricket Hardik Pandya wamwalira. Mawuwa amati: ""Hardik Pandya wamwalira ndi Psara Matam, wosewera wa nyenyezi wa timu ya India yemwe anamwalira ndi mpikisano wa Asia Cup 2025 isanachitike. " (Kumasulira kwa Chingerezi: "Hardik Pandya wamwalira, Team India ili ndi chisoni ndi mpikisano wa Asia Cup 2025, wosewera wa nyenyezi wamwalira") Nkhani yomwe ili pamwambapa ikhoza kuwonedwa pano (zolembedwa) FACT CHECK NewsMobile fact-checked fayilo ya viral claim ndipo inapeza kuti ndi yolakwika. Kufufuza kwa mawu ofunikira kunawulula kuti palibe malipoti odalirika a Pandya omwe anamwalira. Popeza ali ndi msinkhu wapamwamba kwambiri mu cricket yapadziko lonse, nkhani zoterezi zikananenedwa kwambiri ndi mainstream ndi media yapadziko lonse.

claim: Congress idachotsa pa webusaiti yake Gawo 9 ndi 10 la Article 1 ya Constitution
evidence: ZOCHITIKA ZOCHITIKA: onani zosintha pansipa. Kodi zigawo za Constitution ya United States zokhudzana ndi habeas corpus ndi mphamvu za Congress zasowa pa webusaiti ya US Congress pamaso pa August 6, 2025? Inde, ndizowona: Zosungidwa m'mabuku za masambawo zidalemba zosintha zomwe zidataya zigawo 9 ndi 10 za Article 1. Library of Congress, yomwe imayendetsa webusaiti ya Congress, idavomereza zochotsedwazo ndipo idati zidayambitsidwa ndi "kulemba zolakwika" zomwe zikanakonzedwa.

claim: Akatswiri a ku Norway anapanga "mapapu a ayezi" opangidwa ndi anthu oyenda pansi kwa zinyama kuti asinthe malo okhala a nyama zomwe zikuwonongeka ndi ayezi a m'nyanja ya Arctic.
evidence: Pa September 24, 2025, mphekesera inafalikira pa intaneti kuti akatswiri a ku Norway apanga chinthu chatsopano chothandiza zisoti za Arctic: "ma capsule a ayezi" oyenda pansi omwe amapereka nyamazo kuti "zipume, kulera ana, ndi kupulumuka" pamalo ena pakati pa dziko lotentha komanso madzi oundana omwe akusungunuka. Mphekeserazo zidachitika pa X, Facebook ndi Instagram. Zambiri zomwe zidati zisotizo zidapangidwa kuchokera ku "zowonongeka, zopanda poizoni, zopanda poizoni", zinali ndi masokosi "kuti zisalole zisoti zisazuke" ndipo zinali ndi masensa oyang'anira zisotizo. Zithunzizo nthawi zambiri zimaphatikizapo chithunzi chomwe chimawoneka kuti chikuwonetsa zisoti zomwe zimakhala pamwamba pa imodzi mwa zisotizi, zomwe zimaphatikizapo mbendera yomwe zikuwoneka kuti zikuyimira Norway. Kutengera kusaka kwa Google, palibe malipoti odziwika bwino a ma capsule a ayezi opangidwa ndi akatswiri aku Norway omwe adalemba izi, ndipo ngati izi zikuwoneka kuti zinali zodabwitsa, ndiye kuti chithunzi cha mauthenga achinyengo chopangidwe ndi mauthenga achinyengo, zomwe zikuwoneka kuti

claim: Dzuwa ndi mphepo sizinafike mpaka pa 3% ya mphamvu zapadziko lonse.
evidence: Pamene United States ikulimbana ndi kutsekedwa kwa Iran kwa Straits of Hormuz  mfundo yofooketsa ya gawo limodzi mwa magawo asanu a mafuta padziko lonse  CNN  Jake Tapper anafunsa Secretary of Energy Chris Wright ngati US iyenera kudalira mafuta ochepa komanso zowonjezereka pa mphamvu zowonjezereka, monga dzuwa ndi mphepo. "Tadutsa miyezi iwiri pamene dongosolo lonse la mphamvu padziko lonse lapansi lili m'chisokonezo chifukwa cha njira imodzi yokha yoyendera", Tapper adanena pa April 19 pa "State of the Union". "Kodi izi sizikutanthauza kuti pali njira zina zamagetsi, kotero kuti US isadalire kwambiri mafuta?"

claim: Pa May 6, 2026, mtumiki wa uthenga wabwino Mark Burns anakonza mwambo wotsegulira chipilala cha golide cha Purezidenti wa US Donald Trump ku Mar-a-Lago resort ya Trump ku Florida.
evidence: Mu May 2026, ogwiritsa ntchito malo ochezera a pa Intaneti ananena kuti mtumiki wa uthenga wabwino wina anapereka fano la golide la Pulezidenti wa United States Donald Trump ku umodzi mwa mabungwe a Trump ku Florida. Ogwiritsa ntchito omwe ankafalitsa mphekeserazi anagawana zithunzi zosonyeza fano la golide la Trump lokhala ndi dzanja lokweza lozunguliridwa ndi owonera. Owerenga a Snopes anatitumizanso mafunso ambiri okhudza fanoli, ambiri ngati linali ku Pulezidenti wa Mar-a-Lago Club ndipo anali kunena kuti linali lalitali mamita 20.

claim: LA Mostly Peaceful Jihad Summer of Love Protesters Mwadala amawotcha moto pa Jeep.
evidence: Pa nthawi ya chisokonezo chaposachedwapa ku Los Angeles, ogwiritsa ntchito malo ochezera a pa Intaneti anafalitsa kanema yemwe ananena kuti akuwonetsa anthu omwe akuwukira akuwotcha moto wa Jeep mwadala pakati pa chisokonezo.Wogwiritsa ntchito X adalemba chithunzicho ndi mawu akuti, "LA Mostly Peaceful Jihad Summer of Love Protesters Intentionally sets a Jeep on fire".

claim: Woimba nyimbo komanso woimba nyimbo Cher ananena za Purezidenti wa United States Donald Trump kuti: "Ndi munthu wonyada, ndi woopsa kwambiri, ndipo zomwe amabweretsa kudziko langa, zomwe amadzutsa kudziko langa, ndi kukonda kwambiri zinthu, kusakhulupirira ena komanso mtundu wina wa ulamuliro m'magulu ena".
evidence: Ngakhale kuti mawuwa analembedwa molondola kwa Cher, iye anawasindikiza pa mwambo wina ku Ottawa, Ontario, mu 2016. Ogwiritsa ntchito malo ochezera a pa Intaneti omwe ankagawana nawo pafupifupi zaka khumi pambuyo pake sanasankhe tsiku la ndemanga zake. Kumapeto kwa 2025 ndi koyambirira kwa 2026, mawu (osungidwa) omwe adafalikira pa intaneti akuti woimba komanso wochita masewera a zisudzo Cher adati Purezidenti wa US Donald Trump ndi "chimbudzi" ndipo adati adadzutsa "kukonda kwambiri komanso kusakhulupirira" ku America. Malinga ndi positi ya Facebook, polankhula mu kuyankhulana, Cher akuti adati za Trump: Ndiwopsya kwambiri, ndipo zomwe amabweretsa kudziko langa, zomwe adadzutsa kudziko langa ndi kukondera ndi kusakhulupirira komanso mtundu wina wa ulamuliro m'magulu ena. Ndipo akunama. Iye akunena chinachake, ndipo mumabwerera ndikuwona zomwe akuwoneka, ndipo nthawi zina, akuti: Iye ndi wodabwitsa kwambiri. Iye ndi woopsa kwambiri, ndipo zomwe amabwera nazo kudziko langa, chifukwa chakuti iye amawopsa kwambiri ndipo nthawi zonse amawoneka ngati zodabwitsa, ndipo ine sindingathe kuzungulira pa nkhani iyi.

claim: Pulezidenti wa US Trump analetsa kupanga Tesla ku US pambuyo pa mavuto ake ndi CEO wa kampaniyo, Elon Musk.
evidence: Vidiyo imene ikuonetsa kuti Pulezidenti wa US Donald Trump akuletsa kupanga magalimoto a Tesla m'dziko muno, yatchuka kwambiri pa malo ochezera a pa Intaneti chifukwa cha kusiyana kwake ndi Elon Musk. M'vidiyoyi, akuti Trump akuti akuti, "Lero, ndili pano kuti ndilengeze kuti ndikuletsa kupanga ma Tesla onse ku United States of America, kuyambira nthawi yomweyo. Monga aliyense akudziwira, Elon anandipha m'mbuyo masiku angapo apitawo ndipo anapenga pa nsanja yake X, akunama za kutenga nawo mbali kwanga m'mafayilo a Epstein... Palibe amene amakonda ma Tesla, pokhapokha ngati ndinu munthu wosakhazikika, amadzuka ndi kuwonongeka mosavuta..." Ogwiritsa ntchito multiple X ndi Facebook amaonera vidiyo ya masekondi 59 yokhala ndi mawu akuti, "Donald Trump akuletsa kupanga Tesla ku USA".

claim: Gulu la zigawenga la ku Afghanistan limachenjeza ISI, ndipo limalonjeza kuti lidzabwezera pa chiwembu cha zigawenga cha Pahalgam.
evidence: Kanema yemwe akuonetsedwa akuonetsa anthu a 'Liberation Front of Afghanistan' akudzipereka kubwezera pa chiwembu cha zigawenga ku Pahalgam ku Jammu & Kashmir, komwe kuphedwa anthu 26, chifukwa "Kubwezera kulibe malire" kwafalikira kwambiri pa malo ochezera a pa Intaneti.

claim: Pofika kumayambiriro kwa November 2025, boma la Purezidenti wa United States a Donald Trump linagwiritsa ntchito ndalama zokwana madola 750 miliyoni kuchokera ku misonkho kuti lipereke ndalama zothandizira pulogalamu yapadera ya Zakudya Zowonjezera kwa Akazi, Ana, ndi Ana.
evidence: Pa nthawi imene boma linatseka ntchitoyi kumayambiriro kwa November 2025, anthu amene ankagwiritsa ntchito malo ochezera a pa Intaneti ananena kuti Pulezidenti wa United States, Donald Trump, anagwiritsa ntchito ndalama za msonkho zokwana madola 750 miliyoni kuti apititse patsogolo pulogalamu ya Special Supplemental Nutrition Program for Women, Infants, and Children. Bungwe la Congress linalephera kupereka ndalama za chaka chonse ku mapulani angapo a boma, kuphatikizapo pulogalamu ya  yotchedwa WIC  chifukwa anthu okhazikitsa malamulo analibe mphamvu zothetsera boma. Nkhani zomwe zinatchula lipoti la Politico zinati ndalama za msonkho zokwana madola 450 miliyoni zinagwiritsidwanso ntchito pa Okutobala 31, kutsatira ndalama zomwe zinagwiritsidwanso ntchito pa October , zomwe zinalipo $750 miliyoni kuti zithandize kuti WIC ikhalebe yolimba. Nkhaniyi inapempha owerenga angapo a Snopes kuti atitumizire imelo ndi kufufuza pa webusaiti yathu kuti atsimikizire kuti boma la Trump linagwiritsa ntchito ndalama za msonkho zokwana madola 750 miliyoni kuti likhazikitse WIC.

claim: Pulezidenti wa US Donald Trump adalimbikitsa madalaivala a galimoto omwe amagwiritsa ntchito dizilo kuti asinthe kupita ku mafuta kuti achepetse mtengo wa mafuta.
evidence: Nkhani yakuti Pulezidenti wa United States Donald Trump analola kuti anthu oyendetsa galimoto asinthe galimoto kuti asinthe galimotoyo n'kupita ku mafuta a m'mafuta inafalikira mu March 2026. Mwachitsanzo, munthu wina wa pa Facebook ananena pa March 17 (zosungidwa) kuti, "Forrest Trump akulankhula ndi anthu oyendetsa galimoto chifukwa cha Trump".

claim: Mnyamata wa gulu la cricket ku Bangladesh Mustafizur Rahman akulimbikitsa kuti achotse IPL 2026 chifukwa adatsitsidwa ndi Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR).
evidence: Bungwe loyang'anira Cricket ku India (BCCI) posachedwapa lalamula a Kolkata Knight Riders kuti achotse m'bale wa ku Bangladesh dzina lake Mustafizur Rahman m'gulu la osewera a packet kuti achite nawo nyengo ya 2026 IPL. Pambuyo pake, Bungwe la Bangladesh Cricket Board linalengeza kuti silingapite ku India kukachita nawo T20 World Cup, potengera nkhawa za chitetezo. Pakati pa zochitika izi, kanema wotchedwa "Mustafizur Rahman analetsa IPL pa kanema wa moyo" wafalitsidwa pa malo ochezera a pa Intaneti. Mu kanemayo, munthu wina wa ku Bangladesh yemwe amaimba packet angamve akunena kuti, "Sindidzachitanso IPL. Kunyoza kwanga ndikunyoza dziko langa. Zikomo anthu a ku Bangladesh, omwe amandikonda kwambiri.

claim: A Labour adachotsa ntchito za 4,400 za ogwira ntchito zaumoyo ndi LNP.

claim: Kuchepa kwa umbanda ku Minneapolis kwachepa ndi 25%, 30% chifukwa tachotsa anthu zikwizikwi m'derali.
evidence: Pulezidenti Donald Trump ananena kuti ntchito yake yoyang'anira anthu osamuka m'dzikoli inachititsa kuti ku Minneapolis kuchepe umbanda. M'mafunso amene anachitika pamaso pa Super Bowl, a Tom Llamas a pa NBC anafunsa Trump za ntchito yoyang'anira anthu osamuka m'dzikoli patatha milungu ingapo kuchokera pamene akuluakulu a boma la Minnesota anapha anthu awiri a ku America, a Renee Good ndi a Alex Pretti ku Minneapolis. "Nambala ya anthu osamuka m'dzikoli, makamaka ku Minneapolis, yachepa ndi 25 ndi 30%, chifukwa tachotsa anthu zikwizikwi m'derali", anatero a Trump. "Awa ndi anthu ovuta kumva omwe anabwera, ambiri mwa iwo omwe anabwera kudzera m'malire otseguka".

Thompson, ananena kuti anthu onyengawa mwina anaba madola 9 biliyoni kuchokera mu 2018 kuchokera ku mapulogalamu osiyanasiyana othandizira anthu. kafukufuku wa a Minnesota Star Tribune pa December 2025 anapeza kuti ndalama zoba ndalama zokwana madola 217.7 miliyoni zinali zoba ndalama, zomwe boma linatsutsa. pamene nkhani za anthu ambiri omwe anaba ndalamazo zinayamba kufalikira mu December 2025 ku Minnesota, pomwe anthu ambiri omwe anaimbidwa mlanduwu anali a fuko la Chisomali  zomwe zinachititsa kuti atsogoleri a boma la Minnesota asamale chenjezo cha a a Donald Trump.

claim: Pulezidenti wakale wa ku United States, Barack Obama, anachotsa chithunzi cha Winston Churchill, yemwe anali nduna yaikulu ya Britain, ku Oval Office n'kuchibwezera ku England.
evidence: Pa nthawi imene Obama anali pulezidenti, Obama anapitiriza kusonyeza chithunzi cha Churchill chapadera kunja kwa Nyumba ya Malamulo. Panalibe umboni wakuti chithunzi cha Bush chapafupi ndi Atlantic chinayamba pulezidenti wa Obama. Chithunzichi chinakhalabe ku British Embassy ku Washington, D.C., mpaka 2012, malinga ndi malipoti omwe anachokera ku ofesi ya kazembe. Pa nthawi imene Obama anali pulezidenti, nyumba yoyera sinadziwe kuti ndani anaganiza zobweza chithunzi cha Churchill chimene Britain inapatsa Bush. Pa nthawi imene ankalemba nkhaniyi, Obama ankaoneka kuti pa msonkhano wa atolankhani mu 2016 anaganiza zobwezeretsa chithunzi cha Churchill cha Martin Luther King.

claim: Anthu omwe ali ndi inshuwalansi kudzera mu Affordable Care Act adzawona kuwonjezeka kwa 75% kwa ma premiums kuyambira Nov. 1 ngati ndalama zowonjezeredwazo sizikuwonjezedwa, kuphatikizapo pawiri kuposa m'madera akumidzi.

claim: Mu August 2025, Senator Rick Scott wa ku Florida anaulula ndalama zoposa $26 miliyoni zomwe anali nazo pa malonda a masheya patatha chaka chimodzi kuposa nthawi yoikidwiratu.
evidence: Mu August 2025, iye anapereka kusintha kwa malipoti anayi osiyana a zochitika, koma sanawonjezerepo zochitika zatsopano. Mu August 2025, nkhani ya X ya Unusual Whales inalemba kuti Sen. Rick Scott, wa Republican ku Florida, anaulula ndalama zoposa $26 miliyoni pa zochitika za masheya "pa nthawi yoposa chaka". Kuchedwa kwa ntchitoyi kukanakhala kuphwanya lamulo la boma, lomwe limafuna kuti anthu onse a m'bungwe la Congress (ndi anthu ena omwe anali nawo) afotokoze malonda alionse a zinthu zoposa $1,000 m'masiku 30.

claim: Mu November 2025, Purezidenti wa US a Trump anapempha Dipatimenti Yoyang'anira Zoyendetsa kuti ikhazikitse ngongole za magalimoto zaka 15.
evidence: Mwachitsanzo, positi pa X yolembedwa inagawana chithunzi chomwe chinawoneka ngati chilengezo cha White House pa Nov. 10 (chosungidwa): Mawu omwe ali pa chithunzicho anali akuti: THE WHITE HOUSE PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP Pamene akupitiliza kugwira ntchito molimbika kuti maloto aku America athe kupezeka kwa aliyense, Purezidenti Trump lero wapempha Dipatimenti ya Zoyendetsa ndi Zamalonda kuti ipange kukhala ndi galimoto kwa onse mwa kuyambitsa ngongole ya galimoto kwa zaka 15! Komabe, palibe umboni woti Dipatimenti ya Zoyendetsa ndi Yemwe ikufunsa kuti galimotoyo idachokera ku XJ.

claim: Munthu osati nzika ya US amavota Mamdani pa chisankho cha meya wa NYC.
evidence: Kodi munthu amene si nzika ya ku United States kapena ngakhale wokhala mumzinda wa New York anafika ku New York City kutatsala masiku awiri kuti chisankho chichitike n'kuvota Mamdani kuti akhale meya? Ayi, si zoona: Chithunzicho chinavomereza kuti chinali chithunzithunzi cha nthabwala. Pofuna kuulula nthabwala yawo, iwo anaonetsa kumene anapeza chithunzi cha mpando wovotera wolemba dzina la Zohran Mamdani.

claim: Freddie Mercury, yemwe anali mtsogoleri wa gulu la Queen, sanaimbe "wa dziko lapansi" kumapeto kwa nyimbo ya gulu la "We Are the Champions, Queen", yomwe idatulutsidwa koyamba mu 1977.
evidence: Koma kodi ndi mmene zimakhalira? Komabe ... ... mzerewu unalipo m'mawu a nyimboyi monga momwe unasindikizidwira pa malaya amkati a kutulutsidwa kwa vinilu kwa 1977 mwalamulo. Komanso, makanema a ma konsati a Queen adawonetsa kuti Mercury nthawi zambiri amayimba mzerewu kumapeto. Chiyambire pomwe nyimbo ya Queen "We Are the Champions" idayamba mu 1977, anthu ambiri akhala akulemba nyimbo zawo ndi "dziko lapansi" lokonda kwambiri. Koma kodi ndi momwe zimathera? Omvera ena, atawonanso nyimboyo pa vinilu komanso pa nsanja zowonera nyimbo monga Spotify, adazindikira kuti "dziko lapansi" lomaliza silinapezeke. Kwa zaka zambiri, zolemba zambiri ndi kufalitsa pa intaneti, zomwe zimapangitsa kuti kusagwirizana kwa vinilu kukhale kotchedwa Mandela Effect, mawu akuti "Snopop" amatanthauza kuti "kujambula nyimbo yoyambirira" kapena "kuwonetsera vidiyo" omwe amagawidwa ndi ogwiritsa ntchito a TikTok, mwachitsanzo, "kuwonetsetsa kuti palibe cholakwika" pa Okutobala 2023.

claim: Mkulu wa asilikali a ku America, George Patton Jr. ananena kuti, "Mulungu akhululukire adani anga chifukwa sindidzawachitira chifundo".
evidence: Pa nkhani imeneyi, Patton kwenikweni anasonyezanso maganizo ofanana kwambiri, ngakhale kuti anali ndi mapeto osiyana. Mawu oyambirira, omwe angapezeke m'buku lake lomasulira nkhani la 1947 lomwe linatchulidwa pambuyo pa imfa yake, "Nkhondo Monga Ndidadziwira", anali akuti: "Mulungu achitire chifundo adani anga; iwo adzafunikira". Sitinapezebe zolemba zilizonse zotsimikizira kuti Patton analankhula kapena kulemba chiganizo chakuti, "Mulungu achitire chifundo adani anga, chifukwa ine sindidzachita". Kwa zaka zambiri, ogwiritsa ntchito malo ochezera a pa Intaneti akhala akugawana mawu akuti a General George Patton Jr., akuti mtsogoleri wa asilikali a World War II nthawi ina anati, "Mulungu achitire chifundo adani anga, chifukwa ine sindidzachita". Mwachitsanzo, mu 2021, wogwiritsa ntchito tsamba la Arkansas-based Facebook la Air Base analemba mawuwa pokumbukira mawu a pa Pearl Harbor pa December 7, 1941. Zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri zapitazo, Donald Trump (mkulu wa asilikali a ku America) ndi CEO wa US, a Dana White (mkulu wa asilikali a ku America) anagawana nawo pa Twitter (@TrumpTrump) ndi mauthenga omwe adawa

claim: Pulezidenti wa gulu la azimayi la AIMIM akuyamikira Deepak Kumar.
evidence: Kodi dzina lakuti 'Mohammad Deepak' linayamba kutchuka pa January 26, 2026, pa nthawi ya mkangano wa m'dera la Kotdwar, Uttarakhand, pa sitolo ya zovala ya Msilamu yotchedwa Baba School Garments. Panthawi ya mkanganowu, mphunzitsi wa masewera olimbitsa thupi dzina lake Deepak Kumar analowa m'malo. Atafunsidwa za kudziwika kwake pakati pa mavuto aakulu, anadzipereka yekha monga "Mohammad Deepak". Umboni wa mawu ofunika kwambiri pa nsanja zosaka nkhani zinapereka lipoti lililonse loti msonkhano kapena moni woterewu umakhudza AIM azimayi ndi a Mohammad A. Kuyang'ana kwa chithunzi cha munthu wojambula zithunzi cha AI, komwe kwapangidwa pogwiritsa ntchito zida zambiri za AI, kumasonyeza kuti chithunzi cha AI cha Google chimadziwika kuti ndi chizindikiro cha AI.

claim: "Tawona kale mizere 35 [ya njanji] yomwe inali yogona kapena yosagwira ntchito".  Ramaphosa
evidence: Mawu a Ramaphosa onena za mbiri ya Cape Town yoipa pakuwonjezera mwayi wopeza ntchito ndi olakwika ndipo mawu ake akuti mzindawu umagwiritsa ntchito ndalama zochepa pa munthu aliyense m'matauni ndi malo osungirako anthu osadziwika sangathe kutsimikiziridwa. Africa Check idawerenganso kuti zomwe Badenhorst ananena za kuchuluka kwa bajeti ya zomangamanga ku Cape Town kupita kwa mabanja omwe ali ndi ndalama zochepa sizatsimikiziridwa, koma iye ndi wowona kuti gawo la zaka zitatu la mzindawu limaposa kwambiri la madera ena onse mdzikolo. Zolemba za Scheurkogel zokhudzana ndi ndalama zoyendera anthu osauka ku South Africa komanso kuchuluka kwa maulendo apamtunda oyendera njanji ndizowona, monga momwe zimakhalira ndi zomwe Ramaphosa ananena za kuchuluka kwa njanji zomwe zimabwezeretsedwa. Mu Okutobala 2025, Purezidenti wa South Africa Ramaphosa adayankha mafunso ochokera kwa mamembala a National Council of Provinces (NCOP), imodzi mwa awiri a nyumba za malamulo.

claim: Zosakhala zoona: Ana aang'ono tsopano ali ndi ufulu wochita ntchito zankhondo ku Ukraine
evidence: Ndipotu, malamulo a ku Ukraine salola kuti anthu osakwana zaka 18 azilembetsa usilikali. Mawu amene amanena kuti munthu wina wa ku Ukraine ndi waufulu. Zolinga za atolankhani omwe ali ndi mauthenga a ku Kremlin zafalikira ponena kuti Ukraine yavomereza ana a zaka 17 kuti asayine mapangano ndi asilikali. Malipotiwa akufotokoza zimene ananena pa TV wa mtsogoleri wa dziko la Ukraine, a Ruslan Horbenko, yemwe akuti anthu akhoza kulowa usilikali kuyambira ali ndi zaka 17.

claim: Asaduddin Owaisi akuchita aarti kwa Ambuye Hanuman m'kachisi.
evidence: Kanema wofalitsidwa pa malo ochezera a pa Intaneti akuwonetsa mkulu wa AIMIM Asaduddin Owaisi akuchita Hanuman aarti, pomwe anthu angapo, kuphatikiza wansembe, amawonedwa pambali pake. Ogwiritsa ntchito adagawana kwambiri kanemayo, akunena kuti ndi weniweni. Screengrab kuchokera pa X post ya @ManojSr60583090 Umboni Tidafufuza malipoti atolankhani a Asaduddin Owaisi akuyendera kachisi kapena kuchita aarti, koma sizinapeze nkhani zovomerezeka. Ngati zinali choncho, osati zithunzi zokhazo za iye akuchita aarti, komanso nkhani zokhudzana nazo zikanakambidwa kwambiri m'mabuku ndi andale. Visual Inconsisten Kuyang'ana kanemayo kumawonetsa kusasintha kosiyanasiyana, zomwe zikuwonetsa kuti sizingakhale choncho.

claim: Kalata yomwe inagawidwa pa intaneti mu Marichi 2026 ndi uthenga weniweni womwe Joe Kent, mtsogoleri wa US National Counterterrorism Center, adalengeza kuti achoka pantchito chifukwa cha nkhondo ya US ndi Israel ndi Iran.
evidence: Pa March 2026, Joe Kent, yemwe ndi mkulu wa bungwe la United States National Counterterrorism Center ndipo wakhala akulimbikitsa kwambiri Pulezidenti Donald Trump kuyambira mu 2020, analengeza kuti achoka pa udindo wake, poganizira za nkhondo ya Trump yolimbana ndi Iran. Zithunzi ndi malemba omwe akuonetsa kuti kalata yake yochotsa ntchito ikufalikira pa intaneti, ndipo owerenga a Snopes anafufuza pa webusaitiyi ndipo analemba kuti adziwe ngati kalatayo inali yoona.

claim: Mu filimu ya 1994 "Forrest Gump", munthu wamkuluyo akuti, "Moyo unali ngati bokosi la chokoleti", osati "Moyo uli ngati bokosi la chokoleti".
evidence: Pa nkhani imeneyi, mawu enieni amene wojambula Tom Hanks ananena monga Forrest Gump m'filimuyi ndi akuti: "Amayi anga nthawi zonse amanena kuti moyo unali ngati bokosi la chokoleti. Simukudziwa zimene mudzalandire". M'mawu ena, mayi wa munthuyo anati: "Moyo ndi bokosi la chokoleti, Forrest. Simukudziwa zimene mudzalandire. Palibe m'mawu amenewa amene akugwirizana ndi mawu akuti, "Moyo uli ngati bokosi la chokoleti".

claim: Mankhwalawa amalimbikitsa GLP-1 ndipo amathandiza kuti asataye insulin
evidence: "Izi zimachita chimodzimodzi ndi Ozempic, mwachibadwa, popanda zotsatirapo kapena kulumikizana", akutero wokamba nkhaniyo mu Facebook roll ya Marichi 27, 2026. Munthuyo amalimbikitsa owonera kuti aganizire zowonjezera zomwe zili ndi yerba mate - tiyi wachikhalidwe wa zitsamba womwe umapangidwa ku Latin ndi South America - akunena kuti chisakanizochi chimathandiza kukana insulin, kuchepa thupi ndi mphamvu (zomwe zimasungidwa pano). Ogwiritsa ntchito ena a TikTok, Facebook ndi Instagram omwe amagulitsa chinthu chomwecho kudzera pa maulalo othandizira pazomwe ali patsamba lawo mofananamo adalengeza zowonjezerazo ngati "insulin resistance water hack", akunena kuti adalimbikitsidwa ndi madokotala ndikuziyerekeza ndi gawo la gluc-like-peptide-1, kapena GLP-1, zolemba. zolemba kuyambira kale monga 2025 zalengeza za mankhwala osiyana a yerba mate othandizira kuchepa thupi pansi pa dzina la "Nature Stanford Image".

claim: Iye anati iye anatsogolera ntchito ya Nyumba ya Malamulo yomanga malo akuluakulu a Micron semiconductor pafupi ndi Syracuse.
evidence: M'bale wina wa ku Republican dzina lake Claudia Tenney, yemwe chigawo chake cha chigawo cha chigawo chapakati cha New York, posachedwapa anadzipatulira kuti anathandiza kukhazikitsa fakitale yaikulu yopanga ma semiconductor ku Clay, N.Y., kumpoto kwa Syracuse. "Zinali zosangalatsa kwambiri kuyamba ntchito ndi @MicronTech pa nkhani ya ndalama zake zakale ku New York State", Tenney analemba pa Jan. 16. "Pulogalamuyi idzathandiza anthu 50,000 ndipo idzalimbikitsa ntchito zopanga ma semiconductor m'dziko lonse la New York. Ndinali wolemekezeka kutsogolera ntchitoyi m'nyumba ya malamulo pamene Congress inatsimikizira kudzipereka kwa America kwa luso komanso mpikisano". Zinali zosangalatsa kwambiri kuyamba ntchito ndi @MicronTech pa nkhani ya ndalama zake zakale ku New York State. Ntchitoyi idzathandiza anthu 50,000 kupeza ntchito komanso kulimbikitsa ntchito zopanga ma semiconductor m'dziko lonse la New York. Ndinali wolemekezeka kutsogolera ntchitoyi m'nyumba ya malamulo a dziko lonse monga a Tenney.

claim: Panali kugundana pakati pa nduna ya BJP ndi mkulu wa boma ku Uttar Pradesh
evidence: Munthu wina pa Facebook anaika nkhaniyo ndi mawu akuti: "Pakati pa mtsogoleri wa boma ndi mtsogoleri wa BJP....pa UPI...😁 Kumenyana pakati pa mtsogoleri wa boma ndi mtsogoleri wa BJP....Pa UP...😁 Mukhoza kufufuza nkhaniyi apa. FACT CHECK NewsMobile inayang'ana nkhaniyo ndipo inapeza kuti nkhaniyo ndi yabodza. Pofuna kutsimikizira nkhaniyi, mfundo zazikulu za vidiyoyo zinatengedwa ndipo zinayesedwa pogwiritsa ntchito kufufuza zithunzi. Izi zinachititsa kuti pa January 17, 2018, ABTOP Live ilembe nkhani ina yomwe inasintha zithunzi zomwezo. Malinga ndi lipotilo, mkulu wa boma la BJP sanali kuperekera nkhaniyo ku Uttar Pradesh. M'malo mwake, mtsogoleri wa boma la BJP anati nkhaniyo inachitika pakati pa mtsogoleri wa dera la Jharkhand ndi dera la Latehar.

claim: Mlembi wa zachitetezo cha United States Pete Hegseth anati: "N'kotopetsa kuyang'ana magulu ankhondo, kapena gulu lililonse, ndi kuona asilikali onenepa, chimodzimodzinso, ndizosaloleka kuona akuluakulu onenepa ndi ma admirals m'maholo a Pentagon ndi kutsogolera maofesi m'dziko lonse ndi padziko lonse lapansi".
evidence: Pa September 30, 2025, Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth anaitanitsa akuluakulu a asilikali ku Quantico Marine Corps ku Virginia, m'malo omwe atolankhani ambiri amawatcha msonkhano womaliza.Pa msonkhanowu, Hegseth anakamba nkhani kwa akuluakulu a boma omwe anasonkhana pomwe ananena kuti anadzudzula asilikali ndi asilikali "anenepa".Ogwiritsa ntchito malo ochezera a pa Intaneti ambiri anadzudzula mbali zina za mawu a Hegseth.M'nkhani ina pa X, Hegseth anafotokoza kuti "akuitana" asilikali ndi asilikali.Amanena kuti mtsogolo, aliyense amene ali m'gululi ayenera kuyesedwa kawiri pachaka ngati akufuna kukhalabe m'gulu la asilikali.Amanena kuti kukhala msilikali wonenepa "n'kosayenera".

claim: Zithunzizi zikuwonetsa kuphulika kwa Red Fort ku Delhi komwe kunachitika pa 10 Novembala 2025.
evidence: Pa 10 November 2025, galimoto ina yaphulika pafupi ndi Gate No. 1 ya Red Fort metro station ku New Delhi, kuphonya anthu osachepera khumi ndi atatu ndi kuvulaza ena angapo. Kafukufukuyu adaperekedwa ku National Investigation Agency (NIA), pomwe akuluakulu a boma adachita kafukufuku wofuna kudziwa za malamulo a Zochita Zosaloledwa (Prevention) Act ndi kufufuza maulalo a gulu la zigawenga (pa, pano). Pambuyo pa chochitikachi, zithunzi zingapo zidayamba kufalikira pa malo ochezera a pa Intaneti, zomwe zinanena kuti zikuwonetsa zithunzi za kuphulika kwa Red Fort ku Delhi. Tiyeni titsimikizire zomwe zanenedwa m'nkhaniyi.
