claim: Mauthenga a pa Intaneti omwe anagawidwa mu 2024 anafotokoza molondola kuti Paul McCartney anagula makalata ochokera ku ukwati woyamba wa John Lennon ndipo anawabweza kwa mkazi wake wakale wa Lennon, limodzi ndi kalata yonena kuti asagulitse zikumbutso zake.
evidence: Koma ... ... McCartney anabweza kalata imodzi ya John Lennon, osati makalata angapo, ndipo anachita zimenezi kwa zaka zingapo, osati masiku angapo, makalatawo atagulitsidwa. Palibe umboni wakuti McCartney anaphatikizapo kalata yonena kuti Cynthia Lennon asagulitse zikumbutso zake. Kwa zaka zambiri, ogwiritsa ntchito intaneti akhala akugawana nkhani yokhudza mawu olimbikitsa a woimba nyimbo Paul McCartney akuti anapanga kwa mkazi wakale wa mnzake wa Beatles John Lennon. Malinga ndi nkhaniyi, Cynthia Lennon, yemwe anali wokwatiwa ndi John kuyambira 1962 mpaka 1968 ndipo anamwalira mu 2015, adagulitsa makalata achikondi kuchokera kwa mwamuna wake wakale wotchuka kuti akwaniritse zosowa zawo atatha kusudzulana. Podziwa za malondawa, McCartney anagula zikumbutsozo ndipo anabwerera kwa iye. Zitsanzo za nkhaniyo zinawonekera pa nsanja zosiyanasiyana za pa Intaneti monga TikTok (Tarch Day), ndipo zikuyenera kuti zinayendetsedwa pa intaneti kuyambira December 2014, pomwe Reddington analemba pa intaneti (Tarch Day) ndi pa Twitter (Tarch Day) monga mauthenga osiyanasiyana, kuphatikizapo mauthenga a pa intaneti (Tarch Day) omwe adafalitsidwa pa intaneti (Tarch Day) ndi pa Twitter.

claim: Anthu a m'boma la Indiana anayesetsa kukhazikitsa malamulo amene angalole kuti boma lipereke chilango cha imfa kudzera m'zipinda zamagetsi komanso m'magulu ozunzirako anthu.
evidence: Pa nkhani imeneyi, oweruza a ku Indiana anayesa kukhazikitsa malamulo amene angalole boma kukhazikitsa malamulo oti lizipha anthu pogwiritsa ntchito mpweya wa nayitrogeni kapena gulu la anthu owombera. Lamuloli silinapitirize. Ngati likanakhala lamulo, sikunali kooneka ngati boma likanamanga zipinda zamagetsi. Maiko omwe amagwiritsa ntchito nayitrogeni pochita kuphedwa amaliyang'anira kudzera pa chigoba, ngakhale kuti boma la Arizona likunena kuti linakonzanso chipinda chake cha anthu omwe amafa chifukwa cha kupha anthu. Kumayambiriro kwa chaka cha 2026, anthu ena ananena kuti oweruza a ku Indiana anayesa kukhazikitsa malamulo omwe angalole kuphedwa kudzera m'zipinda zamagetsi ndi magulu a anthu owombera. Mphekesera zinayamba kufalikira pa nsanja monga Facebook, X, TikTok ndi Instagram. Owerenga a Snopes analembanso kuti afune Indiana kuti akupanga zipinda zamagetsi.

evidence: Chilengezochi chinanenanso kuti Italy inapereka yankho, ponena kuti pempholi ndi losaloleka ndipo inatsindika ufulu wa nzika za ku Ukraine woyenda momasuka. Komabe, izi ndi zabodza. claim: "Chikwelede cha boma mpaka pano chikufika pafupifupi 67% ya GDP".

claim: Pulezidenti wakale wa ku United States, Barack Obama, "anapereka" ku Iran $1.7 biliyoni m'mbali mwa ndalama mu 2016, kutumiza ndalama zambiri ku dzikoli.
evidence: Pa nthawiyi boma la Obama linapereka ndalama zokwana madola 1.7 biliyoni kwa Iran ndipo akuluakulu a ku America anavomereza kuti ndalamazo zinaperekedwa ndi ndalama zandalama zosakhala za ku America chifukwa chakuti boma la Iran linaloledwa ndi chiletsocho kuti lisalowe m'machitidwe a zachuma a madola. Nkhani za nthawiyo zinasonyeza kuti ndalamazo zinali zoyamba kufika pa madola 400 miliyoni pa mapaleshoni a ndalama zakunja tsiku lomwe Iran inamasula akaidi a ku America. Ndalamazo sizinaperekedwe ngati mphatso, zopereka kapena mphatso yaulere kuchokera kwa Obama kwa Iran. Zinali kuthetsa mkangano wa zaka zambiri wa ndalama zoposa madola 400 miliyoni zomwe Iran anali atalipira ku United States, asanafike pa Revolution ya 1979 ya Iran, chifukwa cha zida zankhondo zomwe sanapezepo, kuphatikiza pafupifupi madola 1.3 biliyoni.

evidence: Mwachitsanzo, kusiyana kwa kufunika kwa chakudya cha m'dzikoli ndi pafupifupi matani 485,000 (MT) pachaka pamene kusiyana kwa nyemba ya m'mimba ndi pafupifupi 290,000MT. claim: Mu December 2025, Dipatimenti ya Zachilungamo ya ku United States inatulutsa chenjezo la FBI limene m'bale wina amene anapereka madandaulo ananena kuti Pulezidenti Donald Trump anaona amalume ake akupha mwana wawo wakhanda ndipo ataponya mtembowo m'nyanja ya Michigan ali ndi zaka 13 ndipo akugulitsidwa ndi Jeffrey Epstein kuti azigonana naye.
evidence: Ngakhale kuti chikalatachi ndi chenicheni, zomwe ananenazo sizinatsimikizidwe. Pambuyo poti Dipatimenti ya Zachilungamo ya US yatulutsa mafayilo ambiri okhudzana ndi wolakwira wachiwerewere Jeffrey Epstein mu Disembala 2025, mawu ena adawonekera pa malo angapo ochezera a pa Intaneti (osungidwa, osungidwa, osungidwa, osungidwa) akuti munthu wina yemwe adati adagulitsidwa kuti agone ndi Epstein adapereka chidziwitso ku FBI kuti Purezidenti wa US a Donald Trump adawona amalume ake akupha mwana wawo wobadwa kumene ndikutaya mtembo wake ku Lake Michigan mu 1984, pomwe anali ndi zaka 13. Owerenga a Snopes adatitumizanso imelo ndikufufuza tsamba lathu kuti adziwe za mphekeserazo. Chikalatacho ndi chowona; woimbayo, yemwe dzina lake anali FBI, adapereka chidziwitso ku FBI National Operations Center pa Ogasiti 3, 2020, pomwe a Trump anali kuthana ndi a Joe Biden, pomwe anali wachiwiri paudindo, ngakhale kuti nthawiyi anali wachiwiri pa intaneti.

claim: Chifaniziro cha Gandhi chinawonongedwa ku Thiruvananthapuram pambuyo poti BJP idafika ku mphamvu m'bungwe la mzinda
evidence: Kanemayo akuonetsedwa ngati umboni wakuti chifaniziro cha Gandhi chinawonongedwa ku Thiruvananthapuram pambuyo poti BJP yafika ku mphamvu m'bungwe la mzindawu. Wogwiritsa ntchito Facebook adalemba uthenga womwe unakhala wofalikira ndi mawu akuti: Thiruvananthapuram Corporation Administration Congress inapatsa BJP mphamvu ndipo bungwe la BJP lidayamba kuwonetsa zomwe zikuchitika.

claim: Zosokoneza: Mlangizi wa Zelensky Chrystia Freeland Ndi Mtsogoleri wa Nazi Wotsutsana ndi Nazi
evidence: Agogo a Chrystia Freeland, Mykhailo Khomiak, anali mkonzi wa nyuzipepala ya Chiyukireniya yotchedwa Krakivski Visti panthawi ya ulamuliro wa Germany. Anali mtolankhani wamba ndipo ankagwira ntchito mosamalitsa ndi chipani cha Nazi, komabe palibe umboni woti anali wolakwa pa nkhondo kapena kuchita zinthu zozunza. Zolankhula za atolankhani ogwirizana ndi Kremlin zinanena kuti Pulezidenti wa Ukraine, Volodymyr Zelensky, anasankha Chrystia Freeland kukhala mlangizi wa chitukuko cha chuma, akumamufotokoza kuti ndi "mwana wa wochita naye Nazi". Mawuwa anavomerezedwa ndi mneneri wa Unduna wa Zakunja wa Russia, Maria Zakharova, yemwe ananena kuti Freeland ndi mwana wa Mykhailo Khomiak, ponena kuti anagwirizana ndi Nazi pamene anali kusindikiza nyuzipepala ya Krakivski Vistiko mu Kraków ndipo kenako ku Vienna pa nthawi ya ulamuliro wa Germany. Posachedwapa, akuluakulu a boma la Canada, omwe anali ku Poland, ananena kuti iye anali wolemba nkhani yaikulu.

claim: Kumapeto kwa chaka cha 2025, Dipatimenti ya Maphunziro inanena kuti siidzakhalanso ndi ziyeneretso ngati madigiri a akatswiri: maphunziro (kuphatikizapo maphunziro a masters degrees), unamwino (MSN, DNP), ntchito zachitukuko (MSW, DSW), thanzi la anthu (MPH, DrPH), wothandizira dokotala, mankhwala ogwirira ntchito, mankhwala olimbitsa thupi, audiology, matenda a chinenero cha kulankhula ndi maphunziro a upangiri ndi chithandizo.
evidence: Pa mfundo imeneyi, Dipatimenti ya Maphunziro yapereka lingaliro loti mapulani osiyanasiyana a maphunziro a koleji asaloledwe mu tanthauzo la "madigiri a akatswiri" makamaka pokhudzana ndi kuyenerera kwa ngongole za ophunzira. Pamene tikulemba izi, lingaliroli silinapitidwebe. Madigiri ena alangizi adzaphatikizidwanso mu "madigiri a akatswiri" malinga ndi dongosolo la Dipatimenti ya Maphunziro. Sizinali zomveka ngati chisankho ichi chomwe chikhudza mwachindunji malire a ngongole za ophunzira chikusonyeza kusintha kwakukulu kwa mfundo ndi machitidwe a Dipatimenti ya Maphunziro. Kumapeto kwa November 2025, mphekesera inafalikira pa intaneti kuti Dipatimenti ya Maphunziro idasinthanso mapulogalamu a unamwino ndi ma credentials ena a koleji kuti asaloledwe mu tanthauzo la "madigiri a akatswiri".

claim: "Chuma ichi sichiri chuma cha $188 biliyoni  ndi chuma cha $350 biliyoni".
evidence: Mkonzi wa Arise News TV Rufai Oseni anali wolondola ponena kuti bajetiyo ndi yochepa, koma anali wolakwika ponena kuti katundu wogulitsa mafuta ku Nigeria watsika ndi 50% chaka chatha. M'nkhani ya mu July 2025 pa Arise News TV, Tope F, mlangizi wa zachuma wa purezidenti wa Nigeria, adalimbikitsa kuti pakhale bajeti yayikulu kwambiri yothana ndi umphawi wosalekeza ndi kuyika ndalama m'malo ogulitsira, ndikulimbikitsa dzikolo kuti "lisinthe".

claim: Mu March 2026, mkulu wa asilikali a ku France, dzina lake Michel Yakovleff, yemwe anali mtsogoleri wa bungwe la NATO, ananena kuti dziko la France likamathandiza dziko la United States kuti likhale ndi chitetezo m'mphepete mwa nyanja ya Hormuz, likhoza kukhala ngati "likugula tikiti ya sitima ya Titanic".
evidence: Zotsatira zake zinali ngati "kugula matikiti otsika mtengo a Titanic", sitima yapamadzi yapamwamba yomwe inagunda chipale chofewa ndipo inamira paulendo wake woyamba kuchokera ku England kupita ku New York City mu 1912.Malo angapo pa intaneti, kuphatikizapo pa Facebook, anayamba kunena kuti, General Michel Yakovleff waku France, yemwe anali mtsogoleri wamkulu ku NATO, ananena kuti France itithandiza kuteteza ku Strait of Hormuz ku ziwopsezo za Iran, idzakhala ngati "kugula matikiti otsika mtengo a Titanic", sitima yapamadzi yapamwamba yomwe inagunda chipale chofewa ndipo inamira paulendo wake woyamba kuchokera ku England kupita ku New York City mu 1912.Malo angapo pa intaneti, kuphatikizapo pa Facebook, adalengeza kuti, Post imodzi pa X inali ndi kanema wa mphindi zitatu wa Yakovleff akunena kuti izi zatsimikizika pa TV yaku France (yosungidwa): Nkhaniyo inali ndi mawu akuti: "Maloledwa kupita ku France ndi General Yakovleff, yemwe anali atapita pantchito, kuti asalowe nawo mgwirizano wa Trump ku Hormuz: Si nthawi yoti akweze tikiti".

claim: "Uganda ili ndi alendo okwana 1.2 miliyoni omwe amabwera.
evidence: Mosiyana ndi zimenezi, Gregory Mugisha Muntu anali wolondola kwambiri ponena kuti 70% ya anthu a ku Uganda amadalira ulimi, koma iye anachepetsa kufika kwa alendo kuti awonjezere kusiyana kwa dziko lawo ndi dziko la East Africa ndi Tanzania. Frank Bulira Kabinga Kenya ananena zinthu zingapo zosalongosoka zokhudza United Emirates, kuphatikizapo malipiro a ogwira ntchito ku Philippines. Joseph Elton Mabirizi anachepetsa kukula kwa apolisi ndi asilikali a ku Uganda. Pa November 30, 2025, asanu mwa ofunafuna maudindo asanu ndi atatu a pulezidenti ku Uganda pa chisankho cha 2026 anapita kukakambirana pa TV, ndipo anafotokoza za dziko lawo ku East Africa.

claim: George Stephanopoulos, yemwe ndi wochititsa wa pulogalamu ya ABCs "This Week", adadula kuyankhulana ndi wachiwiri kwa Purezidenti wa US JD Vance pambuyo poti Vance adasocheretsa funso lokhudza mfumu ya ku malire Tom Homan.
evidence: Pa October 12, 2025, kuonekera kwa wachiwiri kwa Pulezidenti JD Vance pa ABC's "This Week" kunatha mwadzidzidzi pa nkhani yokhudza mtsogoleri wa boma la White House Tom Homan, yemwe akuti analandira chiphuphu cha $50,000 kuti athandize anthu osadziwika kuti "apambane mapangano a boma m'boma lachiwiri la Trump", malinga ndi lipoti la MSNBC lofalitsidwa mu September. Pa zokambiranazi, Vance anasinthanso mafunso a George Stephan Vopoulos okhudza zimene ankadziwa zokhudza Homan ndi ziphuphu zomwe zikuchitika kuti akambirane za boma la United States lomwe likugwa, zomwe Vance anadzudzula Democrats. Malinga ndi zomwe zinalembedwa, Vopoulos anasiya kuyankhulana ndi pulezidenti Stephen Vopoulos atatha "kuchotsa malonda" ndipo anapitiriza kukambirana ndi anthu ena monga "mphona".

claim: Ogwira ntchito ku UK omwe sangathe kugwira ntchito m'malo a Tier 3 adzalandira mgwirizano wa Job Support Scheme ndi Universal Credit, zomwe zikutanthauza kuti adzalandira 80% ya malipiro awo.
evidence: Kuti apereke pempho, wogwira ntchitoyo ayenera kugwira ntchito osachepera 33% ya maola awo wamba kuti ntchitoyo iwonedwe ngati yogwira ntchito ndipo chifukwa chake ndi yoyenera pansi pa dongosololi. Boma limapereka gawo limodzi mwa magawo atatu a maola omwe sanagwire ntchito (mpaka malire), pomwe abwana amaperekanso gawo limodzi mwa magawo atatu. Gawo limodzi mwa magawo atatu omwe sanalandire malipiro ndi zomwe wogwira ntchitoyo amapereka. Izi zikutanthauza kuti wogwira ntchito amapeza 77% ya malipiro awo wamba pomwe ndalama za Boma sizinaperekedwe malire. Chonde dziwani kuti pali zambiri zomwe ziyenera kufotokozedwa ndi HMRC pazomwe zimapanga malipiro a normal, makamaka kwa iwo omwe malipiro awo asintha kuyambira Marichi kupita ku dongosolo latsopano la malipiro ndi abwana awo, ndi zina mwazinthu zina zowongoka kwambiri za momwe ntchito yothandizira ntchito idzagwirira ntchito.

claim: Woyang'anira wamkulu wa chitetezo ku Dipatimenti ya Homeland Security ya US kuyambira Marichi 2026 adatchedwa Iwona B. Horyn.
evidence: Kumapeto kwa February 2026, owerenga a Snopes anafufuza pa webusaitiyi kuti apeze zambiri zokhudza munthu wina yemwe akuti dzina lake ndi Iwona B. Horyn, yemwe ena amati anali mkulu wa chitetezo cha dipatimenti ya Homeland Security ya ku United States. Mphekeserazi, yomwe yakhala ikufalikira pa intaneti kuyambira kumapeto kwa November 2025, inawuka pomwe Horyn akuti adawonetsedwa mu gawo la sewero la usiku wachisanu ndi chimodzi "Jimmy Kimmel Live". Kimmel anagwiritsa ntchito mawu omwe akuwoneka kuti ali m'dzina la Horyn ("I wanna be whorin'") monga mawu oyamba a gawo lomwe lili ndi anthu ena "osasangalala" omwe ali ndi mayina. Gawoli likupezeka kuti muwone pa YouTube ndi gawo loyenera kuyambira pa 14:00 mark. Zotsatira zake, ogwiritsa ntchito ma social media nsanja Instagram (osungidwa) kuti afalitse dzina la wogwira ntchito wa DHS ndi dzina loti DHS.

claim: Makolo a First Lady Melania Trump anabwera ku United States kudzera mu banja, lomwe limatchedwanso kusamukira ku China.
evidence: Kuyambira pa nthawi ya ulamuliro woyamba wa Purezidenti wa United States Donald Trump, anthu ambiri akhala akuganiza kuti makolo a Melania Trump ndi amene anabwera ku United States chifukwa cha ukafiri wawo. claim: Kutsatsa kwa boma la Ontario, Canada, kunasonyeza kuti Pulezidenti Ronald Reagan anali ndi maganizo olakwika pa April 25, 1987, pamene anali kulankhula za misonkho.
evidence: Boma la chigawo cha Canada cha Ontario litatulutsa zotsatsa zotsutsana ndi misonkho zomwe zimatsutsana ndi mfundo za malonda a US, Purezidenti Donald Trump adati United States ikuletsa zokambirana zamalonda ndi mnansi wake waku North. Mu positi ya 23 Oct. Truth Social, Trump adatchula mawu ochokera ku Ronald Reagan Presidential Foundation and Institute. Trump adalemba kuti, "The Ronald Reagan Foundation yangolengeza kumene kuti Canada yagwiritsa ntchito malonda achinyengo, omwe ndi FAKE, pomwe Ronald Reagan amalankhula molakwika za Mitengo". Ronald Reagan Presidential Foundation and Institute ndi bungwe lopanda phindu lomwe lili ku Simi Valley, California, lomwe linakhazikitsidwa ndi Reagan kuti lipititse patsogolo cholowa chake ndi mfundo zake. Reagan Foundation adati malonda a Canada omwe adawonetsa Reagan pa wailesi ya pa 25 Epulo 1987, adagwiritsa ntchito "mawu osankhidwa ndi makanema" ndipo "akuwonetsa Adilesi ya Purezidenti wa pa wailesi. Komabe, mphindi imodzi ya Reagan idaphatikizapo zolemba zachikhalidwe cha malonda omwe adalemba misonkho kapena misonkho ya ku Japan yomwe idaperekedwa pambuyo pa malamulo ena a Reagan.

claim: Pa nthawi imene Gov. Hochuls anali pulezidenti, m'misewu yathu munali upandu wambiri.
evidence: "Chinthu chokha chimene anthu a ku New York akuyenera kusonyeza pa nthawi imene wakhala woyang'anira ndi woyang'anira boma ndi kukwera kwa mitengo, kuwonjezeka kwa ndalama zowononga, kukwera kwa ndalama za Medicaid chifukwa cha chinyengo ndi kuzunzidwa, komanso kuwonjezeka kwa umbanda m'misewu yathu", anatero mtsogoleri wa chipani cha Republican cha Senate, a Robert Ortt, a ku R-North Tonawanda. Kuwonjezeka kwa umbanda pa nthawi ya mliriwu kunalembedwa bwino, koma tinkadabwa ngati zimene Ortt ananena zoti "umbanda umadzaza m'misewu yathu" kuchokera pamene Hochul anakhala bwanamkubwa pa 24 August, 2021 ndi zolondola.

claim: Wogwira ntchito ya Immigration and Customs Enforcement ku United States amene anapha Renee Nicole Good ku Minneapolis pa Jan. 7, 2026, anamutcha kuti Steve Grove.
evidence: Pa January 7, 2026, wogwira ntchito ya Immigration and Customs Enforcement ku United States anapha Renee Nicole Good, wazaka 37, m'dera la Minneapolis. Zithunzi za anthu omwe anali pafupi ndi kuwombera ndi zochitika zomwe zinatsatirazo zinatengedwa mwamsanga pa malo ochezera a pa Intaneti, zomwe zinakwiyitsa kwambiri anthu komanso kuwunika za chochitikacho. Anthu ambiri anayesetsanso kudziwa (kuika) woimira wa ICE. Nkhani zambiri za pa TV (zolembedwa) (zolembedwa), kuphatikizapo zina zomwe zinachotsedwa mwamsanga (zolembedwa) ndi zina zomwe zinaphatikizapo chithunzi chooneka cha nkhope ya woimira wa ICE, zinati woimira mlandu wa Goods dzina lake anali Steve Grove (zolembedwa). Zina mwazo zinati Grove anali wochokera ku Minneapolis. Owerenga Tribes anapezanso tsamba lathu kuti atsimikizire kuti anali ku Minnesota. (Alembedwe kudzera pa Facebook) The Richwood Long Press.

claim: Gulu lopanda phindu la Conservative Turning Point USA linalengeza za njira ina yowonetsera theka la Super Bowl 2026.
evidence: Nkhaniyi inalengezedwa ndi a Turning Point USA kuti akukonzekera kupanga pulogalamu ya 2026 Super Bowl Halftime Show pambuyo poti lipotili lafalitsidwa koyamba, lomwe lalembedwa pano. Pambuyo pa kulengeza kwa National Football League kwa wojambula wa Grammy Award Bad Bunny ngati woimba wa 2026 Super Bowl, mphekesera zinayambira pa intaneti koyambirira kwa Okutobala 2025 kuti a Turning Point USA, bungwe lopanda phindu lotetezedwa lomwe linakhazikitsidwa ndi wochita masewera osunga mwambo Charlie Kirk, lidapanga pulogalamu ina. Ogwiritsa ntchito adalengeza izi pa Instagram (zosungidwa), Facebook (zosungidwa) ndi X (zosungidwa), pomwe ena amalemba chithunzi cha Bad Bunny pamodzi ndi mawu akuti "Mind, you a Bad Bunny" omwe amatumizidwa ndi a Puerto Rico (omwe ali kumbuyo kwa mphekesera) omwe amalimbikitsa anthu ambiri kuti atumize uthenga wabodza.

claim: Megan Byron, mkazi wa Andy Byron, yemwe anali CEO wa Astronomer, yemwe akuti anali ndi chibwenzi ndi mnzake, anawulula za chibwenzi chake poonetsa kamera ya Kiss pa msonkhano wa Coldplay mu July 2025, ndipo analengeza kuti CEOyo adzaona zimene anachita.
evidence: Pa nthawiyi, anthu ankagwiritsa ntchito Intaneti ankafotokoza za nthawi imene Andy Byron, yemwe anali mkulu wa akatswiri a sayansi ya zakuthambo, ankaonekera ndi manja ake pozungulira Kristin Cabot, yemwe anali mkulu wa kampani ya HR, pa "kiss cam" pa msonkhano wa Coldplay. Pa nthawiyi, mawu (osungidwa) anafalikira, omwe ankaoneka kuti anali olembedwa ndi mkazi wa Byron, Megan Kerrigan Byron.

claim: "Kuwombera mabomba a magetsi a anthu wamba ndi mlandu wankhondo.
evidence: Pa March 21, Trump analemba pa Truth Social kuti "ngati Iran singaitsegule kwathunthu, popanda chiopsezo, m'mphepete mwa Hormuz, mkati mwa MAWA 48 kuchokera nthawi yeniyeniyi, United States of America idzaukira ndi kuwononga malo awo osiyanasiyana a Mphamvu, kuyambira ndi WAMBIRI WAMBIRI WAMBIRI!" Ngakhale kuti Trump pambuyo pake adawonjezera nthawiyo kawiri, adati pa March 30 pa Truth Social kuti "ngati Hormuz Strait sichitsegulidwa nthawi yomweyo, tidzathetsa ntchito yathu yokongola ku Iran pomenya ndi kuwononga kwathunthu malo awo onse opangira magetsi, mafuta ndi mafuta (mwina) ndi Kharg Island, koma "nthawi zonse" zomwe zidakonzedwa ndi asilikali athu, koma "nthawi zonse" zomwe Trump adati "zathera, sizinachitike".

claim: Malo opangira deta omwe akuperekedwa ku New York State angagwiritse ntchito mphamvu zochuluka kwambiri kuposa zochuluka kwambiri kuposa mabanja onse m'boma.
evidence: Pamene anthu ambiri aku America akuganiza za mtengo ndi phindu la kumanga malo akuluakulu opangira deta a nzeru zopangira ndi zidziwitso zina za digito, awiri a New York Democrats adalimbikitsa boma kuti liyimitse ntchito zotere, ponena kuti zitha kuwononga ogula komanso chilengedwe. M'nkhani ya March 5 mu Albany Times-Union, Sen. wa boma la New York Liz Krueger ndi Msonkhano wa Anna Kelles adalimbikitsa kuti pakhale chiletso, ponena kuti malo opangira deta m'boma adzafunika "9,5 gigawatt ya magetsi, yomwe ndi pafupifupi kawiri ka kugwiritsidwa ntchito kwa magetsi m'nyumba zonse m'boma pamodzi". Nyumba yamalamulo ya New York ikuganiza zoimitsa ntchito ya malo atsopano opangira deta mpaka pakhale mphamvu zokwanira zoyendetsa malo omwe aperekedwa. Maiko ena angapo aganiziranso za izi, ngakhale palibe amene wapanga lamuloli; a Democrat Gov. Mills Mills adaletsa lamulo lotere. Pamene tinafika ku ofesi ya Janet Krueger, woyankhula wina anatchula mndandanda wa ntchito zomwe bungwe la Independent Operator of New York State Power Systems, lomwe limafalitsa, limawunikira mauthenga a 35 omwe akuphatikizira

claim: Mu March 2026, Purezidenti wa United States a Donald Trump ananena za Crown Prince wa Saudi Arabia, Mohammed bin Salman kuti, "Sanaganize kuti angandipsompsone".
evidence: Ponena za mbiri imeneyi, kanema inafalitsidwa pa intaneti mu March 2026 ndipo ikuoneka kuti ikusonyeza Purezidenti wa United States Donald Trump akunena kuti Crown Prince wa Saudi Arabia, Mohammed bin Salman "sakanaganiza kuti angandipsompsone a**". Kanemayo anafalikira m'mapaunti angapo, ndipo ambiri mwa ogwiritsa ntchito ndemanga adawonetsa kukayikira kuti kanemayo anali wowona, posonyeza kuti mwina adapangidwa pogwiritsa ntchito luntha lochita kupanga. Owerenga adafunsanso Snopes kuti atsimikizire zonenazo positi yogawana ndi INDIANS (@Indians) Mawuwa adalembedwa molondola kwa Trump  adachita ndemanga (pafupifupi 43:02) pa nthawi yomwe adawonekera pamsonkhano ku Miami kwa Saudi Investment Initiative yopanda phindu. White House idasindikiza kanema (yosungidwa) ya mawu ake pa YouTube pa Marichi 27, 2026.
